<h1 id="ramp-developer-api">Ramp Developer API v1</h1>

> Scroll down for code samples, example requests and responses. Select a language for code samples from the tabs above or the mobile navigation menu.

Base URLs:

* <a href="https://api.ramp.com">https://api.ramp.com</a>

# Authentication

- oAuth2 authentication. 

    - Flow: authorizationCode
    - Authorization URL = [https://api.ramp.com/v1/authorize](https://api.ramp.com/v1/authorize)
    - Token URL = [https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/token](https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/token)

|Scope|Scope Description|
|---|---|
|accounting:read|Grant read access to accounting|
|accounting:write|Grant write access to accounting|
|attendee_types:read|Grant read access to attendee_types|
|attendee_types:write|Grant write access to attendee_types|
|audit_logs:read|Grant read access to audit_logs|
|bank_accounts:read|Grant read access to bank_accounts|
|bank_feeds:read|Grant read access to bank_feeds|
|bills:read|Grant read access to bills|
|bills:write|Grant write access to bills|
|blank_canvas:write|Grant write access to blank_canvas|
|business:read|Grant read access to business|
|cards:read|Grant read access to cards|
|cards:read_vault|Grant read_vault access to cards|
|cards:write|Grant write access to cards|
|cashbacks:read|Grant read access to cashbacks|
|comments:write|Grant write access to comments|
|custom_forms:read|Grant read access to custom_forms|
|custom_records:read|Grant read access to custom_records|
|custom_records:write|Grant write access to custom_records|
|departments:read|Grant read access to departments|
|departments:write|Grant write access to departments|
|embedded_cards:write|Grant write access to embedded_cards|
|entities:read|Grant read access to entities|
|external_attendees:read|Grant read access to external_attendees|
|external_attendees:write|Grant write access to external_attendees|
|item_receipts:read|Grant read access to item_receipts|
|item_receipts:write|Grant write access to item_receipts|
|leads:read|Grant read access to leads|
|leads:write|Grant write access to leads|
|limits:read|Grant read access to limits|
|limits:write|Grant write access to limits|
|locations:read|Grant read access to locations|
|locations:write|Grant write access to locations|
|memos:read|Grant read access to memos|
|memos:write|Grant write access to memos|
|merchants:read|Grant read access to merchants|
|offline_access|Grant access to offline_access|
|openid|Grant access to openid|
|purchase_orders:read|Grant read access to purchase_orders|
|purchase_orders:write|Grant write access to purchase_orders|
|receipt_integrations:read|Grant read access to receipt_integrations|
|receipt_integrations:write|Grant write access to receipt_integrations|
|receipts:read|Grant read access to receipts|
|receipts:write|Grant write access to receipts|
|reimbursements:read|Grant read access to reimbursements|
|reimbursements:write|Grant write access to reimbursements|
|repayments:read|Grant read access to repayments|
|spend_programs:read|Grant read access to spend_programs|
|spend_programs:write|Grant write access to spend_programs|
|spend_requests:read|Grant read access to spend_requests|
|spend_requests:write|Grant write access to spend_requests|
|statements:read|Grant read access to statements|
|transactions:read|Grant read access to transactions|
|transactions:write|Grant write access to transactions|
|transfers:read|Grant read access to transfers|
|treasury:read|Grant read access to treasury|
|trips:read|Grant read access to trips|
|unified_requests:read|Grant read access to unified_requests|
|users:read|Grant read access to users|
|users:write|Grant write access to users|
|vendors:read|Grant read access to vendors|
|vendors:write|Grant write access to vendors|

    - Flow: clientCredentials

<h1 id="ramp-developer-api-limit">Limit</h1>

Limit Operations

## get_spend_limit_list_with_pagination

<a id="opIdget_spend_limit_list_with_pagination"></a>

> Code samples

```shell
# You can also use wget
curl -X GET https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/limits \
  -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer {access-token}'

```

```http
GET https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/limits HTTP/1.1
Host: api.ramp.com
Accept: application/json

```

```javascript

const headers = {
  'Accept':'application/json',
  'Authorization':'Bearer {access-token}'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/limits',
{
  method: 'GET',

  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {
    return res.json();
}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});

```

```ruby
require 'rest-client'
require 'json'

headers = {
  'Accept' => 'application/json',
  'Authorization' => 'Bearer {access-token}'
}

result = RestClient.get 'https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/limits',
  params: {
  }, headers: headers

p JSON.parse(result)

```

```python
import requests
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'Authorization': 'Bearer {access-token}'
}

r = requests.get('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/limits', headers = headers)

print(r.json())

```

```php
<?php

require 'vendor/autoload.php';

$headers = array(
    'Accept' => 'application/json',
    'Authorization' => 'Bearer {access-token}',
);

$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();

// Define array of request body.
$request_body = array();

try {
    $response = $client->request('GET','https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/limits', array(
        'headers' => $headers,
        'json' => $request_body,
       )
    );
    print_r($response->getBody()->getContents());
 }
 catch (\GuzzleHttp\Exception\BadResponseException $e) {
    // handle exception or api errors.
    print_r($e->getMessage());
 }

 // ...

```

```java
URL obj = new URL("https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/limits");
HttpURLConnection con = (HttpURLConnection) obj.openConnection();
con.setRequestMethod("GET");
int responseCode = con.getResponseCode();
BufferedReader in = new BufferedReader(
    new InputStreamReader(con.getInputStream()));
String inputLine;
StringBuffer response = new StringBuffer();
while ((inputLine = in.readLine()) != null) {
    response.append(inputLine);
}
in.close();
System.out.println(response.toString());

```

```go
package main

import (
       "bytes"
       "net/http"
)

func main() {

    headers := map[string][]string{
        "Accept": []string{"application/json"},
        "Authorization": []string{"Bearer {access-token}"},
    }

    data := bytes.NewBuffer([]byte{jsonReq})
    req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/limits", data)
    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`GET /developer/v1/limits`

*List limits*

<h3 id="get_spend_limit_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|display_name|query|string|false|Filter by display name.|
|entity_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter for limits by associated business entity.|
|spend_program_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter for limits that are associated with the specified spend program|
|card_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter for limits that are linked to the card.|
|user_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter for limits that are owned by the user.|
|created_after|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter for spend limits that were created after the specified date. Input need to be presented in ISO8601 format, e.g. 2024-01-15T00:00:00Z|
|created_before|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter for spend limits that were created before the specified date. Input need to be presented in ISO8601 format, e.g. 2024-01-15T00:00:00Z|
|is_terminated|query|boolean|false|Filter only for terminated spend limits.|
|user_access_roles|query|array[string]|false|List of user access types to filter on. If provided, only limits with matching access types will be returned. Access types are 'OWNER', 'COOWNER', and 'MEMBER'. Can be provided as repeated parameters or comma-separated values.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Parameter|Value|
|---|---|
|user_access_roles|COORDINATOR|
|user_access_roles|COOWNER|
|user_access_roles|MEMBER|
|user_access_roles|OWNER|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "balance": {
        "cleared": {
```

<h3 id="get_spend_limit_list_with_pagination-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|SpendLimits|[PaginatedResponseApiSpendLimitResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapispendlimitresourceschema)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: limits:read )
</aside>

## post_spend_limit_creation

<a id="opIdpost_spend_limit_creation"></a>

> Code samples

```shell
# You can also use wget
curl -X POST https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/limits/deferred \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer {access-token}'

```

```http
POST https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/limits/deferred HTTP/1.1
Host: api.ramp.com
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

```

```javascript
const inputBody = '{
  "accounting_rules": [
    {
      "field_id": "3f30896b-cd22-47af-b48a-c6c3068bc780",
      "field_option_id": "d062e221-9c95-47b5-8dc6-d6c881693caf"
    }
  ],
  "display_name": "T&E",
  "idempotency_key": "3a5b1f62-988f-4190-bf31-b7ae87c5df42",
  "is_shareable": false,
  "permitted_spend_types": {
    "primary_card_enabled": false,
    "reimbursements_enabled": false
  },
  "spending_restrictions": {
    "allowed_categories": [
      18,
      20
    ],
    "auto_lock_date": null,
    "interval": "MONTHLY",
    "limit": {
      "amount": 500000,
      "currency_code": "USD"
    },
    "transaction_amount_limit": {
      "amount": 10000,
      "currency_code": "USD"
    }
  },
  "user_id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731"
}';
const headers = {
  'Content-Type':'application/json',
  'Accept':'application/json',
  'Authorization':'Bearer {access-token}'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/limits/deferred',
{
  method: 'POST',
  body: inputBody,
  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {
    return res.json();
}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});

```

`POST /developer/v1/limits/deferred`

*Create a limit*

Limit may either be created with spend program id (can provide display name and spending restrictions, cannot permitted spend types) or without (must provide display name, spending restrictions, and permitted spend types).

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "accounting_rules": [
    {
      "field_id": "3f30896b-cd22-47af-b48a-c6c3068bc780",
      "field_option_id": "d062e221-9c95-47b5-8dc6-d6c881693caf"
    }
  ],
  "display_name": "T&E",
  "idempotency_key": "3a5b1f62-988f-4190-bf31-b7ae87c5df42",
  "is_shareable": false,
  "permitted_spend_types": {
    "primary_card_enabled": false,
    "reimbursements_enabled": false
  },
  "spending_restrictions": {
    "allowed_categories": [
      18,
      20
    ],
    "auto_lock_date": null,
    "interval": "MONTHLY",
    "limit": {
      "amount": 500000,
      "currency_code": "USD"
    },
    "transaction_amount_limit": {
      "amount": 10000,
      "currency_code": "USD"
    }
  },
  "user_id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731"
}
```

<h3 id="post_spend_limit_creation-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiSpendLimitCreateRequestBody](#schemaapispendlimitcreaterequestbody)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
}
```

<h3 id="post_spend_limit_creation-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Response with the ID of the async task. Task status can be checked via a GET call to .../deferred/status/<task_id>|[DeferredTaskUUID](#schemadeferredtaskuuid)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: limits:write )
</aside>

```go
    req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/limits/deferred/status/{task_id}", data)
```
```go
    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`POST /developer/v1/limits/{spend_limit_id}/deferred/termination`

*Terminate a limit*

This endpoint creates an async task to terminate a limit permanently.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "idempotency_key": "string"
}
```

<h3 id="post_spend_limit_termination_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiSpendLimitDeferredUpdateRequestBody](#schemaapispendlimitdeferredupdaterequestbody)|true|none|
|spend_limit_id|path|string|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
}
```

<h3 id="post_spend_limit_termination_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Response with the ID of the async task. Task status can be checked via a GET call to .../deferred/status/<task_id>|[DeferredTaskUUID](#schemadeferredtaskuuid)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: limits:write )
</aside>

<h3 id="post_spend_limit_suspension_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Response indicating successful suspension of the limit.|[Limit](#schemalimit)|
|404|[Not Found](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.4)|limit not found|None|
|422|[Unprocessable Entity](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2518#section-10.3)|Invalid spend_limit_id|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: limits:write )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/accounting/accounts`

*List general ledger accounts*

<h3 id="get_gl_account_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|remote_id|query|string|false|Filter by Remote/external ID|
|is_active|query|boolean|false|Filter by active status. If not provided, returns all objects. If true, returns only active objects. If false, returns only inactive objects.|
|code|query|string|false|Filter by code.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|
|is_synced|query|boolean|false|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "accounting_connection_id": "7de1fa6c-1fe9-432e-83d8-80971a91f903",
      "classification": "EXPENSE",
      "code": "6410",
      "created_at": "2019-08-28T14:15:22+00:00",
      "gl_account_category_info": {
        "id": "Category",
        "name": "Category",
        "ramp_id": "96bb7007-eec5-430f-8d09-e033cbc000c2"
      },
      "id": "514",
      "is_active": true,
      "name": "Employees:Salaries & Wages",
      "provider_name": "QuickBooks",
      "ramp_id": "46910cc3-ab41-4b80-b4a7-94dab9f1b795",
      "updated_at": "2020-08-28T14:40:12+00:00"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_gl_account_list_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Accounts|[PaginatedResponseApiAccountingGLAccountResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapiaccountingglaccountresourceschema)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: accounting:read )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/accounting/accounts`

*Upload general ledger accounts*

You can upload up to 500 general ledger accounts in an all-or-nothing fashion. If a general ledger accounts within a batch is malformed or violates a database constraint, the entire batch containing that account will be disregarded.
To have a successful upload, please sanitize the data and ensure the general ledger accounts that you are trying to upload do not already exist on Ramp.
If a general ledger account is already on Ramp but you want to update its attributes, please use the PATCH developer/v1/accounting/accounts/{id} endpoint instead.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "accounting_connection_id": null,
  "gl_accounts": [
    {
      "classification": "EXPENSE",
      "code": "6410",
      "id": "514",
      "name": "Employees:Salaries & Wages"
    },
    {
      "classification": "EXPENSE",
      "id": "418",
      "name": "Office/Admin:Phone & Internet"
    },
    {
      "classification": "REVENUE",
      "id": "425",
      "name": "Sales"
    }
  ]
}
```

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiAccountingGLAccountUploadRequestBody](#schemaapiaccountingglaccountuploadrequestbody)|true|none|

> Example responses

```json
    },

}
```

*Disconnect an accounting connection*

This endpoint only allows disconnecting API based connections.

`GET /developer/v1/accounting/connection`

*Fetch the current active accounting connection*

This endpoint is now deprecated. Please use the `/all-connections` endpoint instead here.

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "connection_type": "API",
  "created_at": "2021-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "id": "46910cc3-ab41-4b80-b4a7-94dab9f1b795",
  "is_active": true,
  "is_ready_to_migrate": false,
  "last_linked_at": "2021-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "remote_provider_name": "Example ERP",
  "settings": {
    "transaction_accounting_vendor_creation_on_sync_enabled": false,
    "transaction_sync_button_enabled": false,
    "vendor_credits_enabled": false
  },
  "status": "LINKED"
}
```

<h3 id="get_accounting_current_connection_resource_deprecated-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Success|Inline|
|404|[Not Found](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.4)|raises NotFound|None|

<h3 id="get_accounting_current_connection_resource_deprecated-responseschema">Response Schema</h3>

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|connection_type|API|
|connection_type|CSV|
|connection_type|DIRECT|
|status|failed_to_auth|
|status|linked|
|status|revoked|
|status|unlinked|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: accounting:read )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/accounting/connection`

*Register a new API based accounting connection*

A connection is required in order to use our accounting API functionality.
If a Universal CSV connection already exists, it will be upgraded to an API based connection.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "reactivate": false,
  "remote_provider_name": "ACCOUNTING_SEED",
  "settings": {
    "transaction_accounting_vendor_creation_on_sync_enabled": false,
    "transaction_sync_button_enabled": false,
    "vendor_credits_enabled": true
  }
}
```

<h3 id="post_accounting_connection_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiAccountingProviderAccessCreateRequestBody](#schemaapiaccountingprovideraccesscreaterequestbody)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 201 Response

```json
{
  "connection_type": "API",
  "created_at": "2021-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "id": "46910cc3-ab41-4b80-b4a7-94dab9f1b795",
  "is_active": true,
  "is_ready_to_migrate": false,
  "last_linked_at": "2021-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "remote_provider_name": "Example ERP",
  "settings": {
    "transaction_accounting_vendor_creation_on_sync_enabled": false,
    "transaction_sync_button_enabled": false,
    "vendor_credits_enabled": false
  },
  "status": "LINKED"
}
```

<h3 id="post_accounting_connection_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|201|[Created](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.2)|Success|[AccountingProvider](#schemaaccountingprovider)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: accounting:write )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/accounting/connection/{connection_id}/reactivate`

*Reactivate a previously unlinked accounting connection*

This endpoint allows reactivating a previously disconnected accounting connection
by changing its status back to linked. This preserves all previous accounting
field configurations and settings.

The business must not have any other active accounting connections.

<h3 id="post_reactivate_connection_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|connection_id|path|string(uuid)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "connection_type": "API",
  "created_at": "2021-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "id": "46910cc3-ab41-4b80-b4a7-94dab9f1b795",
  "is_active": true,
  "is_ready_to_migrate": false,
  "last_linked_at": "2021-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "remote_provider_name": "Example ERP",
  "settings": {
    "transaction_accounting_vendor_creation_on_sync_enabled": false,
    "transaction_sync_button_enabled": false,
    "vendor_credits_enabled": false
  },
  "status": "LINKED"
}
```

<h3 id="post_reactivate_connection_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Success|[AccountingProvider](#schemaaccountingprovider)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: accounting:write )
</aside>

```go
        "Accept": []string{"application/json"},
        "Authorization": []string{"Bearer {access-token}"},
    }

    data := bytes.NewBuffer([]byte{jsonReq})
    req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/accounting/field-options", data)
    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`GET /developer/v1/accounting/field-options`

*List options for a given custom accounting field*

<h3 id="get_custom_field_option_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|remote_id|query|string|false|Filter by Remote/external ID of custom accounting field options in ERP system.|
|is_active|query|boolean|false|Filter by active status. If not provided, returns all custom accounting field options. If true, returns only active options. If false, returns only inactive options.|
|code|query|string|false|Filter by code of custom accounting field options.|
|visibility|query|string|false|Filter by visibility of custom accounting field options. If not provided, returns options with any visibility.|
|field_id|query|string(uuid)|true|The ID of the custom accounting field that this custom accounting field option belongs to. This is the ramp_id returned from custom field endpoints.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Parameter|Value|
|---|---|
|visibility|HIDDEN|
|visibility|VISIBLE|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "accounting_connection_id": "e67fef58-33d2-4a16-90c7-6cc071507511",
      "code": "20001",
      "created_at": "2019-08-28T14:15:22+00:00",
      "id": "123",
      "is_active": true,
      "provider_name": "Accounting",
      "ramp_id": "649b6731-33c6-4ff5-8a5d-2333fcc90ace",
      "updated_at": "2020-08-28T14:40:12+00:00",
      "value": "Office/Admin:Phone & Internet"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_custom_field_option_list_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|FieldOptions|[PaginatedResponseApiAccountingCustomFieldOptionResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapiaccountingcustomfieldoptionresourceschema)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: accounting:read )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/accounting/field-options`

*Upload new options*

You can upload up to 500 new field options for a given custom accounting field in an all-or-nothing fashion. If a field option within a batch is malformed or violates a database constraint, the entire batch containing that field option will be disregarded.
To have a successful upload, please sanitize the data and ensure the field options that you are trying to upload do not already exist on Ramp.
If a field option is already on Ramp but you want to update its attributes, please use the PATCH developer/v1/accounting/field-options/{id} endpoint instead.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "accounting_connection_id": null,
  "field_id": "46910cc3-ab41-4b80-b4a7-94dab9f1b795",
  "options": [
    {
      "id": "418",
      "value": "Engineering & Design"
    },
    {
      "id": "514",
      "value": "Sales & Marketing"
    }
  ]
}
```

<h3 id="post_custom_field_option_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiAccountingCustomFieldOptionUploadRequestBody](#schemaapiaccountingcustomfieldoptionuploadrequestbody)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 201 Response

```json
{
  "accounting_connection_id": "e67fef58-33d2-4a16-90c7-6cc071507511",
  "options": [
    {
      "code": "20001",
      "created_at": "2019-08-28T14:15:22+00:00",
      "id": "123",
      "is_active": true,
      "ramp_id": "649b6731-33c6-4ff5-8a5d-2333fcc90ace",
      "updated_at": "2020-08-28T14:40:12+00:00",
      "value": "Office/Admin:Phone & Internet"
    }
  ],
  "uploaded": [
    "649b6731-33c6-4ff5-8a5d-2333fcc90ace"
  ]
}
```

<h3 id="post_custom_field_option_list_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|201|[Created](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.2)|Success|[ApiAccountingCustomFieldOptionUploadResponse](#schemaapiaccountingcustomfieldoptionuploadresponse)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: accounting:write )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/accounting/fields`

*List custom accounting fields*

<h3 id="get_custom_field_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|remote_id|query|string|false|Filter by Remote/external ID of custom accounting fields in ERP system.|
|is_active|query|boolean|false|Filter by active status. If not provided, returns all custom accounting fields. If true, returns only active fields. If false, returns only inactive fields.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "accounting_connection_id": "e67fef58-33d2-4a16-90c7-6cc071507511",
      "created_at": "2019-08-28T14:15:22+00:00",
      "display_name": "Dept",
      "id": "Department",
      "input_type": "SINGLE_CHOICE",
      "is_active": true,
      "is_splittable": true,
      "name": "Department",
      "provider_name": "QuickBooks",
      "ramp_id": "46910cc3-ab41-4b80-b4a7-94dab9f1b795",
      "updated_at": "2020-08-28T14:40:12+00:00"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_custom_field_list_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Fields|[PaginatedResponseApiAccountingCustomFieldResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapiaccountingcustomfieldresourceschema)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: accounting:read )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/accounting/fields`

*Create a new custom accounting field*

If a custom field with the same id already exists on Ramp, then that existing one will be returned instead of creating a new one; If the existing custom field is inactive, it will be reactivated.
If you want to update the existing custom field, please use the PATCH developer/v1/accounting/fields/{id} endpoint instead.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "accounting_connection_id": null,
  "display_name": "Dept",
  "id": "Department",
  "input_type": "SINGLE_CHOICE",
  "is_splittable": "True",
  "name": "Department"
}
```

<h3 id="post_custom_field_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiAccountingCustomFieldCreateParamsRequestBody](#schemaapiaccountingcustomfieldcreateparamsrequestbody)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 201 Response

```json
{
  "accounting_connection_id": "e67fef58-33d2-4a16-90c7-6cc071507511",
  "created_at": "2019-08-28T14:15:22+00:00",
  "display_name": "Dept",
  "id": "Department",
  "input_type": "SINGLE_CHOICE",

}
```

`GET /developer/v1/accounting/inventory-item/options`

*List inventory item options*

<h3 id="get_inventory_item_field_options_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|remote_id|query|string|false|Filter by Remote/external ID|
|is_active|query|boolean|false|Filter by active status. If not provided, returns all objects. If true, returns only active objects. If false, returns only inactive objects.|
|code|query|string|false|Filter by code.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|
|is_synced|query|boolean|false|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "accounting_connection_id": "e67fef58-33d2-4a16-90c7-6cc071507511",
      "id": "inventory_item_001",
      "is_active": true,
      "name": "Widget A",
      "ramp_id": "46910cc3-ab41-4b80-b4a7-94dab9f1b795"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_inventory_item_field_options_list_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Inventory Item Options|[PaginatedResponseApiAccountingInventoryItemOptionResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapiaccountinginventoryitemoptionresourceschema)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: accounting:read )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/accounting/syncs`

*Post sync status*

This endpoint allows customers to notify Ramp of a list of sync results.
An idempotency key is required to ensure that subsequent requests are properly handled.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "failed_syncs": [
    {
      "error": {
        "message": "The account period has closed and the account books cannot be updated."
      },
      "id": "d471d830-2e73-4082-8a75-68540f83e86e"
    }
  ],
  "idempotency_key": "d471d830-2e73-4082-8a75-68540f83e86e",
  "successful_syncs": [
    {
      "id": "5a58eb94-a583-458f-810d-c794f32f2f90",
      "reference_id": "d8573713-a97d-4119-bdd7-b69c318df9bb"
    },
    {
      "id": "bb037f47-c664-46f9-afa7-cc68cbcf5a23",
      "reference_id": "83283a15-c0a0-4105-9724-2fcfefa9924f"
    }
  ],
  "sync_type": "TRANSACTION_SYNC"
}
```

<h3 id="post_sync_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiAccountingSyncCreateRequestBody](#schemaapiaccountingsynccreaterequestbody)|true|none|

</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/accounting/tax/code/options`

*List tax code options*

<h3 id="get_tax_code_field_options_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|remote_id|query|string|false|Filter by Remote/external ID|
|is_active|query|boolean|false|Filter by active status. If not provided, returns all objects. If true, returns only active objects. If false, returns only inactive objects.|
|code|query|string|false|Filter by code.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|
|is_synced|query|boolean|false|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "accounting_connection_id": "e67fef58-33d2-4a16-90c7-6cc071507511",
      "id": "tax_code_001",
      "is_active": true,
      "name": "Standard Tax",
      "ramp_id": "46910cc3-ab41-4b80-b4a7-94dab9f1b795",
      "tax_rate_ids": [
        "tax_rate_001",
        "tax_rate_002"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Tax Code Options|[PaginatedResponseApiAccountingTaxCodeOptionResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapiaccountingtaxcodeoptionresourceschema)|

<aside class="warning">

oauth2 ( Scopes: accounting:read )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/accounting/tax/rates`

*Upload tax rates*

You can upload up to 500 tax rates in an all-or-nothing fashion. If a tax rate within a batch is malformed or violates a database constraint, the entire batch will be disregarded.
To have a successful upload, please sanitize the data and ensure the tax rates that you are trying to upload do not already exist on Ramp.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "tax_rates": [
    {
      "accounting_gl_account_id": "46910cc3-ab41-4b80-b4a7-94dab9f1b795",
      "id": "tax_rate_gst_5",
      "name": "GST",
      "rate": "0.05"
    },
    {
      "accounting_gl_account_id": "7eb0ae7e-2d2f-486c-a890-cf71ca4bc13a",
      "id": "tax_rate_pst_7",
      "name": "PST",
      "rate": "0.07"
    }
  ]
}
```

`GET /developer/v1/accounting/vendors`

*List vendors*

<h3 id="get_accounting_vendor_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|remote_id|query|string|false|Filter by Remote/external ID|
|is_active|query|boolean|false|Filter by active status. If not provided, returns all objects. If true, returns only active objects. If false, returns only inactive objects.|
|code|query|string|false|Filter by code.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|
|is_synced|query|boolean|false|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "accounting_connection_id": "85e1fa6c-1fe9-432e-83d8-80971a91f903",
      "code": "19566",
      "created_at": "2019-08-28T14:15:22+00:00",
      "id": "123",
      "is_active": true,
      "is_synced": true,
      "name": "Amazon",
      "provider_name": "QuickBooks",
      "ramp_id": "649b6731-33c6-4ff5-8a5d-2333fcc90ace",
      "updated_at": "2020-08-28T14:40:12+00:00",
      "vendor_category_info": {
        "id": "Merchant",
        "name": "Merchant",
        "ramp_id": "96bb7007-eec5-430f-8d09-e033cbc000c2"
      }
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

|---|---|---|---|

|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: accounting:read )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/accounting/vendors`

*Upload vendors*

You can upload up to 500 vendors in an all-or-nothing fashion. If a vendors within a batch is malformed or violates a database constraint, the entire batch containing that vendors will be disregarded.
To have a successful upload, please sanitize the data and ensure the vendors that you are trying to upload do not already exist on Ramp.
If a vendors is already on Ramp but you want to update its attributes, please use the PATCH developer/v1/accounting/vendors/{id} endpoint instead.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "vendors": [
    {
      "code": "19566",
      "id": "V-5500-0135",
      "name": "Slack Technologies, LLC"
    },
    {
      "id": "V-5500-0130",
      "name": "AirTable"
    },
    {
      "id": "V-5500-0142",
      "name": "Microsoft"
    }
  ]
}
```

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiAccountingVendorUploadRequestBody](#schemaapiaccountingvendoruploadrequestbody)|true|none|

```go
        "Authorization": []string{"Bearer {access-token}"},
    }

    data := bytes.NewBuffer([]byte{jsonReq})
    req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/accounting/vendors/{vendor_id}", data)
    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:

</aside>

## patch_accounting_vendor_resource

```shell
# You can also use wget
curl -X PATCH https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/accounting/vendors/{vendor_id} \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer {access-token}'

```

```http
PATCH https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/accounting/vendors/{vendor_id} HTTP/1.1
Host: api.ramp.com
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

```

```javascript
const inputBody = '{
  "code": "19566",
  "name": "Amazon",
  "reactivate": true
}';

  'Content-Type':'application/json',
  'Accept':'application/json',
  'Authorization':'Bearer {access-token}'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/accounting/vendors/{vendor_id}',
{

  body: inputBody,
  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {

}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});
```

```php
<?php

require 'vendor/autoload.php';

    'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
    'Accept' => 'application/json',

);

// Define array of request body.

try {

 }
```

```java
StringBuffer response = new StringBuffer();
while ((inputLine = in.readLine()) != null) {
    response.append(inputLine);
}
in.close();
System.out.println(response.toString());
```

`GET /developer/v1/audit-logs/events`

*Get audit log events*

<h3 id="get_audit_log_events_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|user_ids|query|array[string]|false|Filter by audit log events attributed to these user IDs|
|from_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter by audit log events created at or after this date|
|to_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter by audit log events created at or before this date|
|event_actor_types|query|array[string]|false|Filter by audit log events of these actor types|
|event_types|query|array[string]|false|Filter by audit log events of these types|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

<h1 id="ramp-developer-api-bank-accounts">Bank Accounts</h1>

Operations related to bank accounts

## get_bank_account_resource

<a id="opIdget_bank_account_resource"></a>

> Code samples

```shell
# You can also use wget
curl -X GET https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bank-accounts/{bank_account_id} \
  -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer {access-token}'

```

```http
GET https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bank-accounts/{bank_account_id} HTTP/1.1
Host: api.ramp.com
Accept: application/json

```

```javascript

const headers = {
  'Accept':'application/json',
  'Authorization':'Bearer {access-token}'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bank-accounts/{bank_account_id}',
{
  method: 'GET',

  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {
    return res.json();
}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});

```

```ruby
require 'rest-client'
require 'json'

headers = {
  'Accept' => 'application/json',
  'Authorization' => 'Bearer {access-token}'
}

result = RestClient.get 'https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bank-accounts/{bank_account_id}',
  params: {
  }, headers: headers

p JSON.parse(result)

```

```python
import requests
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'Authorization': 'Bearer {access-token}'
}

r = requests.get('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bank-accounts/{bank_account_id}', headers = headers)

print(r.json())

```

```php
<?php

require 'vendor/autoload.php';

$headers = array(
    'Accept' => 'application/json',
    'Authorization' => 'Bearer {access-token}',
);

$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();

// Define array of request body.
$request_body = array();

try {
    $response = $client->request('GET','https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bank-accounts/{bank_account_id}', array(
        'headers' => $headers,
        'json' => $request_body,
       )
    );
    print_r($response->getBody()->getContents());
 }
 catch (\GuzzleHttp\Exception\BadResponseException $e) {
    // handle exception or api errors.
    print_r($e->getMessage());
 }

 // ...

```

```java
URL obj = new URL("https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bank-accounts/{bank_account_id}");
HttpURLConnection con = (HttpURLConnection) obj.openConnection();
con.setRequestMethod("GET");
int responseCode = con.getResponseCode();
BufferedReader in = new BufferedReader(
    new InputStreamReader(con.getInputStream()));
String inputLine;
StringBuffer response = new StringBuffer();
while ((inputLine = in.readLine()) != null) {
    response.append(inputLine);
}
in.close();
System.out.println(response.toString());

```

```go
package main

import (
       "bytes"
       "net/http"
)

func main() {

    headers := map[string][]string{
        "Accept": []string{"application/json"},
        "Authorization": []string{"Bearer {access-token}"},
    }

    data := bytes.NewBuffer([]byte{jsonReq})
    req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bank-accounts/{bank_account_id}", data)
    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|

```json
}
```

`GET /developer/v1/bills`

*List bills*

<h3 id="get_bill_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|entity_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter bills by entity.|
|invoice_number|query|string|false|Filter bills by exact invoice number.|
|accounting_field_selection_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter bills by its accounting field selection. Bills that are coded with this accounting field will be returned.|
|status_summaries|query|array[string]|false|Filter bills by one or more status summaries. Expects a comma-separated list of status summaries.|
|payment_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter bills by payment ID. Returns all bills belonging to the same payment.|
|vendor_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter bills by vendor.|
|is_accounting_sync_enabled|query|boolean|false|Filter bills by whether they are configured to sync to the ERP. Set to true to return only bills that will sync, or false to return only bills excluded from ERP sync.|
|approval_status|query|string|false|List bills of the provided bill approval status. Note that this is separate from the approval status for payment release.|
|payment_method|query|string|false|List bills of the provided payment method.|
|payment_status|query|string|false|List bills of the provided payment status.|
|sync_status|query|string|false|List bills of the provided sync status.|
|sync_ready|query|boolean|false|Only show bills that are ready to sync to ERP, if set to True|
|is_archived|query|boolean|false|Show archived (deleted) bills instead of active bills. Defaults to False.|
|from_created_at|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only bills with a created_at on or after this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|to_created_at|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only bills with a created_at on or before this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|from_due_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only bills with a due_at on or after this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|to_due_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only bills with a due_at on or before this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|from_issued_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only bills with a issued_at on or after this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|to_issued_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only bills with a issued_at on or before this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|from_paid_at|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only bills with a paid_at on or after this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|to_paid_at|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only bills with a paid_at on or before this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|from_payment_date|query|string(date)|false|Shows only bills with a payment_date on or after this date. Note: this filter is not supported for card payments and `from_due_date` should be used instead, which will be the equivalent as the payment date after support is added.|
|to_payment_date|query|string(date)|false|Shows only bills with a payment_date on or before this date. Note: this filter is not supported for card payments and `to_due_date` should be used instead, which will be the equivalent as the payment date after support is added.|
|min_amount|query|any|false|Shows only bills with an amount greater than or equal to this value.|
|max_amount|query|any|false|Shows only bills with an amount less than or equal to this value.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Parameter|Value|
|---|---|
|status_summaries|APPROVAL_PENDING|
|status_summaries|APPROVAL_REJECTED|
|status_summaries|ARCHIVED|
|status_summaries|AWAITING_RELEASE|
|status_summaries|BLOCKED|
|status_summaries|HELD_BY_PROVIDER|
|status_summaries|PAYMENT_COMPLETED|
|status_summaries|PAYMENT_DETAILS_MISSING|
|status_summaries|PAYMENT_ERROR|
|status_summaries|PAYMENT_NOT_INSTRUCTED|
|status_summaries|PAYMENT_PROCESSING|
|status_summaries|PAYMENT_READY|
|status_summaries|PAYMENT_SCHEDULED|
|status_summaries|PENDING_VENDOR_APPROVAL|
|status_summaries|WAITING_FOR_TRANSACTION_MATCH|
|status_summaries|WAITING_FOR_VENDOR|
|approval_status|APPROVED|
|approval_status|INITIALIZED|
|approval_status|PENDING|
|approval_status|REJECTED|
|approval_status|TERMINATED|
|payment_method|ACH|
|payment_method|CARD|
|payment_method|CHECK|
|payment_method|DOMESTIC_WIRE|
|payment_method|INTERNATIONAL|
|payment_method|LOCAL_BANK_TRANSFER|
|payment_method|ONE_TIME_CARD|
|payment_method|ONE_TIME_CARD_DELIVERY|
|payment_method|PAID_MANUALLY|
|payment_method|SWIFT|
|payment_status|OPEN|
|payment_status|PAID|
|sync_status|BILL_AND_PAYMENT_SYNCED|
|sync_status|BILL_SYNCED|
|sync_status|NOT_SYNCED|

> Example responses

> 200 Response


`POST /developer/v1/bills`

*Create a bill*

Batch payments cannot be created in the API.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "accounting_field_selections": [
    {
      "field_external_id": "b3B0aW9uX2lk",

    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [
        {
          "field_external_id": "aa73laMazi2",
          "field_option_external_id": "abk3Rkfnls25"
        }
      ],

      "unit_quantity": 2
```


```javascript
  'Accept':'application/json',
  'Authorization':'Bearer {access-token}'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bills/drafts',
{

  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {
    return res.json();
}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});

```

```ruby
}
```

```php
<?php

require 'vendor/autoload.php';

$headers = array(
    'Accept' => 'application/json',
    'Authorization' => 'Bearer {access-token}',
);

$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();

// Define array of request body.
$request_body = array();

try {
    $response = $client->request('GET','https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bills/drafts', array(
        'headers' => $headers,
        'json' => $request_body,
       )
    );
    print_r($response->getBody()->getContents());
 }
 catch (\GuzzleHttp\Exception\BadResponseException $e) {
    // handle exception or api errors.
    print_r($e->getMessage());
 }

 // ...

```

```java
URL obj = new URL("https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bills/drafts");
HttpURLConnection con = (HttpURLConnection) obj.openConnection();
con.setRequestMethod("GET");
int responseCode = con.getResponseCode();
BufferedReader in = new BufferedReader(
    new InputStreamReader(con.getInputStream()));
String inputLine;
StringBuffer response = new StringBuffer();
while ((inputLine = in.readLine()) != null) {
    response.append(inputLine);
}
in.close();
System.out.println(response.toString());

```

```go
package main

import (
       "bytes"
       "net/http"
)

func main() {

    headers := map[string][]string{
        "Accept": []string{"application/json"},
        "Authorization": []string{"Bearer {access-token}"},
    }

    data := bytes.NewBuffer([]byte{jsonReq})
    req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bills/drafts", data)
    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`GET /developer/v1/bills/drafts`

*List draft bills*

<h3 id="get_draft_bill_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|entity_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter draft bills by entity.|
|invoice_number|query|string|false|Filter draft bills by exact invoice number.|
|vendor_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter draft bills by vendor.|
|from_created_at|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only draft bills with a created_at on or after this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|to_created_at|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only draft bills with a created_at on or before this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|from_due_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only draft bills with a due_at on or after this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|to_due_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only draft bills with a due_at on or before this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|from_issued_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only draft bills with a issued_at on or after this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|to_issued_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Shows only draft bills with a issued_at on or before this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {}
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_draft_bill_list_with_pagination-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|DraftBill|[PaginatedResponseApiDraftBillResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapidraftbillresourceschema)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: bills:read )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/bills/drafts/{draft_bill_id}/attachments`

*Upload a file attachment to an existing draft bill*

Upload a file as an attachment to a draft bill. INVOICE type attachments cannot be uploaded if one
already exists on the draft bill.

This endpoint accepts the [multipart/form-data](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Methods/POST) format.

Include the file as a part named 'file' with `Content-Disposition: attachment`.
Include the attachment_type as a form field.

> Body parameter

```yaml
attachment_type: INVOICE

```

<h3 id="post_draft_bill_attachment_upload_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiBillAttachmentUploadInputRequestBody](#schemaapibillattachmentuploadinputrequestbody)|true|none|
|draft_bill_id|path|string|true|none|

> Example responses

> 201 Response

```json
{
  "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
}
```

<h3 id="post_draft_bill_attachment_upload_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|201|[Created](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.2)|Uploaded attachment|[ApiBillAttachmentResponse](#schemaapibillattachmentresponse)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: bills:write )
</aside>

`DELETE /developer/v1/bills/{bill_id}`

*Archive a bill*

This is a destructive action. Associated inflight payments will be cancelled
if possible or any attached one-time-card will be terminated. Paid bills and
bills belonging to a batch payment cannot be deleted.

<h3 id="delete_bill_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|bill_id|path|string|true|none|

> Example responses

> 204 Response

```json
{}
```

<h3 id="delete_bill_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|204|[No Content](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.5)|Deleted bill|[EmptyObject](#schemaemptyobject)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: bills:write )
</aside>

```python
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'Authorization': 'Bearer {access-token}'
}

r = requests.get('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bills/{bill_id}', headers = headers)

print(r.json())

```

```php
<?php

require 'vendor/autoload.php';

$headers = array(
    'Accept' => 'application/json',
    'Authorization' => 'Bearer {access-token}',
);

$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();

// Define array of request body.
$request_body = array();

try {
    $response = $client->request('GET','https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bills/{bill_id}', array(
        'headers' => $headers,
        'json' => $request_body,
       )
    );
    print_r($response->getBody()->getContents());
 }
 catch (\GuzzleHttp\Exception\BadResponseException $e) {
    // handle exception or api errors.
    print_r($e->getMessage());
 }

 // ...

```

```java
URL obj = new URL("https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bills/{bill_id}");
HttpURLConnection con = (HttpURLConnection) obj.openConnection();
con.setRequestMethod("GET");
int responseCode = con.getResponseCode();
BufferedReader in = new BufferedReader(
    new InputStreamReader(con.getInputStream()));
String inputLine;
StringBuffer response = new StringBuffer();
while ((inputLine = in.readLine()) != null) {
    response.append(inputLine);
}
in.close();
System.out.println(response.toString());

```

```go
package main

import (
       "bytes"
       "net/http"
)

func main() {

    headers := map[string][]string{
        "Accept": []string{"application/json"},
        "Authorization": []string{"Bearer {access-token}"},
    }

    data := bytes.NewBuffer([]byte{jsonReq})
    req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bills/{bill_id}", data)
    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`GET /developer/v1/bills/{bill_id}`

*Fetch a bill*

## patch_bill_resource

```shell

curl -X PATCH https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bills/{bill_id} \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer {access-token}'

```

```http
PATCH https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bills/{bill_id} HTTP/1.1
Host: api.ramp.com
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

```

```javascript
const inputBody = '{
  "accounting_field_selections": [
    {
      "field_external_id": "b3B0aW9uX2lk",
      "field_option_external_id": "aln2l3B0aW9uX2lk"
    }
  ],
  "due_at": "2024-10-15",
  "entity_id": "1cc4b57c-fe4a-4425-90f1-9019d06376b3",
  "inventory_line_items": [
    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [
        {
          "field_external_id": "aa73laMazi2",
          "field_option_external_id": "abk3Rkfnls25"
        }
      ],
      "memo": "Pens",
      "unit_price": 55,
      "unit_quantity": 2
    }
  ],
  "invoice_number": "123",
  "issued_at": "2024-08-15",
  "line_items": [
    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [],
      "amount": 100,
      "memo": "Printing services"
    }
  ],
  "memo": "Office supplies",
  "payment_method": "ONE_TIME_CARD_DELIVERY",
  "posting_date": null,
  "remote_id": "bo2f1lAnkf3llL",
  "vendor_contact_id": "12f55361-8c7f-42dc-8667-64926d330b80",
  "vendor_id": "c0c89fa8-976e-428d-938d-a5ec89838474"
}';
const headers = {
  'Content-Type':'application/json',
  'Accept':'application/json',
  'Authorization':'Bearer {access-token}'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bills/{bill_id}',
{
  method: 'PATCH',
  body: inputBody,
  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {
    return res.json();
}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});

```

## post_bill_attachment_upload_resource

<a id="opIdpost_bill_attachment_upload_resource"></a>

```shell
# You can also use wget
curl -X POST https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/bills/{bill_id}/attachments \
  -H 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' \
  -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer {access-token}'

```

```http

Accept: application/json
```

```javascript
};

  method: 'POST',
  body: inputBody,
  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {
    return res.json();
}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});
```

`POST /developer/v1/bills/{bill_id}/attachments`

*Upload a file attachment to an existing bill*

Upload a file as an attachment to a bill. INVOICE type attachments cannot be uploaded if one
already exists on the bill.

This endpoint accepts the [multipart/form-data](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Methods/POST) format.

Include the file as a part named 'file' with `Content-Disposition: attachment`.
Include the attachment_type as a form field.

> Body parameter

```yaml
attachment_type: INVOICE

```

<h3 id="post_bill_attachment_upload_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiBillAttachmentUploadInputRequestBody](#schemaapibillattachmentuploadinputrequestbody)|true|none|
|bill_id|path|string(uuid)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 201 Response

```json
{
  "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
}
```

<h3 id="post_bill_attachment_upload_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|201|[Created](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.2)|Uploaded attachment|[ApiBillAttachmentResponse](#schemaapibillattachmentresponse)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: bills:write )
</aside>

```java
int responseCode = con.getResponseCode();
BufferedReader in = new BufferedReader(
    new InputStreamReader(con.getInputStream()));
String inputLine;
StringBuffer response = new StringBuffer();
while ((inputLine = in.readLine()) != null) {
    response.append(inputLine);
}
in.close();
System.out.println(response.toString());

```

```go
       "bytes"
       "net/http"
)

        "Accept": []string{"application/json"},
        "Authorization": []string{"Bearer {access-token}"},
    }

    req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/business", data)
```
```go
    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`POST /developer/v1/vault/cards`

*Create a spend limit and retrieve sensitive card details*

Vault API access is required to use this endpoint.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "accounting_rules": [
    {
      "field_id": "3f30896b-cd22-47af-b48a-c6c3068bc780",
      "field_option_id": "d062e221-9c95-47b5-8dc6-d6c881693caf"
    }
  ],
  "display_name": "Travel Hotel Booking Purchase",
  "spending_restrictions": {
    "allowed_categories": [
      18,
      20
    ],
    "auto_lock_date": null,
    "interval": "TOTAL",
    "limit": {
      "amount": 500000,
      "currency_code": "USD"
    }
  },
  "user_id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731"
}
```

<h3 id="post_card_vault_creation-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiCardVaultCreationRequestBody](#schemaapicardvaultcreationrequestbody)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 201 Response

```json
{
  "card": {
    "created_at": "2024-05-12T01:37:27Z",
    "cvv": "449",
    "expiration": "1226",
    "id": "a40a6ce8-70d4-4d06-91e1-0728ad9bbe39",
    "pan": "4403900918007455"
  },
  "created_at": "2024-05-12T01:37:27Z",
  "display_name": "Travel Hotel Booking Purchase",
  "restrictions": {
    "allowed_categories": [
      35
    ],
    "allowed_vendors": [],
    "auto_lock_date": "2026-12-01T00:00:00Z",
    "blocked_categories": [],
    "blocked_vendors": [],
    "interval": "TOTAL",
    "limit": {
      "amount": 50000,
      "currency_code": "USD"
    }
  },
  "spend_limit_id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731",
  "spend_program_id": null,
  "user_id": "2ba219ba-5867-453f-bec2-b8d0414b7f75"
}
```

<h3 id="post_card_vault_creation-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|201|[Created](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.2)|Card created|[PCILimit](#schemapcilimit)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises CardInvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: cards:read_vault limits:write )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/vault/cards/{card_id}`

*Fetch a card's sensitive details*

Accepts a card's ID and returns its sensitive details. Vault API access is required to use this endpoint.

<h3 id="get_card_vault_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|card_id|path|string|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "cvv": "449",
  "id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731",
  "pan": "4403900918007455"
}
```

<h3 id="get_card_vault_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Get single card|[CardDetails](#schemacarddetails)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises CardInvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: cards:read_vault )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/cards`

*List cards*

<h3 id="get_card_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|entity_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter by business entity.|
|user_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter by card owner.|
|display_name|query|string|false|Filter by display name.|
|is_activated|query|boolean|false|Filter only for activated cards. Defaults to True if not specified|
|is_terminated|query|boolean|false|Filter only for terminated cards. Defaults to False if not specified|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "card_program_id": null,
      "cardholder_id": "3a5b1f62-988f-4190-bf31-b7ae87c5df42",
      "cardholder_name": "Julie Phillip",
      "created_at": "2022-05-04T00:00:00+00:00",
      "display_name": "T&E",
      "entity_id": "c6c61be9-f278-47bc-a814-f98a7fc2dfdc",
      "expiration": "0227",
      "fulfillment": {
        "fulfillment_status": "ISSUED",
        "shipping": {
          "recipient_address": {
            "address1": "123 Main St",
            "city": "New York City",
            "country": "US",
            "first_name": "Julie",
            "last_name": "Phillip",
            "postal_code": "10003",
            "state": "NY"
          }
        },
        "shipping_date": null,
        "shipping_eta": null,
        "shipping_tracking_url": null
      },
      "has_program_overridden": false,
      "id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731",
      "is_physical": false,
      "last_four": "3751",
      "spending_restrictions": {
        "amount": 5000,
        "auto_lock_date": null,
        "blocked_categories": [],
        "categories": [],
        "interval": "MONTHLY",
        "suspended": false,
        "transaction_amount_limit": null
      },
      "state": "ACTIVE"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_card_list_with_pagination-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Cards|[PaginatedResponseApiCardResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapicardresourceschema)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises CardInvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: cards:read )
</aside>

```javascript
  "fulfillment": {
    "shipping": {
      "recipient_address": {
        "address1": "123 Main St",
        "city": "New York City",
        "country": "US",
        "first_name": "Cardholder's first name",
        "last_name": "Cardholder's last name",
        "postal_code": "10003",
        "state": "NY"
      }
    }
  },
  "idempotency_key": "3a5b1f62-988f-4190-bf31-b7ae87c5df42",
  "spending_restrictions": {
    "amount": 5000,
    "categories": [],
    "currency": "USD",
    "interval": "MONTHLY",
    "transaction_amount_limit": 100
  },
  "user_id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731"
}';
const headers = {
  'Content-Type':'application/json',
  'Accept':'application/json',
  'Authorization':'Bearer {access-token}'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/cards/deferred/physical',
{
  method: 'POST',
  body: inputBody,
  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {
    return res.json();
}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});

```

`POST /developer/v1/cards/deferred/physical`

*Create a physical card*

Call this endpoint to create an async task to request for new physical card.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "display_name": "T&E",
  "fulfillment": {
    "shipping": {
      "recipient_address": {
        "address1": "123 Main St",
        "city": "New York City",
        "country": "US",
        "first_name": "Cardholder's first name",
        "last_name": "Cardholder's last name",
        "postal_code": "10003",
        "state": "NY"
      }
    }
  },
  "idempotency_key": "3a5b1f62-988f-4190-bf31-b7ae87c5df42",
  "spending_restrictions": {
    "amount": 5000,
    "categories": [],
    "currency": "USD",
    "interval": "MONTHLY",
    "transaction_amount_limit": 100
  },
  "user_id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731"
}
```

<h3 id="post_physical_card-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiPhysicalRequestBody](#schemaapiphysicalrequestbody)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
}
```

<h3 id="post_physical_card-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Response with the ID of the async task. Task status can be checked via a GET call to .../deferred/status/<task_id>|[DeferredTaskUUID](#schemadeferredtaskuuid)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: cards:write )
</aside>

```json
{
  "card_program_id": null,

  "cardholder_name": "Julie Phillip",
  "created_at": "2022-05-04T00:00:00+00:00",
  "display_name": "T&E",
  "entity_id": "c6c61be9-f278-47bc-a814-f98a7fc2dfdc",
  "expiration": "0227",
  "fulfillment": {
    "fulfillment_status": "ISSUED",
    "shipping": {
      "recipient_address": {
        "address1": "123 Main St",
        "city": "New York City",
        "country": "US",
        "first_name": "Julie",
        "last_name": "Phillip",
        "postal_code": "10003",
        "state": "NY"
      }
    },
    "shipping_date": null,
    "shipping_eta": null,
    "shipping_tracking_url": null
  },
  "has_program_overridden": false,
  "id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731",
  "is_physical": false,
  "last_four": "3751",
  "spending_restrictions": {
    "amount": 5000,
    "auto_lock_date": null,
    "blocked_categories": [],
    "categories": [],
    "interval": "MONTHLY",
    "suspended": false,
    "transaction_amount_limit": null
  },
  "state": "ACTIVE"
}
```

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|

|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises CardInvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:

```go
    req.Header = headers

    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`PATCH /developer/v1/cards/{card_id}`

*Update a card*

This endpoint allow you update the owner, display name, and spend restrictions of a card.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "card_program_id": "ebe71e80-84d3-4e4b-be4d-70d05fb20934",
  "display_name": "WFH Spending Card",
  "entity_id": "a7cb9187-4dc8-412a-b5ca-0974d7f07a0b",
  "has_notifications_enabled": true,
  "new_user_id": "506a7096-98c0-4ab5-86ef-20c884a78e74",
  "spending_restrictions": {
    "amount": 500,
    "interval": "DAILY"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="patch_card_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiCardUpdateRequestBody](#schemaapicardupdaterequestbody)|true|none|
|card_id|path|string|true|none|

<h3 id="patch_card_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|204|[No Content](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.5)|Update a single card|None|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises CardInvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: cards:write )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/cards/{card_id}/deferred/suspension`

*Suspend a card*

Call this endpoint to create an async task to suspend a card so that it is locked from use. The suspension is revertable.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "idempotency_key": "string"
}
```

<h3 id="post_card_suspension_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiCardDeferredUpdateRequestBody](#schemaapicarddeferredupdaterequestbody)|true|none|
|card_id|path|string|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
}
```

<h3 id="post_card_suspension_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Response with the ID of the async task. Task status can be checked via a GET call to .../deferred/status/<task_id>|[DeferredTaskUUID](#schemadeferredtaskuuid)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises CardInvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: cards:write )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/cards/{card_id}/deferred/termination`

*Terminate a card*

Call this endpoint to create an async task to terminate a card permanently. Please note that this action is irreversible.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "idempotency_key": "string"
}
```

<h3 id="post_card_termination_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiCardDeferredUpdateRequestBody](#schemaapicarddeferredupdaterequestbody)|true|none|
|card_id|path|string|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
}
```

<h3 id="post_card_termination_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Response with the ID of the async task. Task status can be checked via a GET call to .../deferred/status/<task_id>|[DeferredTaskUUID](#schemadeferredtaskuuid)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises CardInvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: cards:write )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/cards/{card_id}/deferred/unsuspension`

*Unlock a card*

Call this endpoint to create an async task to remove a card's suspension so that it may be used again.

```json
{
  "idempotency_key": "string"
}
```

`GET /developer/v1/cashbacks`

*List cashback payments*

<h3 id="get_cashback_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|sync_status|query|string|false|Filter by sync status. Supersedes sync_ready if provided.|
|entity_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter cashbacks by business entity.|
|statement_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter cashbacks included in the specified statement.|
|sync_ready|query|boolean|false|Filter cashbacks that are ready to be synced (no pending syncs and completed).|
|from_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter cashbacks that occurred after this date (ISO8601 format).|
|to_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter cashbacks that occurred before this date (ISO8601 format).|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Parameter|Value|
|---|---|
|sync_status|NOT_SYNC_READY|
|sync_status|SYNCED|
|sync_status|SYNC_READY|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {}
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_cashback_list_with_pagination-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Cashback|[PaginatedResponseApiCashbackResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapicashbackresourceschema)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: cashbacks:read )
</aside>

```go
    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`GET /developer/v1/cashbacks/{cashback_id}`

*Fetch a cashback payment*

<h3 id="get_cashback_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|cashback_id|path|string|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "amount": {
    "amount": 0,
    "currency_code": "USD",
    "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 0
  },
  "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "entity_id": "8161163a-f227-466f-bc01-090a01e80165",
  "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  "sync_status": "NOT_SYNC_READY"
}
```

<h3 id="get_cashback_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Cashback|[Cashback](#schemacashback)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: cashbacks:read )
</aside>
