`GET /developer/v1/custom-records/custom-tables/{custom_table_name}/rows`

*List Custom Table rows*

<h3 id="get_dev_api_custom_row-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|external_key|query|array[string]|false|none|
|include_all_referenced_rows|query|boolean|false|none|
|page_size|query|integer|false|none|
|start|query|string|false|none|
|custom_table_name|path|string|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "cells": [
        {
          "column_display_name": "Country",
          "column_id": "<column_id>",
          "value": {
            "has_more": false,
            "rows": [
              {
                "display_name": "USA",
                "external_key": "USA",
                "row_id": "<row_id>",
                "type": "custom_table"
              }
            ],
            "table_name": "countries",
            "type": "custom_table"
          }
        },
        {
          "column_display_name": "Regional Director",
          "column_id": "<column_id>",
          "value": {
            "has_more": false,
            "rows": [
              {
                "display_name": "John Doe",
                "external_key": "<existing_ramp_user_uuid>",
                "row_id": "<row_id>",
                "type": "native_table"
              }
            ],
            "table_name": "users",
            "type": "native_table"
          }
        },
        {
          "column_display_name": "States",
          "column_id": "<column_id>",
          "value": {
            "has_more": true,
            "rows": [
              {
                "display_name": "Arizona",
                "external_key": "Arizona",
                "row_id": "<row_id>",
                "type": "custom_table"
              },
              {
                "display_name": "California",
                "external_key": "California",
                "row_id": "<row_id>",
                "type": "custom_table"
              },
              {
                "display_name": "New Jersey",
                "external_key": "New Jersey",
                "row_id": "<row_id>",
                "type": "custom_table"
              },
              {
                "display_name": "New York",
                "external_key": "New York",
                "row_id": "<row_id>",
                "type": "custom_table"
              },
              {
                "display_name": "Texas",
                "external_key": "Texas",
                "row_id": "<row_id>",
                "type": "custom_table"
              }
            ],
            "table_name": "states",
            "type": "custom_table"
          }
        }
      ],
      "external_key": "Northeast",
      "id": "<row_id>"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_dev_api_custom_row-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|List of Custom Table rows|[PaginatedResponseCustomRowDataWithLoadedReferences](#schemapaginatedresponsecustomrowdatawithloadedreferences)|
|404|[Not Found](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.4)|Custom Table not found|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: custom_records:read )
</aside>

```javascript
          "name": "regional_directors"
        }
      ],
      "external_key": "Northeast"
    }
  ]
```
```ruby
}
```

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[PutCustomRowRequestBody](#schemaputcustomrowrequestbody)|true|none|
|table_name|path|string|true|none|

```json

  "metadata": {
    "deleted": 0
  }
}
```

|---|---|---|---|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: custom_records:write )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/custom-records/matrix-tables`

*List all Matrix tables for the business*

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "<UUID>",
      "input_columns": [
        {
          "display_name": "Department",
          "id": "<UUID>",
          "name": "department",
          "type": {
            "column_type": "native_reference",
            "native_table": {
              "accounting_field_ramp_id": null,
              "table_name": "departments",
              "type": "native_table"
            }
          }
        }
      ],
      "label": "Approval Matrix",
      "name": "approval_matrix",
      "result_columns": [
        {
          "display_name": "Approver",
          "id": "<UUID>",
          "name": "approver",
          "type": {
            "cardinality": "many_to_one",
            "column_type": "native_reference",
            "native_table": {
              "accounting_field_ramp_id": null,
              "table_name": "users",
              "type": "native_table"
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

`POST /developer/v1/custom-records/matrix-tables`

*Create a Matrix table*

Matrix tables are special-purpose lookup tables where unique combinations
of input values map to result values.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "input_columns": [
    {
      "column_type": {
        "table_name": "departments",
        "type": "native_table"
      },
      "label": "Department",
      "name": "department"
    }
  ],
  "label": "Approval Matrix",
  "name": "approval_matrix",
  "result_columns": [
    {
      "cardinality": "many_to_one",
      "label": "Approver",
      "name": "approver",
      "native_table": {
        "table_name": "users",
        "type": "native_table"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

<h3 id="post_dev_api_matrix_tables-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[DeveloperApiCreateMatrixTableRequestBody](#schemadeveloperapicreatematrixtablerequestbody)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 201 Response

```json
{
  "table_id": "<UUID>"
}
```

<h3 id="post_dev_api_matrix_tables-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|201|[Created](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.2)|Success|[DeveloperApiCreateMatrixTableResponse](#schemadeveloperapicreatematrixtableresponse)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: custom_records:write )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/custom-records/matrix-tables/{table_name}/columns`

*Add a result column to an existing Matrix table*

Allows adding result columns to already-created matrix tables
without modifying the input columns. Only result columns
(users and accounting_field_options) can be added.
Input columns cannot be added after table creation.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "cardinality": "many_to_one",
  "label": "Approver",
  "name": "approver",
  "native_table": {
    "table_name": "users",
    "type": "native_table"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="post_dev_api_add_matrix_result_column-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[DeveloperApiMatrixResultColumnDefRequestBody](#schemadeveloperapimatrixresultcolumndefrequestbody)|true|none|
|table_name|path|string|true|none|

> Example responses

> 201 Response

```json
{
  "column_id": "<UUID>"
}
```

`PATCH /developer/v1/custom-records/matrix-tables/{table_name}/columns/{column_name}`

*Change the API name of a Matrix table column (input or result)*

This changes the internal name used in API calls while preserving
the human-readable label. Both input and result columns can be renamed.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "new_name": "main_approver"
}
```

<h3 id="patch_dev_api_rename_matrix_column-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[RenameColumnRequestBody](#schemarenamecolumnrequestbody)|true|none|
|column_name|path|string|true|none|
|table_name|path|string|true|none|

<h3 id="patch_dev_api_rename_matrix_column-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|204|[No Content](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.5)|Success, No content|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: custom_records:write )
</aside>

```go
package main

import (
       "bytes"
       "net/http"
)

func main() {

    headers := map[string][]string{
        "Content-Type": []string{"application/json"},
        "Accept": []string{"application/json"},

    }

    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`POST /developer/v1/custom-records/matrix-tables/{table_name}/list-rows`

*List Matrix table rows*

Returns rows with inputs and results separated.
Inputs are always complete (all input columns), results are sparse (only set values).

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "filters": [
    {
      "column_name": "department",
      "one_of": [
        "<UUID>"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "page_size": 10
}
```

<h3 id="post_dev_api_matrix_list_rows-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ListMatrixRowsByNameRequestRequestBody](#schemalistmatrixrowsbynamerequestrequestbody)|true|none|
|table_name|path|string|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "<UUID>",
      "inputs": [
        {
          "column_name": "department",
          "display_name": "Engineering",
          "identifier": {
            "column_name": "id",
            "value": "<UUID>"
          }
        }
      ],
      "results": [
        {
          "column_name": "approver",
          "display_name": "John Doe",
          "identifier": {
            "column_name": "id",
            "value": "<UUID>"
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": null
  },
  "total_count": 1
}
```

<h3 id="post_dev_api_matrix_list_rows-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Success|[ListMatrixRowsByNameResponse](#schemalistmatrixrowsbynameresponse)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: custom_records:read )
</aside>

`PUT /developer/v1/custom-records/matrix-tables/{table_name}/rows`

*Upsert Matrix table rows*

Creates new rows or updates existing rows based on input values.
Input values define row identity (via external_key).
Result values are mutable and can be partially updated.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "inputs": [
        {
          "column_name": "department",
          "identifier": {
            "column_name": "id",
            "value": "<UUID>"
          }
        }
      ],
      "results": [
        {
          "column_name": "approver",
          "identifier": {
            "column_name": "id",
            "value": "<UUID>"
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

<h3 id="put_dev_api_matrix_put_rows-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[PutMatrixRowsByNameRequestRequestBody](#schemaputmatrixrowsbynamerequestrequestbody)|true|none|
|table_name|path|string|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "inserted": 1,
    "updated": 0
  }
}
```

<h3 id="put_dev_api_matrix_put_rows-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Success|[PutMatrixRowsByNameResponse](#schemaputmatrixrowsbynameresponse)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: custom_records:write )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/custom-records/matrix-tables/{table_name}/rows/-/append`

*Append cells to Matrix table rows*

Adds values to many-to-many result columns without replacing existing values.
Only works on many-to-many result columns.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "inputs": [
        {
          "column_name": "department",
          "identifier": {
            "column_name": "id",
            "value": "<UUID>"
          }
        }
      ],
      "results": [
        {
          "column_name": "approvers",
          "identifier": {
            "column_name": "id",
            "value": "<UUID>"
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

<h3 id="post_dev_api_matrix_append_cells-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[AppendMatrixCellsByNameRequestRequestBody](#schemaappendmatrixcellsbynamerequestrequestbody)|true|none|
|table_name|path|string|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "cells_appended": 1
  }
}
```

`DELETE /developer/v1/custom-records/matrix-tables/{table_name}/rows/{row_id}`

*Delete a single Matrix table row by ID*

Deletes the matrix row with the specified ID from the matrix table.

<h3 id="delete_dev_api_delete_matrix_row-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|row_id|path|string|true|none|
|table_name|path|string|true|none|

<h3 id="delete_dev_api_delete_matrix_row-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|204|[No Content](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.5)|Success, No content|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: custom_records:write )
</aside>

|start|query|string|false|none|
|native_table_name|path|string|true|none|

`PUT /developer/v1/custom-records/native-tables/{native_table_name}/rows`

*Set values for rows of a Native Ramp table*

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "cells": [
        {
          "contents": "California",
          "name": "home_state"
        },
        {
          "contents": {
            "column_name": "email",
            "value": "<another_existing_ramp_user_email>"
          },
          "name": "budget_managers"
        },
        {
          "contents": {
            "column_name": "email",
            "value": "<existing_ramp_user_email>"
          },
          "name": "budget_managers"
        }
      ],
      "row": {
        "column_name": "email",
        "value": "<existing_ramp_user_email>"
      }
    },
    {
      "cells": [
        {
          "contents": "New York",
          "name": "home_state"
        },
        {
          "contents": null,
          "name": "budget_managers"
        }
      ],
      "row": {
        "column_name": "id",
        "value": "<existing_ramp_user_uuid>"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[PutNativeRowRequestBody](#schemaputnativerowrequestbody)|true|none|
|native_table_name|path|string|true|none|

```json
    "inserted": 0,
    "updated": 0
  }
}
```

```javascript
        "column_name": "id",
```

`GET /developer/v1/departments`

*List departments*

<h3 id="get_department_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "c16b6ee1-2f5d-45e9-9fb4-c1c541a9ea70",
      "name": "Bookkeeping"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_department_list_with_pagination-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Departments|[PaginatedResponseApiDepartmentResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapidepartmentresourceschema)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises DepartmentInvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: departments:read )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/entities`

*List business entities*

<h3 id="get_entity_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|currency|query|string|false|Filter by currency of the entity.|
|entity_name|query|string|false|Filter entities by name.|
|is_primary|query|boolean|false|Filter to include only primary or non-primary entities.|
|hide_inactive|query|boolean|false|Hide inactive entities. Defaults to False.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|
|include_deleted_accounts|query|any|false|none|

```json
      },

}
```

`GET /developer/v1/item-receipts`

*List item receipts*

<h3 id="get_item_receipts_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|
|entity_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Unique identifier for the associated business entity.|
|purchase_order_line_item_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Unique identifier for the associated purchase order line item.|
|purchase_order_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Unique identifier for the associated purchase order.|
|include_archived|query|boolean|false|Whether to include archived item receipts. By default, include_archived is false.|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "archived_at": null,
      "created_at": "2022-05-10T00:00:00Z",
      "documents": [
        "https://someurl.com"
      ],
      "id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
      "item_receipt_number": "1234567890",
      "line_items": [
        {
          "accounting_field_selections": [],
          "amount": {
            "amount": 100,
            "currency_code": "USD"
          },
          "memo": null,
          "purchase_order_line_item_id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
          "quantity": 1,
          "unit_price": {
            "amount": 500,
            "currency_code": "USD"
          }
        }
      ],
      "memo": null,
      "purchase_order_id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
      "received_at": "2022-05-09T00:00:00Z",
      "remote_id": "1"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_item_receipts_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Get all item receipts|[PaginatedResponseApiItemReceiptResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapiitemreceiptresourceschema)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: item_receipts:read )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/locations`

*List locations*

<h3 id="get_location_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|entity_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter by associated business entity.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "entity_id": "bb25a7e8-cc2f-4ba7-9bf4-7730ffe152bb",
      "id": "f4efe11c-221f-4b49-a1e4-33eaf96a49ee",
      "name": "New York City, NY"
    }
  ],
```

`GET /developer/v1/memos`

*List memos*

<h3 id="get_memo_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|card_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter memos by card.|
|department_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter memos by department.|
|location_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter memos by location.|
|manager_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter memos by manager.|
|merchant_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter memos by merchant.|
|user_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter memos by user.|
|from_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter memos for transactions after this date.|
|to_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter memos for transactions before this date.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {}
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_memo_list_with_pagination-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Success|[PaginatedResponseApiMemoResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapimemoresourceschema)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises MemoInvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: memos:read )
</aside>

```javascript

  "is_memo_recurring": false,
  "memo": "string"

  'Accept':'application/json',
  'Authorization':'Bearer {access-token}'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/memos/{transaction_id}',
{
  method: 'POST',
  body: inputBody,
  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {
    return res.json();
}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});
```


`POST /developer/v1/memos/{transaction_id}`

*Upload a new memo for a transaction*

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "is_memo_recurring": false,
  "memo": "string"
}
```

<h3 id="post_memo_create_single_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiMemoCreateRequestBody](#schemaapimemocreaterequestbody)|true|none|
|transaction_id|path|string(uuid)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  "memo": "string"
}
```

<h3 id="post_memo_create_single_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Memo|[Memo](#schemamemo)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises MemoInvalidInput|None|
|404|[Not Found](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.4)|raises NotFound|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: memos:write )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/merchants`

*List merchants*

<h3 id="get_merchant_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|transaction_from_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter merchants by transactions occurring (`user_transaction_time`) on or after this date|
|transaction_to_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter merchants by transactions occurring (`user_transaction_time`) on or before this date|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "d38a988c-377a-421b-9017-0c8f40a4304e",
      "is_auto_approved": true,
      "merchant_name": "Google",
      "sk_category_name": "Advertising"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_merchant_list_with_pagination-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Merchants|[PaginatedResponseApiMerchantResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapimerchantresourceschema)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: merchants:read )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/purchase-orders`

*List purchase orders*

<h3 id="get_purchase_orders_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|creation_source|query|string|false|Creation source of the purchase order.|
|from_created_at|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter for purchase orders that were requested after the given date.|
|to_created_at|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter for purchase orders that were requested before the given date.|
|receipt_status|query|string|false|Receipt status of the purchase order.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|
|entity_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Unique identifier for the associated business entity.|
|spend_request_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Unique identifier for the spend request associated with the purchase order.|
|three_way_match_enabled|query|boolean|false|Whether three-way match is enabled for the purchase order.|
|include_archived|query|boolean|false|Whether to include archived purchase orders. By default, include_archived is false.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Parameter|Value|
|---|---|
|creation_source|ACCOUNTING_PROVIDER|
|creation_source|DEVELOPER_API|
|creation_source|RAMP|
|receipt_status|FULLY_RECEIVED|
|receipt_status|NOT_RECEIVED|
|receipt_status|OVER_RECEIVED|
|receipt_status|PARTIALLY_RECEIVED|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [],
      "amount": {
        "amount": 10000,
        "currency": "USD"
      },
      "archived_at": null,
      "bill_ids": [
        "ac6b4c79-9fcd-47d5-9c7e-55b6746903ef",
        "ea0a40d9-d7c4-4cf5-a8a8-e9230fb17459"
      ],
      "billing_status": "CLOSED",
      "created_at": "2022-05-10T00:00:00Z",
      "creation_source": "ACCOUNTING_PROVIDER",
      "entity_id": "7b96a1f2-4b86-45f8-943a-f1ca6b5194d4",
      "id": "54683adc-f49d-4163-b407-f231c62943ea",
      "item_receipt_ids": [
        "0c48b64a-51c2-4848-9dd9-3b30615f4911",
        "5fe9c5a6-791f-4fa8-9d64-5a1cad703710"
      ],
      "line_items": [
        {
          "accounting_field_selections": [],
          "amount": {
            "amount": 100,
            "currency_code": "USD"
          },
          "description": "my line item",
          "id": "54683adc-f49d-4163-b407-f231c62943ea",
          "quantity": 1,
          "remote_id": null,
          "unit_price": {
            "amount": 100,
            "currency_code": "USD"
          }
        }
      ],
      "memo": "Purchase order for general software services",
      "name": "Purchase order for general software services",
      "net_payment_terms": 30,
      "owner_id": "54683adc-f49d-4163-b407-f231c62943ea",
      "promise_date": "2024-05-10T00:00:00Z",
      "purchase_order_number": "PO-0001",
      "receipt_status": "FULLY_RECEIVED",
      "spend_end_date": "2024-05-31T00:00:00Z",
      "spend_program_id": "ac8b9c2e-1234-5678-9abc-def012345678",
      "spend_request_id": "fb718d18-5435-416b-940e-083fc637614",
      "spend_start_date": "2024-05-01T00:00:00Z",

      "vendor_id": "b901afe8-46d7-4f30-b7b5-3c8af127e5a0"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

`PATCH /developer/v1/purchase-orders/{purchase_order_id}`

```php
        'json' => $request_body,
```

`POST /developer/v1/purchase-orders/{purchase_order_id}/line-items`

*Add line items to an existing purchase order*

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "line_items": [
    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [],
      "description": "my line item",
      "unit_price": 110,
      "unit_quantity": 2
    }
  ]
}
```

|---|---|---|---|---|

|purchase_order_id|path|string|true|none|

<h1 id="ramp-developer-api-receipt-integrations">Receipt Integrations</h1>

Operations related to receipt integrations.

## get_receipt_integration_opted_out_emails_list_resource

<a id="opIdget_receipt_integration_opted_out_emails_list_resource"></a>

> Code samples

```shell
# You can also use wget
curl -X GET https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/receipt-integrations/opt-out \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer {access-token}'

```

```http
GET https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/receipt-integrations/opt-out HTTP/1.1
Host: api.ramp.com
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

```

```javascript

  "email": "user@example.com",
```

`GET /developer/v1/receipts`

*List receipts*

<h3 id="get_receipt_list-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|created_after|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter receipts created after this date (ISO8601 format).|
|created_before|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter receipts created before this date (ISO8601 format).|
|reimbursement_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter receipts for a specific reimbursement.|
|transaction_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter receipts for a specific transaction.|
|from_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter receipts for transactions with a `user_transaction_time` after this date (ISO8601 format).|
|to_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter receipts for transactions with a `user_transaction_time` before this date (ISO8601 format).|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "created_at": "2022-08-20T20:33:46+00:00",
      "id": "0a0ed428-0250-4993-96ad-94cd77bc86b6",
      "receipt_url": "https://receipts.ramp.com/sales_demo_instance/amazon_business_receipt.png?Expires=1661130671",
      "transaction_id": "065916d9-7bdf-4aae-a46a-9b82225f2a20",
      "user_id": "ea0d554a-78bb-4402-a3e9-2d4bc138502f"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_receipt_list-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Receipts|[PaginatedResponseApiReceiptResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapireceiptresourceschema)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises ReceiptInvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: receipts:read )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/receipts`

*Upload a receipt*

image and optionally associate it with a transaction.

If a `transaction_id` is provided, the receipt will be linked directly to that transaction. If not, Ramp will attempt to automatically match the receipt to the most relevant transaction based on context.

This endpoint accepts the [multipart/form-data](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Methods/POST) format.

Include the receipt image as a part with `Content-Disposition: attachment`. Include metadata as parts with `Content-Disposition: form-data`.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "idempotency_key": "0a0ed428-0250-4993-96ad-94cd77bc86b6",
  "transaction_id": "01b7dc97-5b67-45a2-8b05-e4e078f3a722",
  "user_id": "30ffb5d0-3021-4438-8253-25819d480237"
}
```

<h3 id="post_receipt_upload-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiReceiptUploadRequestBody](#schemaapireceiptuploadrequestbody)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 201 Response

```json
{
  "id": "0a0ed428-0250-4993-96ad-94cd77bc86b6"
}
```

<h3 id="post_receipt_upload-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|201|[Created](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.2)|Uploaded receipt|[LightReceipt](#schemalightreceipt)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises ReceiptInvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: receipts:write )
</aside>

## get_receipt_single_resource

<a id="opIdget_receipt_single_resource"></a>

```shell

  -H 'Authorization: Bearer {access-token}'

```

```php
<?php

);
```

```java
URL obj = new URL("https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/receipts/{receipt_id}");
HttpURLConnection con = (HttpURLConnection) obj.openConnection();
con.setRequestMethod("GET");
int responseCode = con.getResponseCode();
BufferedReader in = new BufferedReader(
    new InputStreamReader(con.getInputStream()));
String inputLine;
StringBuffer response = new StringBuffer();
while ((inputLine = in.readLine()) != null) {
    response.append(inputLine);
}
in.close();
System.out.println(response.toString());

```

```go
package main

)

    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`GET /developer/v1/receipts/{receipt_id}`

*Fetch a receipt*

<h3 id="get_receipt_single_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|receipt_id|path|string(uuid)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "created_at": "2022-08-20T20:33:46+00:00",
  "id": "0a0ed428-0250-4993-96ad-94cd77bc86b6",
  "receipt_url": "https://receipts.ramp.com/sales_demo_instance/amazon_business_receipt.png?Expires=1661130671",
  "transaction_id": "065916d9-7bdf-4aae-a46a-9b82225f2a20",
  "user_id": "ea0d554a-78bb-4402-a3e9-2d4bc138502f"
}
```

<h3 id="get_receipt_single_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Receipt|[Receipt](#schemareceipt)|
|404|[Not Found](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.4)|Not Found|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: receipts:read )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/reimbursements`

*List reimbursements*

<h3 id="get_reimbursement_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|direction|query|string|false|Filter by direction (BUSINESS_TO_USER default, USER_TO_BUSINESS for repayments).|
|state|query|string|false|Filter by reimbursement state.|
|sync_status|query|string|false|Filter by sync status. Supersedes has_no_sync_commits and sync_ready.|
|from_transaction_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter by underlying transaction date (after this date).|
|to_transaction_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter by underlying transaction date (before this date).|
|awaiting_approval_by_user_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter for reimbursements awaiting approval by a specific user.|
|has_been_approved|query|boolean|false|Filter for reimbursements that are approved or not approved.  If not specified, returns all reimbursements.|
|trip_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter reimbursements associated with a specific trip.|
|accounting_field_selection_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter reimbursements by accounting field selection. This ID uniquely identifies an accounting field selection on Ramp.|
|entity_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter reimbursements by business entity.|
|from_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter reimbursements created after this date.|
|to_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter reimbursements created before this date.|
|from_submitted_at|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter reimbursements submitted after this date.|
|to_submitted_at|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter reimbursements submitted before this date.|
|synced_after|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter reimbursements synced after this date.|
|sync_ready|query|boolean|false|Filter reimbursements that are ready to sync to ERP systems.|
|has_no_sync_commits|query|boolean|false|Filter reimbursements that haven't been synced to ERP systems.|
|updated_after|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter reimbursements updated after this date.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|
|user_id|query|string(uuid)|false|none|

#### Enumerated Values

|Parameter|Value|
|---|---|
|direction|BUSINESS_TO_USER|
|direction|USER_TO_BUSINESS|
|state|APPROVED|
|state|AWAITING_EXPORT|
|state|AWAITING_PAYMENT|
|state|AWAITING_PUSH_PAYMENT|
|state|CANCELED|
|state|DELETED|
|state|DRAFT|
|state|EXPORTED|
|state|EXPORT_FAILED|
|state|EXPORT_INITIATED|
|state|EXPORT_MARKED_AS_FAILED|
|state|EXPORT_SUCCESSFUL|
|state|FAILED_REIMBURSEMENT|
|state|INIT|
|state|MANUALLY_REIMBURSED|
|state|MISSING_ACH|
|state|PENDING|
|state|PROCESSING|
|state|PUSH_PAYMENT_FAILED|
|state|PUSH_PAYMENT_INITIATED|
|state|REIMBURSED|
|state|REIMBURSED_VIA_PUSH|
|state|REJECTED|
|sync_status|NOT_SYNC_READY|
|sync_status|SYNCED|
|sync_status|SYNC_READY|

> Example responses

> 200 Response


## post_reimbursement_receipt_upload

<a id="opIdpost_reimbursement_receipt_upload"></a>

> Code samples

```shell
# You can also use wget
curl -X POST https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/reimbursements/submit-receipt \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer {access-token}'

```

```http
POST https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/reimbursements/submit-receipt HTTP/1.1
Host: api.ramp.com
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

```

```javascript
const inputBody = '{
  "idempotency_key": "0a0ed428-0250-4993-96ad-94cd77bc86b6",
  "reimbursee_id": "30ffb5d0-3021-4438-8253-25819d480237",
  "reimbursement_id": "01b7dc97-5b67-45a2-8b05-e4e078f3a722"
}';
const headers = {
  'Content-Type':'application/json',
  'Accept':'application/json',
  'Authorization':'Bearer {access-token}'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/reimbursements/submit-receipt',
{
  method: 'POST',
  body: inputBody,
  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {
    return res.json();
}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});

```

```ruby
require 'rest-client'

  'Content-Type' => 'application/json',

  'Authorization' => 'Bearer {access-token}'
}

  params: {
  }, headers: headers

p JSON.parse(result)

```

```python
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',

  'Authorization': 'Bearer {access-token}'

r = requests.post('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/reimbursements/submit-receipt', headers = headers)
```

```php

    'Authorization' => 'Bearer {access-token}',
);

$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();

// Define array of request body.
$request_body = array();

try {
    $response = $client->request('POST','https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/reimbursements/submit-receipt', array(
        'headers' => $headers,

       )

 }
 catch (\GuzzleHttp\Exception\BadResponseException $e) {
```

```java
URL obj = new URL("https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/reimbursements/submit-receipt");
HttpURLConnection con = (HttpURLConnection) obj.openConnection();
con.setRequestMethod("POST");
int responseCode = con.getResponseCode();
BufferedReader in = new BufferedReader(
    new InputStreamReader(con.getInputStream()));
String inputLine;
StringBuffer response = new StringBuffer();
while ((inputLine = in.readLine()) != null) {
    response.append(inputLine);
}
in.close();
System.out.println(response.toString());
```

```go
       "bytes"

)

func main() {

    headers := map[string][]string{
        "Content-Type": []string{"application/json"},
        "Accept": []string{"application/json"},
        "Authorization": []string{"Bearer {access-token}"},
    }

    data := bytes.NewBuffer([]byte{jsonReq})
    req, err := http.NewRequest("POST", "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/reimbursements/submit-receipt", data)
    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`POST /developer/v1/reimbursements/submit-receipt`

*Upload a receipt for a reimbursement*

If a `reimbursement_id` is provided, the receipt will be linked directly to that reimbursement. If not, Ramp will attempt to automatically create a draft reimbursement via OCR.

This endpoint accepts the [multipart/form-data](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Methods/POST) format.

Include the receipt image as a part with `Content-Disposition: attachment`. Include metadata as parts with `Content-Disposition: form-data`.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "idempotency_key": "0a0ed428-0250-4993-96ad-94cd77bc86b6",
  "reimbursee_id": "30ffb5d0-3021-4438-8253-25819d480237",
  "reimbursement_id": "01b7dc97-5b67-45a2-8b05-e4e078f3a722"
}
```

<h3 id="post_reimbursement_receipt_upload-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiReimbursementUploadReceiptRequestBody](#schemaapireimbursementuploadreceiptrequestbody)|true|none|

*Create a sales lead*

> Body parameter

`GET /developer/v1/statements`

*List statements*

<h3 id="get_statement_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|from_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter statements with end_date on or after this date (ISO8601 format).|
|to_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter statements with end_date on or before this date (ISO8601 format). Defaults to current time.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

<h1 id="ramp-developer-api-token">Token</h1>

Operations related to token

## post_token

<a id="opIdpost_token"></a>

> Code samples

```shell
# You can also use wget
curl -X POST https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/token \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'Accept: application/json'

```

```http
POST https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/token HTTP/1.1
Host: api.ramp.com
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

```

```javascript
const inputBody = '{
  "code": "wUvTfJmrDiTogz3dRNsUJdBRtSl658ibsH8xLKwKQ2PbttRr",
  "grant_type": "authorization_code",
  "redirect_uri": "https://www.yourawesomeapp.com",
  "refresh_token": "ramp_tok_IwOGYzYTlmM2YxOTQ5MGE3YmNmMDFkNTVk",
  "scope": "users:read users:write"
}';
const headers = {
  'Content-Type':'application/json',
  'Accept':'application/json'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/token',
{
  method: 'POST',
  body: inputBody,
  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {
    return res.json();
}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});

```

```ruby
require 'rest-client'
require 'json'

headers = {
  'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
  'Accept' => 'application/json'
}

result = RestClient.post 'https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/token',
  params: {
  }, headers: headers

p JSON.parse(result)

```

```python
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',

}

```

```php
       )

```

```java
URL obj = new URL("https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/token");
HttpURLConnection con = (HttpURLConnection) obj.openConnection();
con.setRequestMethod("POST");
int responseCode = con.getResponseCode();
BufferedReader in = new BufferedReader(
    new InputStreamReader(con.getInputStream()));
String inputLine;
StringBuffer response = new StringBuffer();
while ((inputLine = in.readLine()) != null) {
    response.append(inputLine);
}
in.close();
System.out.println(response.toString());

```

```go
package main

import (
       "bytes"
       "net/http"
)

func main() {

    headers := map[string][]string{
        "Content-Type": []string{"application/json"},
        "Accept": []string{"application/json"},
    }

    data := bytes.NewBuffer([]byte{jsonReq})
    req, err := http.NewRequest("POST", "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/token", data)
    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`POST /developer/v1/token`

*Create a token*

Expects two headers:
- Authorization header formed from base-64 encoded client credentials as `Authorization: Basic <base64-encoded client_id:client_secret>`
- `Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded`

Required content body depends on authorization type method, as defined by `grant_type`.
- Authorization Code Grant (`grant_type=authorization_code`): `grant_type`, `code`, and `redirect_uri` are required. Request must happen after requested scopes have been approved and exchanged for authorization code.
- Refresh Token Grant (`grant_type=refresh_token`): `grant_type` and `refresh_token` are required. User must have previously obtained refresh token in authorization code flow.
- Client Credentials Grant (`grant_type=client_credentials`): `grant_type` and `scope` are required.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "code": "wUvTfJmrDiTogz3dRNsUJdBRtSl658ibsH8xLKwKQ2PbttRr",
  "grant_type": "authorization_code",
  "redirect_uri": "https://www.yourawesomeapp.com",
  "refresh_token": "ramp_tok_IwOGYzYTlmM2YxOTQ5MGE3YmNmMDFkNTVk",
  "scope": "users:read users:write"
}
```

<h3 id="post_token-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[TokenRequestBody](#schematokenrequestbody)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "access_token": "ramp_tok_o4bfbrfhDBdXcjjTBMD1iTTXdprRuHdcmne8gR5zfSV78uPe",
  "expires_in": 3600,
  "refresh_token": "ramp_tok_IwOGYzYTlmM2YxOTQ5MGE3YmNmMDFkNTVk",
  "scope": "business:read transactions:read",
  "token_type": "Bearer"
}
```

<h3 id="post_token-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Success|[TokenResponse](#schematokenresponse)|

<aside class="success">
This operation does not require authentication
</aside>

## post_revoke_token

<a id="opIdpost_revoke_token"></a>

> Code samples

```shell

```

```http

Content-Type: application/json

```

```javascript
const inputBody = '{
  "token": "ramp_tok_IwOGYzYTlmM2YxOTQ5MGE3YmNmMDFkNTVk",
  "token_type_hint": "refresh_token"
}';
const headers = {
  'Content-Type':'application/json'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/token/revoke',
{
  method: 'POST',
  body: inputBody,
  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {
    return res.json();
}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});

```

```ruby
  }, headers: headers
```

```php
);

// Define array of request body.

try {
    $response = $client->request('POST','https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/token/revoke', array(
        'headers' => $headers,
        'json' => $request_body,
       )
    );
    print_r($response->getBody()->getContents());
 }
 catch (\GuzzleHttp\Exception\BadResponseException $e) {

 }

 // ...
```

```go
package main

import (
       "bytes"
       "net/http"
)

func main() {

    headers := map[string][]string{
        "Content-Type": []string{"application/json"},
    }

    data := bytes.NewBuffer([]byte{jsonReq})
    req, err := http.NewRequest("POST", "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/token/revoke", data)
    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`POST /developer/v1/token/revoke`

*Revoke an access or refresh token*

Expects an authorization header formed from base-64 encoded client credentials as `Authorization: Basic <base64-encoded client_id:client_secret>`.

Content body must be form-encoded. Example:
```
curl \
    -X POST \
    -H "Authorization: Basic <base64-encoded client_id:client_secret>" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
    --data-urlencode 'token=$RAMP_API_TOKEN' \
    'https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/token/revoke'
```

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "token": "ramp_tok_IwOGYzYTlmM2YxOTQ5MGE3YmNmMDFkNTVk",
  "token_type_hint": "refresh_token"
}
```

<h3 id="post_revoke_token-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[TokenRevokeRequestBody](#schematokenrevokerequestbody)|true|none|

<h3 id="post_revoke_token-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Revoked token successfully|None|

<aside class="success">
This operation does not require authentication
</aside>

<h1 id="ramp-developer-api-transaction">Transaction</h1>

Operations related to transactions

`GET /developer/v1/transactions`

*List transactions*

This endpoint supports filtering and ordering. If state is not set, all transactions except declined transactions will be returned. Note that setting multiple ordering parameters is unsupported.

<h3 id="get_transactions_canonical_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|sk_category_id|query|integer|false|Filter by a Ramp category code.|
|department_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter by department.|
|limit_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter by limit.|
|location_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter by location.|
|merchant_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter by merchant.|
|card_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter by physical card.|
|spend_program_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter by spend program.|
|statement_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter by statement.|
|approval_status|query|string|false|Filter by transaction approval status.|
|state|query|string|false|Filter by transaction state. If set to 'ALL', all transactions including 'DECLINED' will be listed.|
|user_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter by user.|
|awaiting_approval_by_user_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter for transactions awaiting approval by a specific user.|
|sync_status|query|string|false|Filter for transactions by sync status. If set, it supersedes sync_ready and has_no_sync_commits|
|has_been_approved|query|boolean|false|Filter for transactions that are approved or not approved. If not specified, returns all transactions.|
|all_requirements_met_and_approved|query|boolean|false|Filter for transactions that are fully approved and all cardholder requirements met such as receipts, memos, tracking categories. If not specified, returns all transactions.|
|has_statement|query|boolean|false|Filter for transactions that have a statement or do not have a statement. If not specified, returns all transactions.|
|synced_after|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter for transactions that have been synced after the given date, in ISO8601 format.|
|min_amount|query|any|false|Filter for transactions that have larger amount that the given amount. This is a U.S. Dollar denominated amount.|
|has_no_sync_commits|query|boolean|false|Filter for transactions that have not been synced to ERP systems yet.|
|max_amount|query|any|false|Filter for transactions that have smaller amount that the given amount. This is a U.S. Dollar denominated amount.|
|from_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter for transactions with a `user_transaction_time` after the given date, in ISO8601 format.|
|to_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter for transactions with a `user_transaction_time` before the given date, in ISO8601 format.|
|trip_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter for trip ID.|
|accounting_field_selection_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter transactions by accounting field selection. This ID uniquely identifies an accounting field selection on Ramp.|
|entity_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter transactions by business entity.|
|requires_memo|query|boolean|false|Filters for transactions which require a memo, but do not have one. This can only be set to true.|
|include_merchant_data|query|boolean|false|Include all purchase data provided by the merchant.|
|order_by_date_asc|query|boolean|false|Sort transactions by `user_transaction_date` in ascending order, in ISO8601 format.|
|order_by_date_desc|query|boolean|false|Sort transactions by `user_transaction_date` in descending order, in ISO8601 format.|
|order_by_amount_asc|query|boolean|false|Sort transactions by amount in ascending order.|
|order_by_amount_desc|query|boolean|false|Sort transactions by amount in descending order.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Parameter|Value|
|---|---|
|sk_category_id|1|
|sk_category_id|10|

|sync_status|NOT_SYNC_READY|

|sync_status|SYNC_READY|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: transactions:read )
</aside>

```java
URL obj = new URL("https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}");
HttpURLConnection con = (HttpURLConnection) obj.openConnection();
con.setRequestMethod("GET");
int responseCode = con.getResponseCode();
BufferedReader in = new BufferedReader(
    new InputStreamReader(con.getInputStream()));
String inputLine;
StringBuffer response = new StringBuffer();
while ((inputLine = in.readLine()) != null) {
    response.append(inputLine);
}
in.close();
System.out.println(response.toString());

```

```go
package main

import (
       "bytes"
       "net/http"
)

func main() {

    headers := map[string][]string{
        "Accept": []string{"application/json"},
        "Authorization": []string{"Bearer {access-token}"},
    }

    data := bytes.NewBuffer([]byte{jsonReq})
    req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}", data)
    req.Header = headers

    client := &http.Client{}
    resp, err := client.Do(req)
    // ...
}

```

`GET /developer/v1/transactions/{transaction_id}`

*Fetch a transaction*

<h3 id="get_transaction_canonical_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|include_merchant_data|query|boolean|false|Include all purchase data provided by the merchant|
|transaction_id|path|string|true|none|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: transactions:read )
</aside>

<h1 id="ramp-developer-api-transfer-payment">Transfer Payment</h1>

Operations related to transfer payments

## get_transfer_list_with_pagination

> Code samples

```shell

  -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer {access-token}'

```

```http
GET https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/transfers HTTP/1.1
Host: api.ramp.com
Accept: application/json

```

```javascript

const headers = {
  'Accept':'application/json',
  'Authorization':'Bearer {access-token}'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/transfers',
{
  method: 'GET',

  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {
    return res.json();
}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});

```

```ruby
require 'rest-client'
require 'json'

  'Accept' => 'application/json',
  'Authorization' => 'Bearer {access-token}'
}

result = RestClient.get 'https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/transfers',
  params: {
  }, headers: headers

p JSON.parse(result)

```


```php
       )
    );

 }

 }

 // ...
```


`GET /developer/v1/transfers`

*List transfer payments*

For information on how to use this endpoint, refer to the [Transfers Guide](/developer-api/v1/guides/transfers).

<h3 id="get_transfer_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|sync_status|query|string|false|Filter by sync status. Supersedes has_no_sync_commits if both are provided.|
|status|query|string|false|Filter by transfer status. See [Transfers Guide](/developer-api/v1/guides/transfers) for definitions.|
|entity_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter transfers by business entity.|
|statement_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter transfers included in the specified statement.|
|has_no_sync_commits|query|boolean|false|Filter transfers that have not been synced.|
|from_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter transfers that occurred after this date (ISO8601 format).|
|to_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Filter transfers that occurred before this date (ISO8601 format).|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Parameter|Value|
|---|---|
|sync_status|NOT_SYNC_READY|
|sync_status|SYNCED|
|sync_status|SYNC_READY|
|status|ACH_CONFIRMED|
|status|CANCELED|
|status|COMPLETED|
|status|ERROR|
|status|INITIATED|
|status|NOT_ACKED|
|status|NOT_ENOUGH_FUNDS|
|status|PROCESSING_BY_ODFI|
|status|REJECTED_BY_ODFI|
|status|RETURNED_BY_RDFI|
|status|SUBMITTED_TO_FED|
|status|SUBMITTED_TO_RDFI|
|status|UNNECESSARY|
|status|UPLOADED|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {}
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_transfer_list_with_pagination-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Transfers|[PaginatedResponseApiTransferResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapitransferresourceschema)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: transfers:read )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/trips`

*List all trips for the business*

<h3 id="get_trip_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|user_ids|query|array[string]|false|Filter trips by specific user IDs|
|status|query|string|false|Filter trips by status|
|from_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Show only trips starting on or after this date. If a trip starts before this date but a to_date is provided, the trip will be included if there is an overlap.|
|to_date|query|string(date-time)|false|Show only trips starting on or before this date. If a trip starts after this date but a from_date is provided, the trip will be included if there is an overlap.|
|min_amount|query|any|false|Show only trips with an amount greater than or equal to this value|
|max_amount|query|any|false|Show only trips with an amount less than or equal to this value|
|trip_name|query|string|false|Show only trips with this name|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Parameter|Value|
|---|---|
|status|completed|
|status|ongoing|
|status|upcoming|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {}
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_trip_list_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Trips|[PaginatedResponseTripResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponsetripresourceschema)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: trips:read )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/trips/{trip_id}`

*Fetch a trip*

<h3 id="get_trip_single_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|trip_id|path|string(uuid)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{

  "description": "string",
  "end_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",

  "length_in_days": 0,
  "locations": [
    {
      "end_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      "location": {

        "country": "string",
        "latitude": 0,
        "longitude": 0,
        "state": "string"
      },
      "start_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"

  ],

      "spend_type": "BILL"
    }
```

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Success|[TripResource](#schematripresource)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: trips:read )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/users`

*List users*

<h3 id="get_user_list_with_pagination-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|employee_id|query|string|false|Filter by user employee_id|
|role|query|string|false|Filter by user role|
|status|query|string|false|Filter only for users with the given status. Defaults to returning all active and inactive users, but not suspended users|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|
|entity_id|query|string(uuid)|false|filter by business entity|
|department_id|query|string(uuid)|false|filter by department|
|email|query|string(email)|false|filter by email|
|location_id|query|string(uuid)|false|filter by location|

#### Enumerated Values

|Parameter|Value|
|---|---|
|role|AUDITOR|
|role|BUSINESS_ADMIN|
|role|BUSINESS_BOOKKEEPER|
|role|BUSINESS_OWNER|
|role|BUSINESS_USER|
|role|GUEST_USER|
|role|IT_ADMIN|
|status|USER_ACTIVE|
|status|USER_INACTIVE|
|status|USER_SUSPENDED|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "business_id": "9abffcf0-dd7d-42f0-b806-ce0502ab6496",
      "custom_fields": [
        {
          "name": "Cost Center",
          "value": "R&D - Data"
        },
        {
          "name": "Employee ID",
          "value": "f4efe11c-337f-49a5-86b3-5df128233f2c"
        },
        {
          "name": "Region",
          "value": "EMEA"
        },
        {
          "name": "Team",
          "value": "Core Platform"
        }
      ],
      "department_id": "2d68eb67-f6eb-4284-8683-7d530c77a5a6",
      "email": "cardholder_7@company.com",
      "employee_id": "f4efe11c-337f-49a5-86b3-5df128233f2c",
      "entity_id": "0e90959a-28ba-4f7d-a75b-9c241f384b9a",
      "first_name": "Linda",
      "id": "bde8334e-042e-4f39-9a5d-355ae17342e6",
      "is_manager": false,
      "last_name": "Gu",
      "location_id": "f4efe11c-221f-4b49-a1e4-33eaf96a49ee",
      "manager_id": "ccc5d4cc-337f-49a5-86b3-5df128233f2c",
      "phone": 8004559999,
      "role": "BUSINESS_USER",
      "scheduled_deactivation_date": null,
      "status": "USER_ACTIVE"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_user_list_with_pagination-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Users|[PaginatedResponseApiUserResourceSchema](#schemapaginatedresponseapiuserresourceschema)|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises UserInvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: users:read )
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/users/deferred`

*Create a user invite*

Call this endpoint to trigger an async task to send out a user invite via email. Users will need to accept the invite in order to be onboarded.

Assign a user to a specific entity by specifying a `location_id` on creation. Locations are mapped to entities with a many-to-one relationship.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "department_id": "2d68eb67-f6eb-4284-8683-7d530c77a5a6",
  "direct_manager_id": "ccc5d4cc-337f-49a5-86b3-5df128233f2c",
  "email": "cardholder_7@company.com",
  "first_name": "Linda",
  "idempotency_key": "d471d830-2e73-4082-8a75-68540f83e86e",
  "is_manager": false,
  "last_name": "Gu",
  "location_id": "f4efe11c-221f-4b49-a1e4-33eaf96a49ee",
  "role": "BUSINESS_USER"
}
```

<h3 id="post_user_creation_deferred_task-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiUserCreateRequestBody](#schemaapiusercreaterequestbody)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 201 Response

```json
{
  "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
}
```

<h3 id="post_user_creation_deferred_task-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|201|[Created](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.2)|Response with the ID of the async task. Task status can be checked via a GET call to .../deferred/status/<task_id>|[DeferredTaskUUID](#schemadeferredtaskuuid)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: users:write )
</aside>

## patch_user_resource

```shell

```

```http
PATCH https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/users/{user_id} HTTP/1.1
Host: api.ramp.com
Content-Type: application/json

```

```javascript
const inputBody = '{
  "department_id": "2d68eb67-f6eb-4284-8683-7d530c77a5a6",
  "direct_manager_id": "ccc5d4cc-337f-49a5-86b3-5df128233f2c",
  "first_name": "Jeremy",
  "is_manager": true,
  "last_name": "Smith",
  "location_id": "f4efe11c-221f-4b49-a1e4-33eaf96a49ee",
  "role": "BUSINESS_ADMIN"
}';
const headers = {
  'Content-Type':'application/json',
  'Authorization':'Bearer {access-token}'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/users/{user_id}',
{
  method: 'PATCH',
  body: inputBody,
  headers: headers
})
.then(function(res) {
    return res.json();
}).then(function(body) {
    console.log(body);
});

```

```ruby
require 'rest-client'
require 'json'

  'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
  'Authorization' => 'Bearer {access-token}'
}

result = RestClient.patch 'https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/users/{user_id}',
  params: {
  }, headers: headers

p JSON.parse(result)

```

```python

  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Authorization': 'Bearer {access-token}'
}

r = requests.patch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/users/{user_id}', headers = headers)

print(r.json())

```

```php
<?php

require 'vendor/autoload.php';

$headers = array(
    'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
    'Authorization' => 'Bearer {access-token}',
);

$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();

// Define array of request body.
$request_body = array();

try {
    $response = $client->request('PATCH','https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/users/{user_id}', array(
        'headers' => $headers,
        'json' => $request_body,
       )
    );
    print_r($response->getBody()->getContents());
 }
 catch (\GuzzleHttp\Exception\BadResponseException $e) {
    // handle exception or api errors.
    print_r($e->getMessage());
 }

 // ...

```

```java
    new InputStreamReader(con.getInputStream()));

while ((inputLine = in.readLine()) != null) {
    response.append(inputLine);
}
in.close();
System.out.println(response.toString());

```

```go
}
```

`PATCH /developer/v1/users/{user_id}/deactivate`

*Deactivate a user*

When users are deactivated, they will no longer be able to log in, spend on cards, or receive any notifications from Ramp.

<h3 id="patch_user_deactivation_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|user_id|path|string(uuid)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{}
```

|---|---|---|---|

|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises UserInvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: users:write )
</aside>

*Reactivate a user*

`GET /developer/v1/vendors`

*List vendors*

<h3 id="get_vendor_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|external_vendor_id|query|string|false|Filter by customer-defined external vendor ID. This is independent of accounting system remote IDs.|
|merchant_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Filter by the unique identifier of a card merchant associated with the vendor.|
|accounting_vendor_remote_ids|query|array[string]|false|Show only vendors whose accounting field remote id matches the passed list. Expects a comma-separated list of strings.|
|vendor_tracking_category_option_ids|query|array[string]|false|Show only vendors whose accounting field selection id matches the passed list. Expects a comma-separated list of UUIDs.|
|sk_category_ids|query|array[integer]|false|Show only vendors whose sk_category_id matches a Ramp category code in the passed list. Expects a comma-separated list of integers.|
|from_created_at|query|string(date-time)|false|Show only vendors with created_at after this date. This parameter should be provided as a datetime string that conforms to ISO 8601|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|
|vendor_owner_id|query|string(uuid)|false|Unique identifier of the user which owns this vendor.|
|is_active|query|boolean|false|none|
|name|query|string|false|none|

#### Enumerated Values

|Parameter|Value|
|---|---|
|sk_category_ids|1|
|sk_category_ids|10|
|sk_category_ids|11|
|sk_category_ids|12|
|sk_category_ids|13|

|sk_category_ids|23|
|sk_category_ids|24|
|sk_category_ids|25|
|sk_category_ids|26|
|sk_category_ids|27|
|sk_category_ids|28|
|sk_category_ids|29|
|sk_category_ids|3|
|sk_category_ids|30|
|sk_category_ids|31|
|sk_category_ids|32|
|sk_category_ids|33|
|sk_category_ids|34|
|sk_category_ids|35|
|sk_category_ids|36|
|sk_category_ids|37|
|sk_category_ids|38|
|sk_category_ids|39|
|sk_category_ids|4|
|sk_category_ids|40|
|sk_category_ids|41|
|sk_category_ids|42|
|sk_category_ids|43|
|sk_category_ids|44|
|sk_category_ids|5|
|sk_category_ids|6|
|sk_category_ids|7|
|sk_category_ids|8|
|sk_category_ids|9|

```javascript
const inputBody = '{

};
```

`POST /developer/v1/vendors`

*Create a new vendor*

Vendors created in the API are approved by default, and are not subject to
existing approval policies.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "business_vendor_contacts": {
    "email": "vendor@ramp.com",
    "first_name": "John",
    "last_name": "Doe",
    "phone": "+13525342357"
  },
  "country": "US",
  "external_vendor_id": "EXT-12345",
  "name": "Ramp",
  "request_payment_details": true,
  "request_tax_details": true,
  "state": "NY",
  "vendor_owner_id": "6b864472-294e-4fc9-91ab-158d684c8886",
  "vendor_tracking_category_option_id": "60a1a5c9-9b2d-4658-9024-cc4baebf819a"
}
```

|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiVendorCreateRequestBody](#schemaapivendorcreaterequestbody)|true|none|

`GET /developer/v1/vendors/credits`

*List all vendor credits for all vendors of a business*

<h3 id="get_all_vendor_credits_list-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|from_accounting_date|query|string(date)|false|Filter by vendor credits with an accounting date on or after the provided date.|
|to_accounting_date|query|string(date)|false|Filter by vendor credits with an accounting date up to or on the provided date.|
|include_fully_used|query|boolean|false|Include vendor credits that are marked as fully used. Defaults to false.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

## delete_vendor_resource

<a id="opIddelete_vendor_resource"></a>

> Code samples

```shell
# You can also use wget
curl -X DELETE https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/vendors/{vendor_id} \
```

```ruby
}
```

```python
}
```

`DELETE /developer/v1/vendors/{vendor_id}`

*Delete a vendor*

A vendor cannot be deleted if it has associated transactions, bills, contracts, or spend requests.

<h3 id="delete_vendor_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|vendor_id|path|string(uuid)|true|none|

<h3 id="delete_vendor_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|204|[No Content](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.5)|Delete vendor|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: vendors:write )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/vendors/{vendor_id}/accounts`

*List vendor bank accounts*

<h3 id="get_vendor_bank_account_list_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|
|vendor_id|path|string(uuid)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {}
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_vendor_bank_account_list_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Vendor Bank Accounts|[PaginatedResponseApiVendorBankAccountResource](#schemapaginatedresponseapivendorbankaccountresource)|

`POST /developer/v1/vendors/{vendor_id}/accounts/{bank_account_id}/archive`

*Archive a vendor bank account*

If the bank account has associated bills, drafts, or recurring templates,
a replacement_bank_account_id must be provided in the request body.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "replacement_bank_account_id": null
}
```

<h3 id="post_vendor_bank_account_archive_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiVendorBankAccountArchiveParamsRequestBody](#schemaapivendorbankaccountarchiveparamsrequestbody)|true|none|
|bank_account_id|path|string(uuid)|true|none|
|vendor_id|path|string(uuid)|true|none|

<h3 id="post_vendor_bank_account_archive_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|204|[No Content](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.5)|Bank account archived|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: vendors:write )
</aside>

`GET /developer/v1/vendors/{vendor_id}/credits`

*List vendor credits by vendor*

<h3 id="get_vendor_credits_list-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|from_accounting_date|query|string(date)|false|Filter by vendor credits with an accounting date on or after the provided date.|
|to_accounting_date|query|string(date)|false|Filter by vendor credits with an accounting date up to or on the provided date.|
|include_fully_used|query|boolean|false|Include vendor credits that are marked as fully used. Defaults to false.|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|
|vendor_id|path|string(uuid)|true|none|

> Example responses

```json
        "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 100
      },
      "total_amount": {
        "amount": 200000,
        "currency_code": "USD",
        "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 100
      },
      "total_applied_amount": {
        "amount": 100000,
        "currency_code": "USD",
        "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 100
      },
      "vendor_id": "f1e2d3c4-b5a6-7890-1234-567890fedcba"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

`POST /developer/v1/vendors/{vendor_id}/update-bank-accounts`

*Add to a vendor's bank account details*

Adds payment details for the vendor through the approval workflow.
The proposal may require approval depending on the business's approval policies.

Supported payment methods:
- ACH: US bank account with routing and account numbers
- Wire: US wire transfer with routing and account numbers

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "account_nickname": "Primary Business Account",
  "ach_details": {
    "account_name": "Business Account",
    "account_number": "123456789",
    "account_owner_type": "BUSINESS",
    "account_type": "Checking",
    "routing_number": "021000021"
  },
  "is_default": false
}
```

<h3 id="post_vendor_bank_account_update_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[ApiVendorBankAccountUpdateRequestBody](#schemaapivendorbankaccountupdaterequestbody)|true|none|
|vendor_id|path|string(uuid)|true|none|

<h3 id="post_vendor_bank_account_update_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Bank Account Update Response|None|
|400|[Bad Request](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.5.1)|raises InvalidInput|None|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: vendors:write )
</aside>
