`GET /developer/v1/spend-programs`

*List spend programs*

<h3 id="get_spend_program_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|start|query|string|false|The ID of the last entity of the previous page, used for pagination to get the next page.|
|page_size|query|integer|false|The number of results to be returned in each page. The value must be between 2 and 100. If not specified, the default value 20 will be used.|

```json
        "allowed_categories": [

        ],
        "allowed_vendors": [],
        "auto_lock_date": "2025-10-28T00:00:00+00:00",

        "blocked_vendors": [],

        "limit": {
          "amount": 75000,
          "currency_code": "USD"
        },

        "start_of_interval": "2023-01-01T00:00:00+00:00",
        "temporary_limit": null,
        "transaction_amount_limit": null
      }
    }

}
```

```javascript
  ],
```

```json
    "primary_card_enabled": true,
    "reimbursements_enabled": true
  },
  "restrictions": {
    "allowed_categories": [
      33
    ],
    "allowed_vendors": [],
    "auto_lock_date": "2025-10-28T00:00:00+00:00",
    "blocked_categories": [],
    "blocked_vendors": [],
    "interval": "YEARLY",
    "limit": {
      "amount": 75000,
      "currency_code": "USD"
    },
    "next_interval_reset": "2024-01-01T00:00:00+00:00",
    "start_of_interval": "2023-01-01T00:00:00+00:00",
    "temporary_limit": null,
    "transaction_amount_limit": null
  }
}
```

<h3 id="get_spend_program_single_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Get a spend program|[ApiSpendProgramDetailResource](#schemaapispendprogramdetailresource)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2 ( Scopes: spend_programs:read )
</aside>

<h1 id="ramp-developer-api-webhooks">Webhooks</h1>

Subscribe to webhooks through developer API

## get_outbound_webhook_subscription_resource

<a id="opIdget_outbound_webhook_subscription_resource"></a>

> Code samples

```shell
# You can also use wget

  -H 'Accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer {access-token}'

```

```http
GET https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/webhooks HTTP/1.1
Host: api.ramp.com
Accept: application/json

```

```javascript

  'Accept':'application/json',
  'Authorization':'Bearer {access-token}'
};

fetch('https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/webhooks',
{

})
.then(function(res) {

}).then(function(body) {

});

```

```ruby

require 'json'

  'Accept' => 'application/json',

  }, headers: headers
```

```php
<?php

require 'vendor/autoload.php';

    'Accept' => 'application/json',

);

try {
```

```java
URL obj = new URL("https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/webhooks");

con.setRequestMethod("GET");

}
in.close();
```

```go
import (

)

    headers := map[string][]string{

        "Authorization": []string{"Bearer {access-token}"},
    }

    data := bytes.NewBuffer([]byte{jsonReq})
    req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/webhooks", data)

}

```

`GET /developer/v1/webhooks`

*Get all webhook subscriptions*

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
[
  {
    "business_id": "b12a3456-7890-1234-5678-901234567890",
    "created_at": "2023-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "endpoint_url": "https://example.com/webhook",
    "event_types": [
      "transactions.ready_for_review"
    ],
    "id": "c16b6ee1-2f5d-45e9-9fb4-c1c541a9ea70",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "updated_at": "2023-01-02T00:00:00Z"
  }
]
```

<h3 id="get_outbound_webhook_subscription_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Success|Inline|

<h3 id="get_outbound_webhook_subscription_resource-responseschema">Response Schema</h3>

Status Code **200**

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|*anonymous*|[[OutboundWebhookSubscriptionResource](#schemaoutboundwebhooksubscriptionresource)]|false|none|none|
|» business_id|string(uuid)|false|none|UUID of the business that this webhook subscription is for|
|» created_at|string(date-time)|true|none|ISO-8601 timestamp when the subscription was created|
|» endpoint_url|string|true|none|URL where webhook events will be sent|
|» event_types|[string]|true|none|Types of events this subscription will receive|
|» id|string|true|none|Unique identifier for the webhook subscription|
|» status|string|true|none|Current status of the webhook subscription|
|» updated_at|string(date-time)|true|none|ISO-8601 timestamp when the subscription was last updated|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|status|active|
|status|inactive|
|status|pending_verification|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/webhooks`

*Creates a new webhook subscription*

The newly registered subscription will be in the pending verficiation state. You will need to verify your endpoint with the provided challenge.

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "additional_headers": {
    "Authorization": "Bearer token123",
    "X-Custom-Header": "value"
  },
  "endpoint_url": "https://example.com/webhook",
  "event_types": [
    "TRANSACTION_REFUNDED",
    "USER_INVITED"
  ]
}
```

<h3 id="post_outbound_webhook_subscription_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[OutboundWebhookSubscriptionCreateRequestBody](#schemaoutboundwebhooksubscriptioncreaterequestbody)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 201 Response

```json
{
  "additional_headers": {
    "Authorization": "Bearer token123",
    "X-Custom-Header": "value"
  },
  "business_id": "b12a3456-7890-1234-5678-901234567890",
  "created_at": "2023-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "endpoint_url": "https://example.com/webhook",
  "event_types": [
    "transactions.ready_for_review"
  ],
  "id": "c16b6ee1-2f5d-45e9-9fb4-c1c541a9ea70",
  "secret": "ramp_sec_aXbKpLmNqRsTuVwXyZaBcDeFgHiJkLmN",
  "status": "ACTIVE",
  "updated_at": "2023-01-02T00:00:00Z"
}
```

<h3 id="post_outbound_webhook_subscription_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|201|[Created](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.2)|Success|[OutboundWebhookSubscriptionWithSecretResource](#schemaoutboundwebhooksubscriptionwithsecretresource)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2
</aside>

`POST /developer/v1/webhooks/{webhook_id}/verify`

*Verify a webhook subscription*

> Body parameter

```json
{
  "challenge": "ramp_challenge_a8f5f167f44f4964e6c998dee827110c"
}
```

<h3 id="post_outbound_webhook_subscription_verify_resource-parameters">Parameters</h3>

|Name|In|Type|Required|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|body|body|[OutboundWebhookSubscriptionVerifyRequestBody](#schemaoutboundwebhooksubscriptionverifyrequestbody)|true|none|
|webhook_id|path|string(uuid)|true|none|

> Example responses

> 200 Response

```json
{
  "success": true
}
```

<h3 id="post_outbound_webhook_subscription_verify_resource-responses">Responses</h3>

|Status|Meaning|Description|Schema|
|---|---|---|---|
|200|[OK](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.3.1)|Success|[SimpleSuccess](#schemasimplesuccess)|

<aside class="warning">
To perform this operation, you must be authenticated by means of one of the following methods:
oauth2
</aside>

# Schemas

<h2 id="tocS_AccountingProvider">AccountingProvider</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaaccountingprovider"></a>
<a id="schema_AccountingProvider"></a>
<a id="tocSaccountingprovider"></a>
<a id="tocsaccountingprovider"></a>

```json
{
  "connection_type": "API",
  "created_at": "2021-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "id": "46910cc3-ab41-4b80-b4a7-94dab9f1b795",
  "is_active": true,
  "is_ready_to_migrate": false,
  "last_linked_at": "2021-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "remote_provider_name": "Example ERP",
  "settings": {
    "transaction_accounting_vendor_creation_on_sync_enabled": false,
    "transaction_sync_button_enabled": false,
    "vendor_credits_enabled": false
  },
  "status": "LINKED"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|connection_type|string|true|read-only|The type of the accounting connection.|
|created_at|string(date-time)|true|none|The date and time the accounting connection was created.|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|none|
|is_active|boolean|true|read-only|Whether the accounting connection is active.|
|is_ready_to_migrate|boolean|true|read-only|Whether an Accounting Connection is marked as ready to migrate. For use by the ERP migration flow. Only one Accounting Connection will be marked as ready to migrate per business at a given time. Once a customer begins an ERP migration, a ready to migrate Accounting Connection will no longer be considered ready to migrate.|
|last_linked_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|The date and time the accounting connection was last connected.|
|remote_provider_name|string¦null|true|read-only|The name of the accounting connection.|
|settings|[ApiAccountingProviderDeveloperApiConnectionSettings](#schemaapiaccountingproviderdeveloperapiconnectionsettings)¦null|true|read-only|The connection settings for this accounting connection. Only applies to API-based accounting connections. This field will be empty for non-API based accounting connections.|
|status|string|true|none|The current status of the accounting connection.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|connection_type|API|
|connection_type|CSV|
|connection_type|DIRECT|
|status|failed_to_auth|
|status|linked|
|status|revoked|
|status|unlinked|

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|

|transaction_sync_button_enabled|boolean|false|none|Whether the transaction sync button is enabled for this accounting connection. Only applies to API-based connections. Defaults to false.|
|vendor_credits_enabled|boolean|false|none|Whether vendor credits are enabled for this accounting connection. Only applies to API-based connections. Defaults to false.|

|error|[ApiAccountingSyncErrorRequestBody](#schemaapiaccountingsyncerrorrequestbody)|true|none|describes the reason why the sync object failed to sync.|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|ID that uniquely identifies a transaction/reimbursement in Ramp systems.|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiAccountingField">ApiAccountingField</h2>

```json
{
  "external_id": "string",
  "id": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "type": "AMORTIZATION_TEMPLATE"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|external_id|string|true|none|external id of accounting field; It should uniquely identify an accounting field on the client end.|
|id|string|true|none|ID that uniquely identifies an accounting field within Ramp|
|name|string|true|none|name of accounting field|
|type|string|true|none|accounting field type|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|type|AMORTIZATION_TEMPLATE|
|type|BILLABLE|
|type|COST_CENTER|
|type|CUSTOMERS_JOBS|
|type|DEFERRAL_CODE|
|type|EXPENSE_ENTITY|
|type|GL_ACCOUNT|
|type|INVENTORY_ITEM|
|type|JOURNAL|
|type|MERCHANT|
|type|NON_ERP|
|type|OTHER|
|type|PROJECT|
|type|REPORTING_TAG|
|type|SUBSIDIARY|
|type|TAX_CODE|

```json
}
```

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|

|external_code|string¦null|false|none|external code of accounting field option; Code field displayed on the ERP.|
|external_id|string|true|none|external id of accounting field option; It should uniquely identify an accounting field option on the client end.|
|id|string|true|none|ID that uniquely identifies an accounting field option within Ramp|
|name|string|true|none|name of accounting field option|
|provider_name|string¦null|true|read-only|Name of the accounting provider|

```json
}
```

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|

|transaction_sync_button_enabled|boolean|true|none|Whether the transaction sync button is enabled for this accounting connection. Only applies to API-based connections.|
|vendor_credits_enabled|boolean|true|none|Whether vendor credits are enabled for this accounting connection. Only applies to API-based connections.|

```json
  "successful_syncs": [

    },

  ],

}
```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|failed_syncs|[[ApiAccountingFailedSyncRequestBody](#schemaapiaccountingfailedsyncrequestbody)]|false|none|A list of objects that failed to be synced.|
|idempotency_key|string|true|none|An idempotency key is a unique value generated by the client which the server uses to recognize subsequent retries of the same request. To avoid collisions, we encourage clients to use random generated UUIDs.|
|successful_syncs|[[ApiAccountingSuccessfulSyncRequestBody](#schemaapiaccountingsuccessfulsyncrequestbody)]|false|none|A list of successfully synced objects.|
|sync_type|string|true|none|The type of object to sync.|

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|sync_type|BILL_PAYMENT_SYNC|
|sync_type|BILL_SYNC|

|sync_type|REIMBURSEMENT_SYNC|
|sync_type|STATEMENT_CREDIT_SYNC|
|sync_type|TRANSACTION_SYNC|

```json
{
  "accounting_field_selections": [
    {
      "category_info": {
        "external_id": "string",
        "id": "string",
        "name": "string",
        "type": "AMORTIZATION_TEMPLATE"
      },
      "external_code": "string",
      "external_id": "string",
      "id": "string",
      "name": "string",
      "provider_name": "string"
    }
  ],
  "amount": {
    "amount": 0,
    "currency_code": "USD",
    "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 0
  },
  "item_receipt_line_item_ids": [
    "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
  ],
  "memo": "string",
  "purchase_order_line_item_id": "5c0f45e8-d007-4d03-89f8-bca35f15fdc7",
  "quantity": 0,
  "unit_price": {
    "amount": 0,
    "currency_code": "USD",
    "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 0
  }
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiAccountingFieldSelection](#schemaapiaccountingfieldselection)]|true|none|List of accounting field options selected to code the line item.|
|amount|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|read-only|Amount of the line item, equal to the product of unit quantity and unit price, represented in the lowest denomination of the currency (e.g., cents for USD).|
|item_receipt_line_item_ids|[string]|true|read-only|List of unique identifiers for item receipt line items associated with this bill inventory line item through the purchase order line item|
|memo|string|false|none|Memo of the line item|
|purchase_order_line_item_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier of the matched purchase order line item, if any|
|quantity|number|true|none|Quantity of the line item|
|unit_price|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|read-only|Unit price of the line item, represented in the lowest denomination of the currency (e.g., cents for USD).|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiBillPayment">ApiBillPayment</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapibillpayment"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiBillPayment"></a>
<a id="tocSapibillpayment"></a>
<a id="tocsapibillpayment"></a>

```json
{
  "amount": {
    "amount": 0,
    "currency_code": "USD",
    "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 0
  },
  "details": {
    "spend_limit_id": "45ef2d8c-b3b5-4aee-9002-c1a3f5bbcf27",
    "transaction_ids": [
      "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
    ]
  },
  "effective_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "id": "string",
  "payment_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "payment_method": "ACH",
  "trace_id": {
    "descriptor": "string",
    "trace_id": "string"
  }
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|amount|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|none|Paid amount of the bill.|
|details|[ApiPaymentDetailsResource](#schemaapipaymentdetailsresource)|true|none|Additional payment details specific to payment method.|
|effective_date|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|For non-card payment methods only, the date the payment is actually initiated.|
|id|string¦null|true|read-only|Unique identifier of the payment. Bills sharing the same payment ID belong to the same batch payment.|
|payment_date|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|For non-card payment methods, the date the payment is scheduled to be initiated. For card methods, the settlement date of the latest transaction on card. Additional information about transactions should be accessed through the transactions API.|
|payment_method|string¦null|true|none|none|
|trace_id|[ApiBillTraceId](#schemaapibilltraceid)¦null|true|none|For non-card payment methods only, the trace ID for this bill. This field is only returned in the GET /bills/{bill_id} response body (not in the GET /bills paginated query).|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|payment_method|ACH|
|payment_method|AUTOMATIC_CARD_PAYMENT|
|payment_method|CARD|
|payment_method|CHECK|
|payment_method|CRYPTO_WALLET_TRANSFER|
|payment_method|DOMESTIC_WIRE|
|payment_method|INTERNATIONAL|
|payment_method|LOCAL_BANK_TRANSFER|
|payment_method|ONE_TIME_CARD|
|payment_method|ONE_TIME_CARD_DELIVERY|
|payment_method|PAID_MANUALLY|
|payment_method|RTP|
|payment_method|SWIFT|
|payment_method|UNSPECIFIED|
|payment_method|VENDOR_CREDIT|

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|

```json
  "remote_name": "string",

}
```

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the vendor.|

|remote_id|string|false|none|External ID that uniquely identifies the vendor on the client's side.|
|remote_name|string|false|none|Name of the vendor.|
|type|string|false|none|none|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|type|BUSINESS|
|type|INDIVIDUAL|

```json
{
  "card_personalization": {
    "text": {
      "name_line_1": {
        "value": "string"
      },
      "name_line_2": {

      }

  "fulfillment_status": "DELIVERED",
  "shipping": {
    "method": "string",
    "recipient_address": {
      "address1": "string",
      "address2": "string",
      "city": "string",
      "country": "string",
      "first_name": "string",
      "last_name": "string",
      "phone": "string",
      "postal_code": "string",
      "state": "string"
    },
    "recipient_address_verification_state": "NOT_VERIFIED",
    "return_address": {
      "address1": "string",
      "address2": "string",
      "city": "string",
      "country": "string",
      "first_name": "string",
      "last_name": "string",
      "phone": "string",
      "postal_code": "string",
      "state": "string"
    }
  },
  "shipping_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "shipping_eta": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "shipping_tracking_url": "string"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|card_personalization|[CardPersonalization](#schemacardpersonalization)|false|none|none|
|cardholder_uuid|string(uuid)¦null|false|none|none|
|fulfillment_status|string|false|none|Fulfillment status of the card|
|shipping|[CardShipping](#schemacardshipping)|false|none|none|
|shipping_date|string(date-time)|false|none|Date on which the card is shipped out, presented in ISO8601 format|
|shipping_eta|string(date-time)|false|none|Estimated arrival time, presented in ISO8601 format|
|shipping_tracking_url|string|false|none|Tracking url|

|Property|Value|

|fulfillment_status|ISSUED|
|fulfillment_status|ORDERED|
|fulfillment_status|REJECTED|
|fulfillment_status|SHIPPED|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiCardRequestBody">ApiCardRequestBody</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapicardrequestbody"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiCardRequestBody"></a>
<a id="tocSapicardrequestbody"></a>
<a id="tocsapicardrequestbody"></a>

```json
{
  "display_name": "T&E",
  "entity_id": "7051bc66-a8cb-4e68-81c4-caf6459ac168",
  "idempotency_key": "3a5b1f62-988f-4190-bf31-b7ae87c5df42",
  "spending_restrictions": {
    "amount": 5000,
    "categories": [],
    "currency": "USD",
    "interval": "MONTHLY",
    "transaction_amount_limit": 100
  },
  "user_id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|display_name|string|false|none|Cosmetic display name of the card.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Create card associated with business entity. If not provided, defaults to entity associated with user's location.|
|idempotency_key|string|true|none|An idempotency key is a unique value generated by the client which the server uses to recognize subsequent retries of the same request. To avoid collisions, we encourage clients to use random generated UUIDs.|
|is_temporary|boolean|false|none|Set to true to create a temporary card|
|spending_restrictions|[ApiCardSpendingRestrictionsRequestBody](#schemaapicardspendingrestrictionsrequestbody)|false|none|Specifies the spend restrictions on a Ramp card. One of `spending_restrictions` or `card_program_id` must be provided.|
|user_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the card owner.|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiCardSpendingRestrictionsDump">ApiCardSpendingRestrictionsDump</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapicardspendingrestrictionsdump"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiCardSpendingRestrictionsDump"></a>
<a id="tocSapicardspendingrestrictionsdump"></a>
<a id="tocsapicardspendingrestrictionsdump"></a>

```json
{
  "amount": 0,
  "auto_lock_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "blocked_categories": [
    0
  ],
  "categories": [
    0
  ],
  "interval": "ANNUAL",
  "suspended": true,
  "transaction_amount_limit": 0
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|amount|number|false|none|Amount limit total per interval.|
|auto_lock_date|string(date-time)¦null|true|read-only|Date to automatically lock the card. Note that this is different from the actual card expiration date. It conforms to ISO8601 format|
|blocked_categories|[integer]|false|none|List of [Ramp Category Codes](/developer-api/v1/overview/conventions#ramp-category-codes) blocked for this card.|
|categories|[integer]|false|none|List of [Ramp Category Codes](/developer-api/v1/overview/conventions#ramp-category-codes) this card is restricted to.|
|interval|string|false|none|Time interval to apply limit to.|
|suspended|boolean|false|none|Whether the card has been locked.|
|transaction_amount_limit|number|false|none|Max amount limit per transaction.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|interval|ANNUAL|
|interval|DAILY|
|interval|MONTHLY|
|interval|QUARTERLY|
|interval|TERTIARY|
|interval|TOTAL|
|interval|WEEKLY|
|interval|YEARLY|

```json
{

    "string"

    {
      "tracking_category_id": "f10c44c1-5111-4606-a2d0-dcccfdf167c5",
      "tracking_category_option_id": "b719ee03-2190-45a4-bda5-4894025fe824",
      "tracking_category_option_remote_name": "string"
    }
  ],
  "categories": [
    1
  ],
  "categories_blacklist": [
    1
  ],
  "categories_whitelist": [
    1
  ],
  "currency": "string",
  "interval": "ANNUAL",
  "lock_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "policy_id": "string",
  "transaction_amount_limit": "string",
  "vendor_blacklist": [
    "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
  ],
  "vendor_whitelist": [
    "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
  ]
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|amount|number|true|none|Amount limit total per interval.|

oneOf

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|» *anonymous*|string(decimal)|false|none|none|

xor

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|» *anonymous*|number|false|none|none|

continued

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|blocked_mcc_codes|[string]|false|none|none|
|card_accounting_rules|[[ApiCardAccountingRulesDataRequestBody](#schemaapicardaccountingrulesdatarequestbody)]|false|none|none|
|categories|[integer]|false|none|List of Ramp category codes that this card is restricted to.|
|categories_blacklist|[integer]|false|none|none|
|categories_whitelist|[integer]|false|none|none|
|currency|string|false|none|Currency in which the amount is specified.|
|interval|string|true|none|Time interval to apply limit to.|
|lock_date|string(date-time)|false|none|Date to automatically lock the card. If `lock_date` has passed, set to a future date or to null to unlock the card. Note that this is different from the actual card expiration date. This date need to conforms to ISO8601 format.|
|policy_id|string|false|none|none|
|transaction_amount_limit|number|false|none|Max amount limit per transaction.|

oneOf

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|» *anonymous*|string(decimal)|false|none|none|

xor

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|» *anonymous*|number|false|none|none|

continued

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|vendor_blacklist|[string]|false|none|none|
|vendor_whitelist|[string]|false|none|none|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|interval|ANNUAL|
|interval|DAILY|
|interval|MONTHLY|
|interval|QUARTERLY|
|interval|TERTIARY|
|interval|TOTAL|
|interval|WEEKLY|
|interval|YEARLY|

```json
{
  "card_program_id": "ebe71e80-84d3-4e4b-be4d-70d05fb20934",
  "display_name": "WFH Spending Card",
  "entity_id": "a7cb9187-4dc8-412a-b5ca-0974d7f07a0b",
  "has_notifications_enabled": true,
  "new_user_id": "506a7096-98c0-4ab5-86ef-20c884a78e74",
  "spending_restrictions": {
    "amount": 500,
    "interval": "DAILY"
  }
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|display_name|string|false|none|Cosmetic display name of the card.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)¦null|false|none|Specify id to update associated business entity.|
|has_notifications_enabled|boolean|false|none|Flag to set to enable or disable notifications.|
|new_user_id|string(uuid)¦null|false|none|Specify id for new card owner.|
|spending_restrictions|[PartialApiCardSpendingRestrictionsUpdateRequestBody](#schemapartialapicardspendingrestrictionsupdaterequestbody)|false|none|Modify spending restrictions. Only the fields to be modified need to be passed (so fields that will stay the same do not have to be passed).|

```json
{

    {

      "field_option_id": "d062e221-9c95-47b5-8dc6-d6c881693caf"
    }
  ],

  "spending_restrictions": {
    "allowed_categories": [
      18,
      20
    ],
    "auto_lock_date": null,
    "interval": "TOTAL",
    "limit": {
      "amount": 500000,
      "currency_code": "USD"
    }
  },
```

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_rules|[[SpendLimitAccountingRulesDataRequestBody](#schemaspendlimitaccountingrulesdatarequestbody)]|false|none|Set accounting rules for the limit and card|
|display_name|string|false|none|Cosmetic display name of the limit.|
|spend_program_id|string(uuid)|false|none|The id of the associated spend program.|
|spending_restrictions|[ApiSpendingRestrictionsRequestBody](#schemaapispendingrestrictionsrequestbody)|false|none|Specifies the spending restrictions. If spend_program_id is passed, this field is ignored and the limit will inherit the spending restrictions of the spend program.|
|user_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the card owner.|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiCreateAccountingFieldParamsRequestBody">ApiCreateAccountingFieldParamsRequestBody</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapicreateaccountingfieldparamsrequestbody"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiCreateAccountingFieldParamsRequestBody"></a>

<a id="tocsapicreateaccountingfieldparamsrequestbody"></a>

```json
{
  "field_external_id": "string",
  "field_option_external_id": null,
  "free_form_text": null
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|field_external_id|string|true|none|Remote ID of accounting field. This is the external ID, likely from ERP system.|
|field_option_external_id|string¦null|false|none|Remote ID of accounting field option. This is the external ID, likely from ERP system. Required if free_form_text is not provided.|
|free_form_text|string¦null|false|none|Free form text for the accounting field selection. For DATE-type fields, use ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD). Required if field_option_external_id is not provided.|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiCreateBankAccountPaymentParamsRequestBody">ApiCreateBankAccountPaymentParamsRequestBody</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapicreatebankaccountpaymentparamsrequestbody"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiCreateBankAccountPaymentParamsRequestBody"></a>
<a id="tocSapicreatebankaccountpaymentparamsrequestbody"></a>
<a id="tocsapicreatebankaccountpaymentparamsrequestbody"></a>

```json
{
  "is_same_day": false,
  "payment_arrival_date": "2019-08-24",
  "source_bank_account_id": "c0b3abf6-f83b-4b71-83da-d4b168b9b003",
  "vendor_account_id": "74c9148a-ff02-4fcf-ae7d-90ad0809a093"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|is_same_day|boolean|false|none|Enables same-day delivery for eligible payments. Currently, this functionality is available only for ACH payments.<br>Same-day delivery may incur an additional fee. For more details, see the [Ramp Help Center](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/4417836454419-Bill-payment-methods-and-timelines#h_01GYSNEJWEJ1G133138FQZTMVK).<br>To use same-day delivery via the API, your account must first be enabled for this feature. Please contact developer-support@ramp.com to request access before implementing.|
|payment_arrival_date|string(date)|true|none|The expected date the payment will arrive in the vendor's bank account.<br><br>The required time and fee to process the payment depends on the payment method. See the [Ramp Help Center](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/4417836454419-Bill-payment-methods-and-timelines) for more information on payment speeds. An error will be thrown if selected date is invalid.|
|source_bank_account_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the bank account to pay the bill from. Must be associated with the passed business entity and have usage_type=BILL_PAY_BANK_ACCOUNT.|
|vendor_account_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the vendor account to pay the bill to.|

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiCreateAccountingFieldParamsRequestBody](#schemaapicreateaccountingfieldparamsrequestbody)]|false|none|List of accounting field options selected to code the bill.|
|attachment_id|string(uuid)¦null|false|none|UUID of a previously uploaded file to attach to this bill.|
|due_at|string(date)|true|none|Due date of the bill.|
|enable_accounting_sync|boolean|false|none|A flag you can set to False to prevent this bill from syncing to your ERP. Note: enable_accounting_sync must be True when remote_id is provided.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Associated business entity.|
|inventory_line_items|[[ApiCreateBillInventoryLineItemParamsRequestBody](#schemaapicreatebillinventorylineitemparamsrequestbody)]¦null|false|none|List of inventory line items related to the bill.|
|invoice_currency|string|true|none|Currency of the invoice.|
|invoice_number|string|true|none|The invoice number on the bill.|
|issued_at|string(date)|true|none|Issued date of the bill.|
|line_items|[[ApiCreateBillLineItemParamsRequestBody](#schemaapicreatebilllineitemparamsrequestbody)]¦null|false|none|List of line items related to the bill.|
|memo|string¦null|false|none|Memo of the bill.|
|payment_details|[ApiCreateBillPaymentRequestBody](#schemaapicreatebillpaymentrequestbody)¦null|false|none|Payment details of the bill. Expected schema depends on payment method.|
|payment_method|string|false|none|Payment method of the bill. Required unless use_default_payment_method is true.|
|posting_date|string(date)¦null|false|none|The date the bill is posted to the accounting system.|
|purchase_order_ids|[string]|false|none|Unique identifiers of the purchase orders to match this bill to.|
|remote_id|string¦null|false|none|An ID that identifies the bill on client's side. Note: enable_accounting_sync must be True when remote_id is provided.|
|use_default_payment_method|boolean|false|none|When set to true, create the bill using the default payment method configured for the vendor. If set to true, payment_method and payment_details should not be provided.|
|use_default_vendor_contact|boolean|false|none|When set to true, create the bill using the default contact configured for the vendor. If set to true, vendor_contact_id should not be provided.|
|vendor_contact_id|string(uuid)¦null|false|none|Unique identifier of vendor contact, must be associated with passed vendor. Required unless use_default_vendor_contact is true.|
|vendor_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of bill vendor.|

```json
{
  "is_same_day": false,
  "payment_arrival_date": "2019-08-24",
  "source_bank_account_id": "c0b3abf6-f83b-4b71-83da-d4b168b9b003",
  "vendor_account_id": "74c9148a-ff02-4fcf-ae7d-90ad0809a093"
}

```

<h2 id="tocS_ApiCreateBillVendorPaymentParamsRequestBody">ApiCreateBillVendorPaymentParamsRequestBody</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapicreatebillvendorpaymentparamsrequestbody"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiCreateBillVendorPaymentParamsRequestBody"></a>
<a id="tocSapicreatebillvendorpaymentparamsrequestbody"></a>
<a id="tocsapicreatebillvendorpaymentparamsrequestbody"></a>

```json
{
  "is_same_day": false,
  "payment_arrival_date": "2019-08-24",
  "source_bank_account_id": "c0b3abf6-f83b-4b71-83da-d4b168b9b003"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|is_same_day|boolean|false|none|Enables same-day delivery for eligible payments. Currently, this functionality is available only for ACH payments.<br>Same-day delivery may incur an additional fee. For more details, see the [Ramp Help Center](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/4417836454419-Bill-payment-methods-and-timelines#h_01GYSNEJWEJ1G133138FQZTMVK).<br>To use same-day delivery via the API, your account must first be enabled for this feature. Please contact developer-support@ramp.com to request access before implementing.|
|payment_arrival_date|string(date)|true|none|The expected date the payment will arrive in the vendor's bank account.<br><br>The required time and fee to process the payment depends on the payment method. See the [Ramp Help Center](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/4417836454419-Bill-payment-methods-and-timelines) for more information on payment speeds. An error will be thrown if selected date is invalid.|
|source_bank_account_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the bank account to pay the bill from. Must be associated with the passed business entity and have usage_type=BILL_PAY_BANK_ACCOUNT.|

```json
}
```

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|spend_limit_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the spend limit associated with the matched transaction.|
|transaction_id|string(uuid)¦null|false|none|If already paid, the unique identifier of the bill payment transaction. The bill will be marked as paid with this transaction once approved.|

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiCreateAccountingFieldParamsRequestBody](#schemaapicreateaccountingfieldparamsrequestbody)]|false|none|List of accounting field options selected to code the bill.|
|due_at|string(date)|false|none|Due date of the bill.|
|enable_accounting_sync|boolean|false|none|A flag you can set to False to prevent this bill from syncing to your ERP.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Associated business entity.|
|inventory_line_items|[[ApiCreateBillInventoryLineItemParamsRequestBody](#schemaapicreatebillinventorylineitemparamsrequestbody)]¦null|false|none|List of inventory line items associated with the bill. When provided, this will replace all existing inventory line items.|
|invoice_currency|string|false|none|Currency of the invoice.|
|invoice_number|string|false|none|The invoice number on the bill.|
|issued_at|string(date)|false|none|Issued date of the bill.|
|line_items|[[ApiCreateBillLineItemParamsRequestBody](#schemaapicreatebilllineitemparamsrequestbody)]¦null|false|none|List of line items related to the bill. When provided, this will replace all existing line items.|
|memo|string¦null|false|none|Memo of the bill.|
|payment_method|string|false|none|Payment method of the bill.|
|posting_date|string(date)¦null|false|none|The date the bill is posted to the accounting system.|
|purchase_order_ids|[string]|false|none|Unique identifiers of the purchase orders to match this bill to. When provided, this will replace all existing linked purchase orders.|
|remote_id|string¦null|false|none|An ID that identifies the bill on client's side.|
|use_default_payment_method|boolean|false|none|When set to true, create the draft bill using the default payment method configured for the vendor. If set to true, payment_method and payment_details should not be provided.|
|vendor_contact_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of vendor contact, must be associated with passed vendor.|
|vendor_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of bill vendor.|

<a id="tocSapicreatemanualbillpaymentparamsrequestbody"></a>
<a id="tocsapicreatemanualbillpaymentparamsrequestbody"></a>

```json
{
  "manual_payment_method": "CASH",
  "payment_date": "2019-08-24"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|manual_payment_method|string|true|none|Manual payment method of the bill. If passed, payment_date must also be passed and the bill will be marked as paid.|
|payment_date|string(date)|true|none|The date the bill is paid. This field is not relevant for one-time card delivery, as limits are created immediately and sent out to the vendor on the due date.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|manual_payment_method|CASH|
|manual_payment_method|CHECK|
|manual_payment_method|CROSS_BORDER_PAYMENT|
|manual_payment_method|CRYPTO_WALLET_TRANSFER|
|manual_payment_method|DIRECT_DEBIT|
|manual_payment_method|DOMESTIC_WIRE_TRANSFER|
|manual_payment_method|NON_RAMP_CREDIT_CARD|
|manual_payment_method|OTHER|
|manual_payment_method|PAID_IN_ERP|

```json
{
  "accounts": [
    {
      "classification": "ASSET",
      "created_at": "2020-01-12T01:30:00+00:00",
      "external_id": "123456",
      "external_name": "Checking Account",
      "internal_id": "",
      "usage_type": "CASH_ACCOUNT"
    }
  ],
  "connected_subsidiary": {
    "external_id": "426",
    "id": "07b4ce4d-2750-412e-aef4-6b7815f1411c",
    "name": "Ramp Canada Inc."
  },
  "currency": "CAD",
  "entity_name": "Jill's Art Shop Canada",
  "id": "d290f1ee-6c54-4b01-90e6-d701748f0851",
  "is_primary": true,
  "location_ids": [
    "cabfda32-91a9-41d7-9d24-5c9c6dd19419"
  ],
  "payment_accounts": [
    {
      "account_name": "Business Checking",
      "account_number_last_four": "1234",
      "currency": "USD",
      "id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
    }
  ]
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounts|[[EntityProviderAccount](#schemaentityprovideraccount)]|true|read-only|Information about the entity's active accounts|
|connected_subsidiary|[EntityConnectedSubsidiary](#schemaentityconnectedsubsidiary)¦null|true|read-only|The subsidiary in the ERP system that this entity is mapped to. This determines which subsidiary transactions from this entity will be synced to.|
|currency|string¦null|true|none|Currency used by this business entity.|
|entity_name|string|true|none|Name of the business entity.|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier for the business entity.|
|is_primary|boolean¦null|true|none|Whether this is the primary entity for the business.|
|location_ids|[string]|true|read-only|List of identifiers for locations associated with this entity.|
|payment_accounts|[[EntityPaymentAccount](#schemaentitypaymentaccount)]|true|read-only|Bank accounts eligible for bill payment for this entity.|

```json
  }
```

|memo|string¦null|true|none|Memo of the item receipt line item.|
|purchase_order_line_item_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the purchase order line item that was received.|
|quantity|number¦null|true|none|Received quantity of the line item.|
|remote_id|string¦null|true|read-only|The accounting remote identifier of the item receipt line item.|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiItemReceiptResource">ApiItemReceiptResource</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapiitemreceiptresource"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiItemReceiptResource"></a>
<a id="tocSapiitemreceiptresource"></a>
<a id="tocsapiitemreceiptresource"></a>

```json
{
  "archived_at": null,
  "created_at": "2022-05-10T00:00:00Z",
  "documents": [
    "https://someurl.com"
  ],
  "id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "item_receipt_number": "1234567890",
  "line_items": [
    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [],
      "amount": {
        "amount": 100,
        "currency_code": "USD"
      },
      "memo": null,
      "purchase_order_line_item_id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
      "quantity": 1,
      "unit_price": {
        "amount": 500,
        "currency_code": "USD"
      }
    }
  ],
  "memo": null,
  "purchase_order_id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "received_at": "2022-05-09T00:00:00Z",
  "remote_id": "1"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|archived_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|The date and time when the item receipt was archived.|
|created_at|string(date-time)|true|none|The date and time when the item receipt was created.|
|documents|[string]|true|read-only|The URLs of the documents associated with the item receipt.|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|The unique identifier of the item receipt.|
|item_receipt_number|string|true|none|The user-defined identifier of the item receipt.|
|line_items|[[ApiItemReceiptLineItem](#schemaapiitemreceiptlineitem)]|true|none|List of line items on the item receipt.|
|memo|string¦null|true|none|Memo of the item receipt.|
|purchase_order_id|string(uuid)|true|none|The unique identifier of the purchase order that the item receipt belongs to.|
|received_at|string(date-time)|true|none|The date and time when the item receipt was received.|
|remote_id|string¦null|true|read-only|The accounting remote identifier of the item receipt.|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiPhysicalRequestBody">ApiPhysicalRequestBody</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapiphysicalrequestbody"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiPhysicalRequestBody"></a>
<a id="tocSapiphysicalrequestbody"></a>
<a id="tocsapiphysicalrequestbody"></a>

```json
{
  "display_name": "T&E",
  "fulfillment": {
    "shipping": {
      "recipient_address": {
        "address1": "123 Main St",
        "city": "New York City",
        "country": "US",
        "first_name": "Cardholder's first name",
        "last_name": "Cardholder's last name",
        "postal_code": "10003",
        "state": "NY"
      }
    }
  },
  "idempotency_key": "3a5b1f62-988f-4190-bf31-b7ae87c5df42",
  "spending_restrictions": {
    "amount": 5000,
    "categories": [],
    "currency": "USD",
    "interval": "MONTHLY",
    "transaction_amount_limit": 100
  },
  "user_id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|display_name|string|false|none|Cosmetic display name of the card.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Create card associated with business entity. If not provided, defaults to entity associated with user's location.|
|fulfillment|[CardFulfillmentRequestBody](#schemacardfulfillmentrequestbody)|false|none|Fulfillment details of a Ramp card. For physical cards only.|
|idempotency_key|string|true|none|An idempotency key is a unique value generated by the client which the server uses to recognize subsequent retries of the same request. To avoid collisions, we encourage clients to use random generated UUIDs.|
|is_temporary|boolean|false|none|Set to true to create a temporary card|
|spending_restrictions|[ApiCardSpendingRestrictionsRequestBody](#schemaapicardspendingrestrictionsrequestbody)|false|none|Specifies the spend restrictions on a Ramp card. One of `spending_restrictions` or `card_program_id` must be provided.|
|user_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the card owner.|

<a id="schemaapipurchaseorderarchiverequestbody"></a>

<h2 id="tocS_ApiPurchaseOrderCreateParamsRequestBody">ApiPurchaseOrderCreateParamsRequestBody</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapipurchaseordercreateparamsrequestbody"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiPurchaseOrderCreateParamsRequestBody"></a>
<a id="tocSapipurchaseordercreateparamsrequestbody"></a>
<a id="tocsapipurchaseordercreateparamsrequestbody"></a>

```json
{
  "accounting_field_selections": [],
  "currency": "USD",
  "entity_id": "7b96a1f2-4b86-45f8-943a-f1ca6b5194d4",
  "line_items": [
    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [],
      "description": "my line item",
      "unit_price": 100,
      "unit_quantity": 1
    }
  ],
  "memo": "Purchase order for general software services",
  "net_payment_terms": 30,
  "promise_date": "2024-05-10",
  "purchase_order_number": "PO-1234",
  "remote_id": null,
  "spend_end_date": "2024-05-10",
  "spend_start_date": "2024-05-01",
  "three_way_match_enabled": false,
  "vendor_id": "b901afe8-46d7-4f30-b7b5-3c8af127e5a0"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiCreateAccountingFieldParamsRequestBody](#schemaapicreateaccountingfieldparamsrequestbody)]|false|none|List of accounting field options selected to code the purchase order. Generally, only a single vendor accounting field is supported.|
|currency|string|true|none|Currency of the purchase order.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of associated business entity.|
|line_items|[[ApiPurchaseOrderLineItemCreateParamsRequestBody](#schemaapipurchaseorderlineitemcreateparamsrequestbody)]|true|none|List of purchase order line items.|
|memo|string¦null|false|none|Memo for the purchase order.|
|net_payment_terms|integer¦null|false|none|The required time an invoice needs to be paid after receipt in days.|
|promise_date|string(date)¦null|false|none|The date the vendor will deliver the goods or services.|
|purchase_order_number|string¦null|false|none|Unique purchase order number with format <prefix>-<number>. Prefixes must only contain numbers, uppercase letters, and dashes. Invalid characters will be filtered out automatically. If not provided, one will be auto-generated using a prefix specified in procurement settings, if it exists.|
|spend_end_date|string(date)¦null|false|none|The date when spending for this purchase order ends.|
|spend_start_date|string(date)¦null|false|none|The date when spending for this purchase order begins.|
|three_way_match_enabled|boolean|true|none|Whether three-way match is enabled for the purchase order. I.e. whether an item receipt will be attached to indicate goods were received.|
|vendor_id|string(uuid)¦null|false|none|Unique identifier for the vendor.|

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiAccountingFieldSelection](#schemaapiaccountingfieldselection)]|true|read-only|List of accounting field options selected to code the purchase order.|
|amount|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|read-only|Amount of the purchse order.|
|archived_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|none|
|bill_ids|[string]|true|read-only|List of unique identifiers for attached bills.|
|billing_status|string¦null|false|read-only|none|
|created_at|string(date-time)|true|none|none|
|creation_source|string|true|none|none|
|custom_form_collection_response|[ApiCustomFormCollectionResponse](#schemaapicustomformcollectionresponse)¦null|true|read-only|Custom form collection with an associated response log entry.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Associated business entity.|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|none|
|item_receipt_ids|[string]|true|read-only|List of unique identifiers for item receipts matched to the purchase order.|
|line_items|[[ApiPurchaseOrderLineItem](#schemaapipurchaseorderlineitem)]|true|none|List of line items on the purchase order.|
|memo|string¦null|true|none|Memo of the purchase order.|
|name|string¦null|true|none|The name of the spend request associated with the purchase order.|
|net_payment_terms|integer¦null|true|none|The required time an invoice needs to be paid after receipt.|
|owner_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier for the owner of the spend request. This value will only be present for Ramp-created purchase orders.|
|promise_date|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|The date the vendor will deliver the goods or services.|
|purchase_order_number|string¦null|true|none|none|
|receipt_status|string|true|none|none|
|remote_id|string¦null|true|read-only|The accounting remote identifier of the purchase order.|
|spend_end_date|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|The date when spending for this purchase order ends.|
|spend_program_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier for the spend program associated with the purchase order. This value will only be null for purchase orders imported from an accounting provider.|
|spend_request_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier for the spend request associated with the purchase order. This value will only be null for purchase orders imported from an accounting provider.|
|spend_start_date|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|The date when spending for this purchase order begins.|
|spend_total_amount|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)¦null|true|read-only|Total amount of the purchase order, calculated based on frequency and date range for recurring purchases.|
|three_way_match_enabled|boolean|true|read-only|Whether three-way match is enabled for the purchase order.|
|transaction_ids|[string]|true|read-only|List of unique identifiers for attached transactions. This does not include transactions on attached bills.|
|user_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier for the user who created the spend request. This value will only be present for Ramp-created purchase orders.|
|vendor_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|read-only|Unique identifier for the vendor.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|billing_status|CLOSED|
|billing_status|DELETED|
|billing_status|FULLY_BILLED|
|billing_status|OPEN|
|billing_status|PARTIALLY_BILLED|
|creation_source|ACCOUNTING_PROVIDER|
|creation_source|DEVELOPER_API|
|creation_source|RAMP|
|receipt_status|FULLY_RECEIVED|
|receipt_status|NOT_RECEIVED|
|receipt_status|OVER_RECEIVED|
|receipt_status|PARTIALLY_RECEIVED|

```json
{
  "accounting_field_selections": [
    {
      "field_external_id": "dept_field_123",
      "field_option_external_id": "engineering_dept_456"
    }
  ],
  "spend_end_date": "2025-05-18",
  "spend_start_date": "2025-05-12"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiCreateAccountingFieldParamsRequestBody](#schemaapicreateaccountingfieldparamsrequestbody)]|false|none|List of accounting field options selected to code the purchase order at the body level. Will be updated in an 'all or nothing' manner. Generally, only a single vendor accounting field is supported.|
|spend_end_date|string(date)|false|none|The date when spending for this purchase order ends.|
|spend_start_date|string(date)|false|none|The date when spending for this purchase order begins.|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiSpendLimitCreateRequestBody">ApiSpendLimitCreateRequestBody</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapispendlimitcreaterequestbody"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiSpendLimitCreateRequestBody"></a>
<a id="tocSapispendlimitcreaterequestbody"></a>
<a id="tocsapispendlimitcreaterequestbody"></a>

```json
{
  "accounting_rules": [
    {
      "field_id": "3f30896b-cd22-47af-b48a-c6c3068bc780",
      "field_option_id": "d062e221-9c95-47b5-8dc6-d6c881693caf"
    }
  ],
  "display_name": "T&E",
  "idempotency_key": "3a5b1f62-988f-4190-bf31-b7ae87c5df42",
  "is_shareable": false,
  "permitted_spend_types": {
    "primary_card_enabled": false,
    "reimbursements_enabled": false
  },
  "spending_restrictions": {
    "allowed_categories": [
      18,
      20
    ],
    "auto_lock_date": null,
    "interval": "MONTHLY",
    "limit": {
      "amount": 500000,
      "currency_code": "USD"
    },
    "transaction_amount_limit": {
      "amount": 10000,
      "currency_code": "USD"
    }
  },
  "user_id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_rules|[[SpendLimitAccountingRulesDataRequestBody](#schemaspendlimitaccountingrulesdatarequestbody)]|false|none|Set accounting rules for Spend Limit|
|display_name|string|false|none|Cosmetic display name of the limit.|
|idempotency_key|string|true|none|An idempotency key is a unique value generated by the client which the server uses to recognize subsequent retries of the same request. To avoid collisions, we encourage clients to use random generated UUIDs.|
|is_shareable|boolean|false|none|Dictates whether the spend limit is shareable among multiple users.|
|permitted_spend_types|[ApiPermittedSpendTypesRequestBody](#schemaapipermittedspendtypesrequestbody)|false|none|Specifies the permitted spend types.|
|spend_program_id|string(uuid)|false|none|The id of the associated spend program.|
|spending_restrictions|[ApiSpendingRestrictionsRequestBody](#schemaapispendingrestrictionsrequestbody)|false|none|Specifies the spending restrictions. If spend_program_id is passed, this field is ignored and the limit will inherit the spending restrictions of the spend program.|
|user_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the limit owner.|

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|

|custom_form_collection_response|[ApiCustomFormCollectionResponse](#schemaapicustomformcollectionresponse)¦null|true|read-only|Custom form collection with an associated response log entry.|
|display_name|string|true|none|Display name of the limit and all linked cards.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Associated business entity of the limit.|
|has_program_overridden|boolean|true|none|Indicates if the limit's settings override those of its Spend Program.|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the limit.|
|is_exempt_from_policy_agent|boolean|true|none|Whether this limit should be exempt from the policy agent.|
|is_shareable|boolean|true|none|Whether this spend limit is shareable.|
|permitted_spend_types|[ApiPermittedSpendTypesDump](#schemaapipermittedspendtypesdump)|true|none|Specifies the permitted spend types of the limit.|
|restrictions|[ApiSpendingRestrictionsDump](#schemaapispendingrestrictionsdump)¦null|true|none|Restrictions imposed on this limit.|
|spend_program_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier of the associated Spend Program.|
|state|string|true|none|Current state of the limit.|
|suspension|[ApiSuspensionDump](#schemaapisuspensiondump)¦null|true|none|Suspension (lock) on the limit.|
|users|[[ApiSpendLimitMember](#schemaapispendlimitmember)]|true|none|Members who can spend from the limit.|

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|state|ACTIVE|
|state|SUSPENDED|
|state|TERMINATED|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiSpendLimitUpdateRequestBody">ApiSpendLimitUpdateRequestBody</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapispendlimitupdaterequestbody"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiSpendLimitUpdateRequestBody"></a>
<a id="tocSapispendlimitupdaterequestbody"></a>
<a id="tocsapispendlimitupdaterequestbody"></a>

```json
{
  "accounting_rules": [
    {
      "field_id": "3f30896b-cd22-47af-b48a-c6c3068bc780",
      "field_option_id": "d062e221-9c95-47b5-8dc6-d6c881693caf"
    }
  ],
  "display_name": "New Display Name",
  "existing_expense_policy_agent_exemption_application_rules": "APPLY_TO_ALL",
  "is_exempt_from_policy_agent": true,
  "is_shareable": true,
  "new_user_id": "b9627abf-6b7e-47bc-a475-7493a8fa9cb4",
  "permitted_spend_types": {
    "primary_card_enabled": false,
    "reimbursements_enabled": true
  },
  "spending_restrictions": {
    "amount": 500,
    "interval": "DAILY"
  }
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_rules|[[SpendLimitAccountingRulesDataRequestBody](#schemaspendlimitaccountingrulesdatarequestbody)]|false|none|Set accounting rules for all card transactions and reimbursements (if applicable) for the given spend limit|
|display_name|string|false|none|Change the display name of the limit|
|existing_expense_policy_agent_exemption_application_rules|string¦null|false|none|Controls how the policy agent exemption applies to existing transactions. APPLY_TO_ALL retroactively exempts all existing transactions. APPLY_TO_NONE only exempts future transactions. Only relevant when is_exempt_from_policy_agent is true.|
|is_exempt_from_policy_agent|boolean|false|none|Whether this limit is exempt from the policy agent. When true, the policy agent will not review transactions against this limit.|
|is_shareable|boolean|false|none|Dictates whether the spend limit is shareable among multiple users.|
|new_user_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Change the user of the limit|
|permitted_spend_types|[ApiPermittedSpendTypesRequestBody](#schemaapipermittedspendtypesrequestbody)|false|none|Modify permitted spend types. All fields of permitted_spend_types must be given.|
|spend_program_id|string(uuid)¦null|false|none|Specify a spend program to link with.<br>            This will override the limit's spending restrictions and permitted spend types with those of the spend program.<br>            Pass spend_program_id = None to detach the limit's current spend program.<br>            If the spend_program_id field is specified, no other fields may be passed.|
|spending_restrictions|[ApiSpendingRestrictionsUpdateRequestBody](#schemaapispendingrestrictionsupdaterequestbody)|false|none|Modify spending restrictions. If this field is passed, the entire set of new spending restrictions must be passed (i.e. the given spending restrictions will override all existing spending restrictions).|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|existing_expense_policy_agent_exemption_application_rules|APPLY_TO_ALL|
|existing_expense_policy_agent_exemption_application_rules|APPLY_TO_NONE|

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|description|string|true|none|Description of the spend program.|
|display_name|string|true|none|Display name of the spend program.|
|icon|string|true|none|The template icon for the spend program.|
|is_shareable|boolean|false|none|Dictates whether the spend program is shareable among multiple users.|
|issuance_rules|[ApiSpendProgramCreateIssuanceRulesRequestBody](#schemaapispendprogramcreateissuancerulesrequestbody)¦null|false|none|Spend Program Issuance Rules can be set for requests or default issuance of Limits from a program. Set whether a program is requestable or issued by default for a given set of users and their attributes (department, locations, and custom fields). If you'd like to give these permissions to all employees, you can set `applies_to_all` to `True`. Feel free to ignore this if you don't want any custom requestability or issuance logic.|
|issue_physical_card_if_needed|boolean|false|none|Dictates whether the spend program should issue a physical card if the user does not have one.|
|permitted_spend_types|[ApiPermittedSpendTypesRequestBody](#schemaapipermittedspendtypesrequestbody)|true|none|Specifies the permitted spend types for the spend program.|
|spending_restrictions|[ApiSpendingRestrictionsRequestBody](#schemaapispendingrestrictionsrequestbody)|true|none|A set of restrictions imposed on the spend program.|

```json
{
  "applies_to_all": false,
  "department_ids": [
    "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
  ],

    "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|applies_to_all|boolean|false|none|Dictates whether this rule should apply to all employees or not (if True, location_ids, department_ids, and user_custom_field_ids should be null).|
|department_ids|[string]|false|none|List of departments whose users are able to request or be issued this spend program.|
|location_ids|[string]|false|none|List of locations whose users are able to request or be issued this spend program.|
|user_custom_field_ids|[string]|false|none|none|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiSpendProgramResource">ApiSpendProgramResource</h2>

```json
{
  "description": "Offer a yearly stipend for conferences and courses.",
  "display_name": "Education Stipend",
  "icon": "EducationStipendIcon",
  "id": "796dab75-a23f-4e2a-984e-20da003c38ef",
  "is_shareable": true,
  "issue_physical_card_if_needed": false,
  "permitted_spend_types": {
    "primary_card_enabled": true,
    "reimbursements_enabled": true
  },
  "restrictions": {
    "allowed_categories": [
      33
    ],
    "allowed_vendors": [],
    "auto_lock_date": "2025-10-28T00:00:00+00:00",
    "blocked_categories": [],
    "blocked_vendors": [],
    "interval": "YEARLY",
    "limit": {
      "amount": 75000,
      "currency_code": "USD"
    },
    "next_interval_reset": "2024-01-01T00:00:00+00:00",
    "start_of_interval": "2023-01-01T00:00:00+00:00",
    "temporary_limit": null,
    "transaction_amount_limit": null
  }
}

```

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|description|string|true|none|Description of the spend program.|
|display_name|string|true|none|Display name of the spend program.|
|icon|string|true|none|The template icon for the spend program.|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the spend program.|
|is_shareable|boolean|true|none|Whether this spend program is shareable.|
|issue_physical_card_if_needed|boolean|true|none|Indicates whether the spend program should issue a physical card if the user does not have one.|
|permitted_spend_types|[ApiPermittedSpendTypesDump](#schemaapipermittedspendtypesdump)¦null|true|none|Permitted spend types for the spend program.|
|restrictions|[SpendIntentApiSpendingRestrictionsDump](#schemaspendintentapispendingrestrictionsdump)¦null|true|none|A set of restrictions imposed on the spend program.|

```json
{
  "allowed_categories": [
    1
  ],
  "allowed_vendors": [
    "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
  ],
  "auto_lock_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "blocked_categories": [
    1
  ],
  "blocked_vendors": [
    "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
  ],
  "interval": "ANNUAL",
  "limit": {
    "amount": 0,
    "currency_code": "USD",
    "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 0
  },
  "next_interval_reset": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "start_of_interval": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "temporary_limit": {
    "amount": 0,
    "currency_code": "USD",
    "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 0
  },
  "transaction_amount_limit": {
    "amount": 0,
    "currency_code": "USD",
    "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 0
  }
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|allowed_categories|[integer]|true|none|List of Ramp category codes allowed for the limit.|
|allowed_vendors|[string]|true|none|List of merchants allowed for the limit.|
|auto_lock_date|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Date to automatically to lock the limit.|
|blocked_categories|[integer]|true|none|List of Ramp category codes blocked for the limit.|
|blocked_vendors|[string]|true|none|List of merchants  blocked for the limit.|
|interval|string|false|none|Time interval the limit is applied on.|
|limit|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)¦null|true|read-only|Amount limit total per interval denominated in cents. Currency is USD.|
|next_interval_reset|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Date and time for the next interval reset.|
|start_of_interval|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Date and time for the start of the current interval.|
|temporary_limit|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)¦null|true|read-only|Temporary limit total per interval.|
|transaction_amount_limit|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)¦null|true|read-only|Max amount allowed on a single transaction.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|interval|ANNUAL|
|interval|DAILY|
|interval|MONTHLY|
|interval|QUARTERLY|
|interval|TERTIARY|
|interval|TOTAL|
|interval|WEEKLY|
|interval|YEARLY|

```json
    1
  ],
  "allowed_vendors": [
    "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
  ],
  "blocked_categories": [
    1
  ],
  "blocked_mcc_codes": [
    "string"
  ],
  "blocked_vendors": [
    "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
  ],
  "interval": "ANNUAL",
  "limit": {
    "amount": 0,
    "currency_code": "USD"
  },
  "lock_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "transaction_amount_limit": {
    "amount": 0,
    "currency_code": "USD"
  }
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|allowed_categories|[integer]|false|none|List of Ramp category codes allowed for the limit.|
|allowed_vendors|[string]|false|none|List of merchants allowed for the limit.|
|blocked_categories|[integer]|false|none|List of Ramp category codes blocked for the limit.|
|blocked_mcc_codes|[string]|false|none|none|
|blocked_vendors|[string]|false|none|List of merchants  blocked for the limit.|
|interval|string|true|none|Time interval to apply limit to.|
|limit|[CurrencyAmountRequestBody](#schemacurrencyamountrequestbody)|true|none|Total amount limit per interval. Currently we expect the currency to be USD and the amount need to be denominated in cents.|
|lock_date|string(date-time)|false|none|Date to automatically lock the card. If lock date has passed, set to a future date or to null to unlock the card.|
|transaction_amount_limit|[CurrencyAmountRequestBody](#schemacurrencyamountrequestbody)|false|none|Max amount per transaction. Currently we expect the currency to be USD and the amount need to be denominated in cents.|

|Property|Value|

|interval|DAILY|
|interval|MONTHLY|
|interval|QUARTERLY|
|interval|TERTIARY|
|interval|TOTAL|
|interval|WEEKLY|
|interval|YEARLY|

```json
  }
```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|allowed_categories|[integer]|false|none|List of Ramp category codes allowed for the limit.|
|allowed_vendors|[string]|false|none|List of merchants allowed for the limit.|
|blocked_categories|[integer]|false|none|List of Ramp category codes blocked for the limit.|
|blocked_mcc_codes|[string]|false|none|none|
|blocked_vendors|[string]|false|none|List of merchants  blocked for the limit.|
|interval|string|true|none|Time interval to apply limit to.|
|is_one_time_edit|boolean|false|none|Dictates whether the spend restriction update is only applicable for the current period. Set to true for a temporary limit increase. Default is false.|
|limit|[CurrencyAmountRequestBody](#schemacurrencyamountrequestbody)|true|none|Total amount limit per interval. Currently we expect the currency to be USD and the amount need to be denominated in cents.|
|lock_date|string(date-time)|false|none|Date to automatically lock the card. If lock date has passed, set to a future date or to null to unlock the card.|
|transaction_amount_limit|[CurrencyAmountRequestBody](#schemacurrencyamountrequestbody)|false|none|Max amount per transaction. Currently we expect the currency to be USD and the amount need to be denominated in cents.|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiTransactionDispute">ApiTransactionDispute</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapitransactiondispute"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiTransactionDispute"></a>

<a id="tocsapitransactiondispute"></a>

```json
{
  "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
  "memo": "string",
  "type": "string"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|created_at|string(date-time)|false|none|Time at which the dispute is created, presented in ISO8601 format.|
|id|string(uuid)|false|none|Uniquely identifies a transaction dispute.|
|memo|string|false|none|Free form text regarding the dispute.|
|type|string|false|none|The dispute type; It could be one of the following values: RESOLVED_BY_RAMP, CANCELLED_BY_CUSTOMER, CANCELLED_BY_RAMP, CREATED_MERCHANT_ERROR and CREATED_UNRECOGNIZED_CHARGE.|

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiCreateAccountingFieldParamsRequestBody](#schemaapicreateaccountingfieldparamsrequestbody)]|false|none|List of accounting field options selected to code the bill.|
|due_at|string(date)|false|none|Due date of the bill.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Associated business entity.|
|inventory_line_items|[[ApiCreateBillInventoryLineItemParamsRequestBody](#schemaapicreatebillinventorylineitemparamsrequestbody)]¦null|false|none|List of inventory line items associated with the bill. When provided, this will replace all existing inventory line items.|

|issued_at|string(date)|false|none|Issued date of the bill.|
|line_items|[[ApiCreateBillLineItemParamsRequestBody](#schemaapicreatebilllineitemparamsrequestbody)]¦null|false|none|List of line items related to the bill. When provided, this will replace all existing line items.|
|memo|string¦null|false|none|Memo of the bill.|
|payment_method|string|false|none|Payment method of the bill.|
|posting_date|string(date)¦null|false|none|The date the bill is posted to the accounting system.|
|purchase_order_ids|[string]|false|none|Unique identifiers of the purchase orders to match this bill to. When provided, this will replace all existing linked purchase orders.|
|remote_id|string¦null|false|none|An ID that identifies the bill on client's side.|
|vendor_contact_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of vendor contact, must be associated with passed vendor.|
|vendor_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of bill vendor.|

|payment_method|SWIFT|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiUpdatePurchaseOrderLineItemParamsRequestBody">ApiUpdatePurchaseOrderLineItemParamsRequestBody</h2>

<a id="schema_ApiUpdatePurchaseOrderLineItemParamsRequestBody"></a>

<a id="tocsapiupdatepurchaseorderlineitemparamsrequestbody"></a>

```json
{
  "accounting_field_selections": [],
  "description": "updated line item description",
  "unit_price": 150,
  "unit_quantity": 3
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiCreateAccountingFieldParamsRequestBody](#schemaapicreateaccountingfieldparamsrequestbody)]|false|none|List of accounting field options selected to code the line item. Will be updated in an 'all or nothing' manner.|
|description|string¦null|false|none|Description of the line item.|
|unit_price|any|false|none|Unit price of the line item.|

oneOf

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|» *anonymous*|string(decimal)|false|none|none|

xor

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|» *anonymous*|number|false|none|none|

continued

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|unit_quantity|integer|false|none|Quantity of the line item.|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiUserCreateRequestBody">ApiUserCreateRequestBody</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapiusercreaterequestbody"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiUserCreateRequestBody"></a>
<a id="tocSapiusercreaterequestbody"></a>
<a id="tocsapiusercreaterequestbody"></a>

```json
{
  "department_id": "2d68eb67-f6eb-4284-8683-7d530c77a5a6",
  "direct_manager_id": "ccc5d4cc-337f-49a5-86b3-5df128233f2c",
  "email": "cardholder_7@company.com",
  "first_name": "Linda",
  "idempotency_key": "d471d830-2e73-4082-8a75-68540f83e86e",
  "is_manager": false,
  "last_name": "Gu",
  "location_id": "f4efe11c-221f-4b49-a1e4-33eaf96a49ee",
  "role": "BUSINESS_USER"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|department_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of the employee's department|
|direct_manager_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of the employee's direct manager|
|email|string(email)|true|none|The employee's email address|
|first_name|string|true|none|First name of the employee|
|idempotency_key|string|true|none|an idempotency key is a unique value generated by the client which the server uses to recognize subsequent retries of the same request. To avoid collisions, we encourage clients to use random generated UUIDs.|
|is_manager|boolean|false|none|Whether the employee is a manager|
|last_name|string|true|none|Last name of the employee|
|location_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of the employee's location|
|role|string|true|none|The employee's role; It could be one of the following values: Admin, Cardholder, Bookkeeper; Note that Owner is not a invitable role.|
|scheduled_deactivation_date|string(date)¦null|false|none|The date when the user is scheduled to be deactivated. For guest users, this will automatically be set to 6 months from the invite creation date unless explicitly set to null. Cannot be set for admins or owners.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|role|AUDITOR|
|role|BUSINESS_ADMIN|
|role|BUSINESS_BOOKKEEPER|
|role|BUSINESS_OWNER|
|role|BUSINESS_USER|
|role|GUEST_USER|
|role|IT_ADMIN|

<h2 id="tocS_ApiVendorCreateRequestBody">ApiVendorCreateRequestBody</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemaapivendorcreaterequestbody"></a>
<a id="schema_ApiVendorCreateRequestBody"></a>
<a id="tocSapivendorcreaterequestbody"></a>
<a id="tocsapivendorcreaterequestbody"></a>

```json
{
  "business_vendor_contacts": {
    "email": "vendor@ramp.com",
    "first_name": "John",
    "last_name": "Doe",
    "phone": "+13525342357"
  },
  "country": "US",
  "external_vendor_id": "EXT-12345",
  "name": "Ramp",
  "request_payment_details": true,
  "request_tax_details": true,
  "state": "NY",
  "vendor_owner_id": "6b864472-294e-4fc9-91ab-158d684c8886",
  "vendor_tracking_category_option_id": "60a1a5c9-9b2d-4658-9024-cc4baebf819a"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_vendor_remote_id|string|false|none|The accounting remote id of the vendor. At most one of `accounting_vendor_remote_id` or `vendor_tracking_category_option_id` should be provided.|
|address|[ApiVendorAddressCreateRequestBody](#schemaapivendoraddresscreaterequestbody)|false|none|The address of the vendor.|
|business_vendor_contacts|[ApiDefaultBusinessVendorResourceRequestBody](#schemaapidefaultbusinessvendorresourcerequestbody)|true|none|Detailed information about the vendor contact.|
|country|string|true|none|The country of the vendor.|
|external_vendor_id|string¦null|false|none|Customer-defined external identifier for the vendor. This is independent of accounting system remote IDs.|
|name|string|false|none|Name of the new vendor to be created.|
|request_payment_details|boolean|false|none|Whether to request payment details from the vendor (ACH bank account, international wire transfer, and check mailing address). Requires a contact email.|
|request_tax_details|boolean|false|none|Whether to request tax information from the vendor (Tax Identification Number, federal tax classification, and tax address). Requires a contact email.|
|state|string¦null|false|none|The state if country is US. Note that this field is ignored for non-US countries.|
|vendor_owner_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the user that will own this vendor.|
|vendor_tracking_category_option_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Ramp unique identifier of the accounting vendor to link to this vendor. At most one of `accounting_vendor_remote_id` or `vendor_tracking_category_option_id` should be provided.|
