<a id="schema_Bill"></a>
<a id="tocSbill"></a>
<a id="tocsbill"></a>

```json
{
  "accounting_date": "2024-05-12T00:00:00+00:00",
  "accounting_field_selections": [],
  "accounting_sync_date": "2024-05-12T00:00:00+00:00",
  "amount": {
    "amount": 96993,
    "currency_code": "USD"
  },
  "bill_owner": {
    "first_name": "John",
    "id": "96bb7007-eec5-430f-8d09-e033cbc000c2",
    "last_name": "Doe"
  },
  "created_at": "2024-05-12T01:37:27+00:00",
  "deep_link_url": null,
  "due_at": "2022-12-31T00:00:00+00:00",
  "enable_accounting_sync": true,
  "entity_id": "5bcc3734-f03a-4756-bc4b-afeb52d738ad",
  "fx_conversion_rate": "1.0",
  "id": "6e3816e3-0e53-42ae-b075-bdb0adff10c4",
  "inventory_line_items": [
    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [
        {
          "category_info": {
            "external_id": "Category",
            "id": "0c0d0bcc-8716-4e05-a651-4ad5e64d2b3e",
            "name": "Category",
            "type": "GL_ACCOUNT"
          },
          "external_id": "426",
          "id": "07b4ce4d-2750-412e-aef4-6b7815f1411a",
          "name": "Ramp Category",
          "type": "Subsidiary"
        }
      ],
      "amount": {
        "amount": 25000,
        "currency_code": "USD"
      },
      "memo": "Staplers.",
      "quantity": 5,
      "unit_price": {
        "amount": 5000,
        "currency_code": "USD"
      }
    }
  ],
  "invoice_number": "432",
  "invoice_urls": [
    "https://receipts.ramp.com/some-url"
  ],
  "issued_at": "2022-12-31T00:00:00+00:00",
  "line_items": [
    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [],
      "amount": {
        "amount": 1998,
        "currency_code": "USD"
      },
      "memo": "Telephone Headset"
    },
    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [],
      "amount": {
        "amount": 94995,
        "currency_code": "USD"
      },
      "memo": "2-Drawer Lateral File Cabinet Steel White"
    }
  ],
  "memo": "Office Supplies",
  "paid_at": "2024-05-15T14:02:28.298Z",
  "payment": {
    "amount": {
      "amount": 96993,
      "currency_code": "USD"
    },
    "effective_date": "2024-05-13T00:00:00+00:00",
    "payment_date": "2024-05-13T00:00:00+00:00",
    "payment_method": "ACH",
    "trace_id": {
      "descriptor": "ACH Trace ID",
      "trace_id": "076921900257224"
    }
  },
  "posting_date": "2024-05-12T00:00:00+00:00",
  "remote_id": null,
  "status": "OPEN",
  "status_summary": "PAYMENT_SCHEDULED",
  "sync_status": "NOT_SYNCED",
  "vendor": {
    "remote_code": "AMZON12",
    "remote_id": "Amazon",
    "remote_name": "Amazon",
    "type": "BUSINESS"
  },
  "vendor_contact_id": "ef825336-820e-4dd5-9d7f-0fc508e978c9",
  "vendor_memo": "Invoice #432 - July 2020"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_date|string(date-time)|true|read-only|The date for the bill for accounting purposes. If not specified, falls back to the bill issue date.|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiAccountingFieldSelection](#schemaapiaccountingfieldselection)]|true|none|List of accounting field options selected to code the bill.|
|amount|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|read-only|Amount of the bill, represented in the lowest denomination of the currency (e.g., cents for USD).|
|applied_vendor_credits|[[BillAppliedVendorCredit](#schemabillappliedvendorcredit)]|true|read-only|Vendor Credits that have been applied to this Bill|
|approval_status|string¦null|true|none|Approval status of the bill. Note that this is separate from the approval status for payment release.|
|archived_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|The datetime the bill was archived.|
|bill_owner|[ApiBillOwner](#schemaapibillowner)|true|none|Information about the bill owner.|
|created_at|string(date-time)|true|none|none|
|deep_link_url|string|false|none|Link to bill in ERP, if exists.|
|draft_bill_created_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|The date the draft bill was created if this bill was created from a draft bill, otherwise None.|
|due_at|string(date-time)|true|none|none|
|enable_accounting_sync|boolean|false|none|Flag specifying whether the bill should sync to the ERP|
|entity_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Associated business entity.|
|fx_conversion_rate|string(decimal)|true|read-only|FX conversion rate from bill invoice currency to payer currency.|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|none|
|inventory_line_items|[[ApiBillInventoryLineItem](#schemaapibillinventorylineitem)]|true|none|List of inventory line items related to the bill.|
|invoice_number|string|false|none|The invoice number on the bill.|
|invoice_urls|[string]|true|read-only|Pre-signed urls to download invoice files.|
|issued_at|string(date-time)|true|none|The date the bill was issued on invoice.|
|item_receipt_ids|[string]|true|read-only|List of unique identifiers for item receipts associated with this bill through matched purchase orders.|
|line_items|[[ApiBillLineItem](#schemaapibilllineitem)]|true|none|List of line items related to the bill.|
|memo|string|false|none|Memo of the bill.|
|paid_at|string(date-time)|false|none|The datetime the bill's payment status is set to PAID. None if the bill's payment status is OPEN|
|payment|[ApiBillPayment](#schemaapibillpayment)¦null|true|none|Payment information of the bill.|
|posting_date|string(date-time)|false|none|The date the bill was posted to the ERP. Alternatively known as accounting date, accounting sync date.|
|purchase_order_id|string(uuid)|false|read-only|Unique identifier of matched purchase order, if one exists.|
|remote_id|string|false|none|The external ID that identifies the bill on client's side.|
|status|string|true|none|none|
|status_summary|string|true|read-only|Status summary of the bill.|
|sync_status|string|true|read-only|Sync status of the bill.|
|vendor|[ApiBillVendor](#schemaapibillvendor)|true|none|Vendor information of the bill.|
|vendor_contact_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier of associated vendor contact.|
|vendor_memo|string|false|none|Memo to the vendor.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|approval_status|APPROVED|
|approval_status|INITIALIZED|
|approval_status|PENDING|
|approval_status|REJECTED|
|approval_status|TERMINATED|
|status|OPEN|
|status|PAID|
|status_summary|APPROVAL_PENDING|
|status_summary|APPROVAL_REJECTED|
|status_summary|ARCHIVED|
|status_summary|AWAITING_RELEASE|
|status_summary|BLOCKED|
|status_summary|HELD_BY_PROVIDER|
|status_summary|PAYMENT_COMPLETED|
|status_summary|PAYMENT_DETAILS_MISSING|
|status_summary|PAYMENT_ERROR|
|status_summary|PAYMENT_NOT_INSTRUCTED|
|status_summary|PAYMENT_PROCESSING|
|status_summary|PAYMENT_READY|
|status_summary|PAYMENT_SCHEDULED|
|status_summary|PENDING_VENDOR_APPROVAL|
|status_summary|WAITING_FOR_TRANSACTION_MATCH|
|status_summary|WAITING_FOR_VENDOR|
|sync_status|BILL_AND_PAYMENT_SYNCED|
|sync_status|BILL_SYNCED|
|sync_status|NOT_SYNCED|

<h2 id="tocS_Business">Business</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemabusiness"></a>
<a id="schema_Business"></a>
<a id="tocSbusiness"></a>
<a id="tocsbusiness"></a>

```json
{
  "active": true,
  "billing_address": {
    "address1": "123 Main St",
    "city": "New York City",
    "country": "US",
    "postal_code": "10003",
    "state": "NY"
  },
  "business_name_legal": "Sushi Luncheonette",
  "business_name_on_card": "Sushi Luncheonette",
  "created_time": "2022-08-20T16:54:29+00:00",
  "enforce_sso": false,
  "id": "9abffcf0-dd7d-42f0-b806-ce0502ab6496",
  "initial_approved_limit": 2000000,
  "is_integrated_with_slack": false,
  "limit_locked": false,
  "phone": "8014441234",
  "website": "www.ramp.com"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|active|boolean|false|none|Whether the business account is active.|
|billing_address|object|false|none|Billing address of the business.|
|business_name_legal|string|false|none|Legal name of the business entity.|
|business_name_on_card|string|false|none|Business name that appears on issued cards.|
|created_time|string(date-time)|false|none|When the business account was created.|
|enforce_sso|boolean|false|none|Whether single sign-on is enforced for the business.|
|id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier for the business.|
|initial_approved_limit|integer|false|none|Initial credit limit approved for the business.|
|is_integrated_with_slack|boolean|false|none|Whether the business has integrated with Slack.|
|is_reimbursements_enabled|boolean|true|none|Whether reimbursements feature is enabled for the business.|
|limit_locked|boolean|false|none|Whether the credit limit is locked and cannot be modified.|
|phone|string|false|none|Primary contact phone number for the business.|
|website|string|false|none|Company website URL.|

<a id="schema_BusinessBalance"></a>
<a id="tocSbusinessbalance"></a>
<a id="tocsbusinessbalance"></a>

```json
{
  "available_card_limit": 2000000,
  "available_flex_limit": 0,
  "balance_including_pending": 6271.22,
  "card_balance_excluding_pending": 4941.29,
  "card_balance_including_pending": 6271.22,
  "card_limit": 2000000,
  "flex_balance": 0,
  "flex_limit": 0,
  "float_balance_excluding_pending": 0,
  "global_limit": 2000000,
  "max_balance": 2000000,
  "next_billing_date": "09/17/2022",
  "prev_billing_date": "08/21/2022",
  "statement_balance": 4941.29
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|available_card_limit|number|false|none|Remaining available card spending limit.|
|available_flex_limit|number|false|none|Remaining available flex spending limit.|
|balance_including_pending|number|false|none|Total balance including pending transactions.|
|card_balance_excluding_pending|number|false|none|Current card balance excluding pending transactions.|
|card_balance_including_pending|number|false|none|Current card balance including pending transactions.|
|card_limit|number|false|none|Maximum allowed card spending limit.|
|flex_balance|number|false|none|Current balance of flex spending.|
|flex_limit|number|false|none|Maximum allowed flex spending limit.|
|float_balance_excluding_pending|number|false|none|Float account balance excluding pending transactions.|
|global_limit|number|false|none|Overall spending limit for the business.|
|max_balance|number|false|none|Maximum balance allowed for the business.|
|next_billing_date|string|false|none|Date of the next billing cycle.|
|prev_billing_date|string|false|none|Date of the previous billing cycle.|
|statement_balance|number|false|none|Balance from the most recent statement.|

<h2 id="tocS_Card">Card</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemacard"></a>
<a id="schema_Card"></a>
<a id="tocScard"></a>
<a id="tocscard"></a>

```json
{
  "card_program_id": null,
  "cardholder_id": "3a5b1f62-988f-4190-bf31-b7ae87c5df42",
  "cardholder_name": "Julie Phillip",
  "created_at": "2022-05-04T00:00:00+00:00",
  "display_name": "T&E",
  "entity_id": "c6c61be9-f278-47bc-a814-f98a7fc2dfdc",
  "expiration": "0227",
  "fulfillment": {
    "fulfillment_status": "ISSUED",
    "shipping": {
      "recipient_address": {
        "address1": "123 Main St",
        "city": "New York City",
        "country": "US",
        "first_name": "Julie",
        "last_name": "Phillip",
        "postal_code": "10003",
        "state": "NY"
      }
    },
    "shipping_date": null,
    "shipping_eta": null,
    "shipping_tracking_url": null
  },
  "has_program_overridden": false,
  "id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731",
  "is_physical": false,
  "last_four": "3751",
  "spending_restrictions": {
    "amount": 5000,
    "auto_lock_date": null,
    "blocked_categories": [],
    "categories": [],
    "interval": "MONTHLY",
    "suspended": false,
    "transaction_amount_limit": null
  },
  "state": "ACTIVE"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|card_program_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier of the card program.|
|cardholder_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of the card holder.|
|cardholder_name|string|false|none|Card holder's full name.|
|created_at|string(date-time)|false|none|Date time at which the card is created. It conforms to ISO8601 format|
|display_name|string|true|read-only|Cosmetic display name of the card.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of the associated business entity.|
|expiration|string|true|read-only|Expiration date in the format of MMYY.|
|fulfillment|[ApiCardFulfillment](#schemaapicardfulfillment)¦null|true|read-only|Fulfillment details of a Ramp card. For physical cards only.|
|has_program_overridden|boolean|true|read-only|Whether the card has overridden the default settings from its card program.|
|id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of the card.|
|is_physical|boolean|false|none|none|
|last_four|string|true|read-only|Last four digits of the card number.|
|spending_restrictions|[ApiCardSpendingRestrictionsDump](#schemaapicardspendingrestrictionsdump)¦null|true|read-only|Specifies the spend restrictions on a Ramp card.|
|state|string|false|none|State of the card|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|state|ACTIVE|
|state|CHIP_LOCKED|
|state|SUSPENDED|
|state|TERMINATED|
|state|UNACTIVATED|

<h2 id="tocS_CurrencyAmount">CurrencyAmount</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemacurrencyamount"></a>
<a id="schema_CurrencyAmount"></a>
<a id="tocScurrencyamount"></a>
<a id="tocscurrencyamount"></a>

```json
{
  "amount": 0,
  "currency_code": "USD",
  "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 0
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|amount|integer|true|none|the amount of money represented in the smallest denomination of the currency. For example, when the currency is USD, then the amount is expressed in cents.|
|currency_code|string|true|none|The type of currency, in ISO 4217 format. e.g. USD for US dollars|
|minor_unit_conversion_rate|integer¦null|true|read-only|The conversion factor to convert from the integer amount to the actual currency value. Divide amount by this value to get the real currency amount. For USD, this is 100 (e.g., 12034 / 100 = 120.34 USD). See https://docs.ramp.com/developer-api/v1/monetary-values for more information.|

```json
}
```

|currency_code|string|false|none|The type of currency, in ISO 4217 format. e.g. USD for US dollars|

<h2 id="tocS_CustomFieldOption">CustomFieldOption</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemacustomfieldoption"></a>
<a id="schema_CustomFieldOption"></a>
<a id="tocScustomfieldoption"></a>
<a id="tocscustomfieldoption"></a>

```json
{
  "accounting_connection_id": "e67fef58-33d2-4a16-90c7-6cc071507511",
  "code": "20001",
  "created_at": "2019-08-28T14:15:22+00:00",
  "id": "123",
  "is_active": true,
  "provider_name": "Accounting",
  "ramp_id": "649b6731-33c6-4ff5-8a5d-2333fcc90ace",
  "updated_at": "2020-08-28T14:40:12+00:00",
  "value": "Office/Admin:Phone & Internet"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_connection_id|string(uuid)|true|none|ID of the accounting connection that the custom accounting field option belongs to.|
|code|string|false|none|Code of the custom field option; Usually it is a unique identifier for the custom field option in the remote ERP system.|
|created_at|string(date-time)|false|none|none|
|display_name|string|false|none|Display name of the custom field option.|
|id|string|false|none|Remote/external ID of custom accounting field option from ERP system.|
|is_active|boolean|false|none|none|
|provider_name|string¦null|true|read-only|Name of the accounting connection that the custom accounting field option belongs to.|
|ramp_id|string(uuid)|false|none|id to uniquely identify a custom field option within Ramp system|
|updated_at|string(date-time)|false|none|none|
|value|string|false|none|A vendor is a person or business that provides goods or services|
|visibility|string|false|none|Visibility of the custom field option.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|visibility|HIDDEN|
|visibility|VISIBLE|

<h2 id="tocS_CustomRowDataWithLoadedReferences">CustomRowDataWithLoadedReferences</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemacustomrowdatawithloadedreferences"></a>
<a id="schema_CustomRowDataWithLoadedReferences"></a>
<a id="tocScustomrowdatawithloadedreferences"></a>
<a id="tocscustomrowdatawithloadedreferences"></a>

```json
{
  "cells": [
    {
      "column_display_name": "Country",
      "column_id": "<column_id>",
      "value": {
        "has_more": false,
        "rows": [
          {
            "display_name": "USA",
            "external_key": "USA",
            "row_id": "<row_id>",
            "type": "custom_table"
          }
        ],
        "table_name": "countries",
        "type": "custom_table"
      }
    },
    {
      "column_display_name": "Regional Director",
      "column_id": "<column_id>",
      "value": {
        "has_more": false,
        "rows": [
          {
            "display_name": "John Doe",
            "external_key": "<existing_ramp_user_uuid>",
            "row_id": "<row_id>",
            "type": "native_table"
          }
        ],
        "table_name": "users",
        "type": "native_table"
      }
    },
    {
      "column_display_name": "States",
      "column_id": "<column_id>",
      "value": {
        "has_more": true,
        "rows": [
          {
            "display_name": "Arizona",
            "external_key": "Arizona",
            "row_id": "<row_id>",
            "type": "custom_table"
          },
          {
            "display_name": "California",
            "external_key": "California",
            "row_id": "<row_id>",
            "type": "custom_table"
          },
          {
            "display_name": "New Jersey",
            "external_key": "New Jersey",
            "row_id": "<row_id>",
            "type": "custom_table"
          },
          {
            "display_name": "New York",
            "external_key": "New York",
            "row_id": "<row_id>",
            "type": "custom_table"
          },
          {
            "display_name": "Texas",
            "external_key": "Texas",
            "row_id": "<row_id>",
            "type": "custom_table"
          }
        ],
        "table_name": "states",
        "type": "custom_table"
      }
    }
  ],
  "external_key": "Northeast",
  "id": "<row_id>"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|cells|[[CustomCellOutputWithLoadedReferences](#schemacustomcelloutputwithloadedreferences)]|true|none|The contents of each column for this row.|
|display_name|string|true|none|A display name for the custom row.|
|external_key|string|true|none|The external key of the custom row. Will be unique within the table.|
|id|string|true|none|The id of the custom row|

```json
  "inventory_line_items": [
    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [
        {
          "category_info": {
            "external_id": "string",
            "id": "string",
            "name": "string",
            "type": "AMORTIZATION_TEMPLATE"
          },
          "external_code": "string",
          "external_id": "string",
          "id": "string",
          "name": "string",
          "provider_name": "string"
        }
      ],
      "amount": {
        "amount": 0,
        "currency_code": "USD",
        "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 0
      },
      "memo": "string",
      "quantity": 0,
      "unit_price": {
        "amount": 0,
        "currency_code": "USD",
        "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 0
      }
    }
  ],
  "invoice_number": "string",
  "invoice_urls": [
    "string"
  ],
  "issued_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "line_items": [
    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [
        {
          "category_info": {
            "external_id": "string",
            "id": "string",
            "name": "string",
            "type": "AMORTIZATION_TEMPLATE"
          },
          "external_code": "string",
          "external_id": "string",
          "id": "string",

        }

        "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 0
      },
      "memo": "string"
    }
  ],
  "memo": "string",
  "posting_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "remote_id": "string",
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "sync_status": "NOT_SYNCED",
  "vendor": {
    "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
    "name": "string",

    "remote_id": "string",
    "remote_name": "string",
    "type": "BUSINESS"
  },
  "vendor_memo": "string"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_date|string(date-time)¦null|true|read-only|The date for the bill for accounting purposes. If not specified, falls back to the bill issue date.|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiAccountingFieldSelection](#schemaapiaccountingfieldselection)]|true|none|List of accounting field options selected to code the bill.|
|amount|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)¦null|true|read-only|Amount of the bill, represented in the lowest denomination of the currency (e.g., cents for USD).|
|bill_owner|[ApiBillOwner](#schemaapibillowner)¦null|true|none|Information about the bill owner.|
|created_at|string(date-time)|true|none|The date the bill was created.|
|due_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|The date the bill is due.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Associated business entity.|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|none|
|inventory_line_items|[[ApiDraftBillInventoryLineItem](#schemaapidraftbillinventorylineitem)]|true|none|List of inventory line items related to the bill.|
|invoice_number|string¦null|true|none|The invoice number on the bill.|
|invoice_urls|[string]|true|read-only|Pre-signed urls to download invoice files.|
|issued_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|The date the bill was issued on invoice.|
|line_items|[[ApiDraftBillLineItem](#schemaapidraftbilllineitem)]|true|none|List of line items related to the bill.|
|memo|string¦null|true|none|Memo of the bill.|
|posting_date|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|The date the bill was posted to the ERP. Alternatively known as accounting date, accounting sync date.|
|remote_id|string¦null|true|none|The external ID that identifies the bill on client's side.|
|status|any|true|none|Payment status of the bill. Always DRAFT for provisional bills.|
|sync_status|any|true|none|Sync status of the bill. Always NOT_SYNCED for drafts.|
|vendor|[ApiBillVendor](#schemaapibillvendor)¦null|true|none|Vendor information of the bill.|
|vendor_memo|string¦null|true|none|Memo to the vendor.|

```json
  "created_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|bank_account_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|read-only|Unique identifier of the associated bank account, if exists|
|classification|string|true|none|Classification type of the account (Asset, Liability, Equity, etc.).|
|created_at|string(date-time)|true|none|When the account was created.|
|external_id|string|true|none|External ID of the account. If connected to a direct integration, this value is sourced from the remote ERP system.|
|external_name|string|true|none|External name of the account. If connected to a direct integration, this value is sourced from the remote ERP system.|
|internal_id|string|true|none|Internal ID of the account. This value is entered as the Account ID in Ramp as the unique ID or number assigned by your accounting provider.|
|usage_type|string¦null|true|none|How the account is used within the system (Cash Account, Expense Account, etc.).|

```json
  "is_shareable": true,

    "reimbursements_enabled": false
  },
  "restrictions": {
    "auto_lock_date": null,
    "categories_whitelist": [
      35
    ],
    "interval": "MONTHLY",
    "limit": 500,
    "next_interval_reset": "2022-12-01T00:00:00+00:00",
    "start_of_interval_date": "2022-11-01T00:00:00+00:00",
    "temporary_limit": null,
    "transaction_amount_limit": 200,
    "vendor_blacklist": [
      61
    ]
  },
  "spend_program_id": "3a5b1f62-988f-4190-bf31-b7ae87c5dfee",
  "state": "ACTIVE",
  "suspension": {
    "acting_user_id": "e9186c3a-4650-48ef-aee4-56b77f5019bd",
    "inserted_at": "2022-11-03T00:00:00+00:00",
    "suspended_by_ramp": false
  },
  "users": [
    {
      "user_id": "2ba219ba-5867-453f-bec2-b8d0414b7f75"
    }
  ]
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|balance|[ApiSpendAllocationBalance](#schemaapispendallocationbalance)¦null|true|none|Details about the current balance of the limit.|
|cards|[[ApiSpendLimitCardResource](#schemaapispendlimitcardresource)]|true|none|List of cards linked to this limit.|
|created_at|string(date-time)|true|none|Time at which the spend limit is created, presented in ISO8601 format.|
|display_name|string|true|none|Display name of the limit and all linked cards.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Associated business entity of the limit.|
|has_program_overridden|boolean|true|none|Indicates if the limit's settings override those of its Spend Program.|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the limit.|
|is_exempt_from_policy_agent|boolean|true|none|Whether this limit should be exempt from the policy agent.|
|is_shareable|boolean|true|none|Whether this spend limit is shareable.|
|permitted_spend_types|[ApiPermittedSpendTypesDump](#schemaapipermittedspendtypesdump)|true|none|Specifies the permitted spend types of the limit.|
|restrictions|[ApiSpendingRestrictionsDump](#schemaapispendingrestrictionsdump)¦null|true|none|Restrictions imposed on this limit.|
|spend_program_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier of the associated Spend Program.|
|state|string|true|none|Current state of the limit.|
|suspension|[ApiSuspensionDump](#schemaapisuspensiondump)¦null|true|none|Suspension (lock) on the limit.|
|users|[[ApiSpendLimitMember](#schemaapispendlimitmember)]|true|none|Members who can spend from the limit.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|state|ACTIVE|
|state|SUSPENDED|
|state|TERMINATED|

|---|---|---|---|---|

```json
        "value": "<UUID>"
      }
    }
  ]
}

  },
```

```json
    "USER_INVITED"
  ]
}
```

|event_types|[string]|true|none|Events that this subscription will receive|

```json
{
  "business_id": "b12a3456-7890-1234-5678-901234567890",
  "created_at": "2023-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "endpoint_url": "https://example.com/webhook",
  "event_types": [
    "transactions.ready_for_review"
  ],
  "id": "c16b6ee1-2f5d-45e9-9fb4-c1c541a9ea70",
  "status": "ACTIVE",
  "updated_at": "2023-01-02T00:00:00Z"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|business_id|string(uuid)|false|none|UUID of the business that this webhook subscription is for|
|created_at|string(date-time)|true|none|ISO-8601 timestamp when the subscription was created|
|endpoint_url|string|true|none|URL where webhook events will be sent|
|event_types|[string]|true|none|Types of events this subscription will receive|
|id|string|true|none|Unique identifier for the webhook subscription|
|status|string|true|none|Current status of the webhook subscription|
|updated_at|string(date-time)|true|none|ISO-8601 timestamp when the subscription was last updated|

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|status|active|
|status|inactive|
|status|pending_verification|

|event_types|[string]|true|none|Types of events this subscription will receive|
|id|string|true|none|Unique identifier for the webhook subscription|
|secret|string|true|none|Secret key for the webhook subscription|
|status|string|true|none|Current status of the webhook subscription|
|updated_at|string(date-time)|true|none|ISO-8601 timestamp when the subscription was last updated|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|status|active|
|status|inactive|
|status|pending_verification|

<h2 id="tocS_PCICardDetails">PCICardDetails</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schemapcicarddetails"></a>

```json
{
  "created_at": "2024-05-12T01:37:27Z",
  "cvv": "449",
  "expiration": "1226",
  "id": "a40a6ce8-70d4-4d06-91e1-0728ad9bbe39",
  "pan": "4403900918007455"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|created_at|string(date-time)|false|none|Date time at which the card is created. It conforms to ISO8601 format|
|cvv|string|false|none|Card Verification Value.|
|expiration|string|false|none|Card expiration date in MMYY format.|
|id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of the card.|
|pan|string|false|none|Primary account number (PAN) of the card.|

<h2 id="tocS_PCILimit">PCILimit</h2>

```json
{

    "cvv": "449",
    "expiration": "1226",
    "id": "a40a6ce8-70d4-4d06-91e1-0728ad9bbe39",
    "pan": "4403900918007455"
  },
  "created_at": "2024-05-12T01:37:27Z",
  "display_name": "Travel Hotel Booking Purchase",
  "restrictions": {
    "allowed_categories": [
      35
    ],
    "allowed_vendors": [],
    "auto_lock_date": "2026-12-01T00:00:00Z",
    "blocked_categories": [],
    "blocked_vendors": [],
    "interval": "TOTAL",
    "limit": {
      "amount": 50000,
      "currency_code": "USD"
    }
  },
  "spend_limit_id": "d8135cfe-0396-4b2d-b2cf-ad809fb04731",
  "spend_program_id": null,
  "user_id": "2ba219ba-5867-453f-bec2-b8d0414b7f75"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|card|[PCICardDetails](#schemapcicarddetails)|true|read-only|Card details.|
|created_at|string(date-time)|true|none|Time at which the limit is created, presented in ISO8601 format.|
|display_name|string¦null|true|none|Display name of the limit.|
|restrictions|[ApiSpendingRestrictionsDump](#schemaapispendingrestrictionsdump)|true|read-only|Restrictions imposed on this limit.|
|spend_limit_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the limit.|
|spend_program_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier of the associated Spend Program.|
|user_id|string(uuid)|true|read-only|Unique identifier of the user this limit is assigned to.|

```json
          "accounting_field_selections": [
            {
              "category_info": {
                "external_id": "GL_ACCOUNT",
                "id": "966e61ca-f54e-4c62-813e-4f5b4050bb22",
                "name": "GL Account",
                "type": "GL_ACCOUNT"
              },
              "external_id": "601000",
              "id": "3353e3e9-c6ed-4bcf-8349-0668cf351d97",
              "name": "Office Supplies",
              "type": "GL_ACCOUNT"
            }
          ],
          "amount": {
            "amount": 25000,
            "currency_code": "USD",
            "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 100
          },
          "memo": "Inventory line item memo",
          "unit_price": {
            "amount": 5000,
            "currency_code": "USD",
            "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 100
          },
          "unit_quantity": 5
        }
      ],
      "reference_bill_id": "b1a2c3d4-e5f6-7890-1234-567890abcdef",
      "reference_number": "VENDORCREDITREF_12345",
      "remaining_amount": {
        "amount": 100000,
        "currency_code": "USD",
        "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 100
      },
      "total_amount": {
        "amount": 200000,
        "currency_code": "USD",
        "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 100
      },

        "amount": 100000,
        "currency_code": "USD",
        "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 100
      },
      "vendor_id": "f1e2d3c4-b5a6-7890-1234-567890fedcba"
    }
  ],
  "page": {
    "next": "https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/<resources>?<new_params>"
  }
}
```

```json
  ],

  ],
  "categories_whitelist": [
    1
  ],
  "currency": "string",

  "lock_date": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "policy_id": "string",
  "transaction_amount_limit": "string",
  "vendor_blacklist": [
    "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
  ],

  ]
}
```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|amount|number|false|none|Amount limit total per interval.|

oneOf

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|» *anonymous*|string(decimal)|false|none|none|

xor

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|» *anonymous*|number|false|none|none|

continued

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|blocked_mcc_codes|[string]|false|none|none|
|categories|[integer]|false|none|List of Ramp category codes that this card is restricted to.|
|categories_blacklist|[integer]|false|none|none|
|categories_whitelist|[integer]|false|none|none|
|currency|string|false|none|Currency in which the amount is specified.|
|interval|string|false|none|Time interval to apply limit to.|
|lock_date|string(date-time)¦null|false|none|Date to automatically lock the card. If `lock_date` has passed, set to a future date or to null to unlock the card.|
|policy_id|string|false|none|none|
|transaction_amount_limit|number|false|none|Max amount limit per transaction.|

oneOf

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|» *anonymous*|string(decimal)|false|none|none|

xor

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|» *anonymous*|number|false|none|none|

continued

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|vendor_blacklist|[string]|false|none|none|
|vendor_whitelist|[string]|false|none|none|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|

|interval|DAILY|
|interval|MONTHLY|
|interval|QUARTERLY|
|interval|TERTIARY|
|interval|TOTAL|
|interval|WEEKLY|
|interval|YEARLY|

```json
{
  "created_at": "2022-08-20T20:33:46+00:00",
  "id": "0a0ed428-0250-4993-96ad-94cd77bc86b6",
  "receipt_url": "https://receipts.ramp.com/sales_demo_instance/amazon_business_receipt.png?Expires=1661130671",
  "transaction_id": "065916d9-7bdf-4aae-a46a-9b82225f2a20",
  "user_id": "ea0d554a-78bb-4402-a3e9-2d4bc138502f"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|created_at|string(date-time)|false|none|Timestamp when the receipt was created.|
|id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier for the receipt.|
|receipt_url|string|true|read-only|Pre-signed URL to download receipt image (valid for 1 hour by default).|
|transaction_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Transaction associated with this receipt.|
|user_id|string(uuid)|false|none|User who uploaded the receipt.|

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_date|string(date-time)¦null|true|read-only|The date for the reimbursement for accounting purposes. If not specified, falls back to the transaction date.|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiReimbursementAccountingFieldSelection](#schemaapireimbursementaccountingfieldselection)]|true|none|List of accounting fields selected to code the reimbursement.|
|amount|number¦null|true|none|The amount that the payor pays.|
|approved_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Time at which the reimbursement is approved. Presented in ISO8601 format.|
|attendees|[[ApiReimbursementAttendee](#schemaapireimbursementattendee)]|true|none|List of attendees for the reimbursement.|
|created_at|string(date-time)|true|none|Time at which the reimbursement is created. Presented in ISO8601 format.|
|currency|string|true|none|The currency that the payor pays with.|
|direction|string|true|none|The direction of the reimbursement. It could be either BUSINESS_TO_USER or USER_TO_BUSINESS.|
|distance|number¦null|true|none|The distance of the reimbursement in miles, for mileage reimbursements.|
|employee_id|string¦null|true|none|Employee ID of the person who made the reimbursement.|
|end_location|string¦null|true|none|Ending location of the trip, for mileage reimbursements.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier of the associated business entity.|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the reimbursement.|
|line_items|[[ApiReimbursementLineItem](#schemaapireimbursementlineitem)]|true|none|List of line items related to the reimbursement.|
|memo|string¦null|true|none|Reimbursement memo|
|merchant|string¦null|true|none|The name of the merchant that the reimbursement is associated with.|
|merchant_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|The unique identifier of the merchant. Note that this field may be empty when merchant is populated if Ramp does not recognize the merchant.|
|original_reimbursement_amount|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)¦null|true|none|Original reimbursement amount before the currency conversion.|
|payee_amount|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)¦null|true|none|Amount and currency received by the payee.|
|payment_batch_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|The unique identifier of the reimbursement payment batch that the reimbursement is associated with.|
|payment_id|string¦null|true|none|The unique identifier of the payment batch that the reimbursement is associated with, once paid.|
|payment_processed_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Time of reimbursement payment. Presented in ISO8601 format.|
|receipts|[string]|true|read-only|none|
|spend_limit_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Spend limit to which the reimbursement is attributed, if it exists.|
|start_location|string¦null|true|none|Starting location of the trip, for mileage reimbursements.|
|state|string|true|none|current state of the reimbursement.|
|submitted_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Time when reimbursement was most recently submitted|
|sync_status|string|true|read-only|Current sync status of the reimbursement.|
|synced_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Time when reimbursement has been synced. Will be None if the reimbursement is not synced.|
|transaction_date|string(date)¦null|true|none|none|
|trip_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Trip ID associated with the reimbursement if a Trip ID is available.|
|type|string|true|none|The type of the reimbursement.|
|updated_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Time at which the reimbursement was last updated. Presented in ISO8601 format.|
|user_email|string|true|none|Email of the person who made the reimbursement.|
|user_full_name|string|true|none|Full name of the person who made the reimbursement.|
|user_id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the person who made the reimbursement.|
|waypoints|[string]|true|none|List of intermediate stops during the trip, for mileage reimbursements.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|direction|BUSINESS_TO_USER|
|direction|USER_TO_BUSINESS|
|state|APPROVED|
|state|AWAITING_EXPORT|
|state|AWAITING_PAYMENT|
|state|AWAITING_PUSH_PAYMENT|
|state|CANCELED|
|state|DELETED|
|state|DRAFT|
|state|EXPORTED|
|state|EXPORT_FAILED|
|state|EXPORT_INITIATED|
|state|EXPORT_MARKED_AS_FAILED|
|state|EXPORT_SUCCESSFUL|
|state|FAILED_REIMBURSEMENT|
|state|INIT|
|state|MANUALLY_REIMBURSED|
|state|MISSING_ACH|
|state|PENDING|
|state|PROCESSING|
|state|PUSH_PAYMENT_FAILED|
|state|PUSH_PAYMENT_INITIATED|
|state|REIMBURSED|
|state|REIMBURSED_VIA_PUSH|
|state|REJECTED|
|sync_status|NOT_SYNC_READY|
|sync_status|SYNCED|
|sync_status|SYNC_READY|
|type|MILEAGE|
|type|OUT_OF_POCKET|
|type|PAYBACK_FULL|
|type|PAYBACK_PARTIAL|
|type|PER_DIEM|

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_categories|[[ApiAccountingCategory](#schemaapiaccountingcategory)]|false|read-only|[Deprecated - use accounting_field_selections instead] Accounting categories related to the transaction.|
|accounting_date|string(date-time)¦null|true|read-only|The date for the transaction for accounting purposes, in ISO8601 format. Based on the cleared date, transaction date, or a manually overridden date, depending on your accounting preferences in Ramp.|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiTransactionAccountingFieldSelection](#schemaapitransactionaccountingfieldselection)]|false|none|List of accounting fields selected to code the transaction.|
|amount|number|false|none|Settled amount of the transaction.|
|attendees|[[ApiTransactionAttendee](#schemaapitransactionattendee)]|false|none|List of attendees for the transaction|
|card_holder|[ApiTransactionCardHolder](#schemaapitransactioncardholder)|false|none|Information about the card holder.|
|card_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Identifier of the physical or virtual card associated with the transaction.|
|card_present|boolean|true|none|Whether the transaction was processed using a card present terminal.|
|currency_code|string|false|none|Currency that the transaction is settled in.|
|decline_details|[ApiTransactionDeclineDetails](#schemaapitransactiondeclinedetails)|false|none|Details about a transaction decline.|
|disputes|[[ApiTransactionDispute](#schemaapitransactiondispute)]|false|read-only|A list of disputes sorted in descending order by their creation time.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier of business entity associated with the transaction.|
|id|string(uuid)|false|none|none|
|limit_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of the spend limit associated with the transaction|
|line_items|[[ApiTransactionLineItem](#schemaapitransactionlineitem)]|false|none|List of line items related to the transaction.|
|memo|string¦null|false|none|none|
|merchant_category_code|string|false|none|Merchant category code is a four-digit number in ISP 18245 used to classify a business by the types of goods and services it provides.|
|merchant_category_code_description|string|false|none|Description about the merchant category code.|
|merchant_data|[ApiTransactionPurchaseData](#schemaapitransactionpurchasedata)|false|none|Purchase data associated related to a transaction provided by the merchant|
|merchant_descriptor|string|false|none|A merchant descriptor is the name that appears on a customer's bank statement when they make a purchase from that merchant.|
|merchant_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|none|
|merchant_location|[ApiMerchantLocation](#schemaapimerchantlocation)¦null|true|none|Card acceptor data such as country, city, state, and postal code if available.|
|merchant_name|string¦null|false|read-only|none|
|minor_unit_conversion_rate|integer¦null|true|read-only|The conversion factor to convert from the integer amount to the actual currency value. Divide amount by this value to get the real currency amount. For USD, this is 100 (e.g., 12034 / 100 = 120.34 USD).|
|original_transaction_amount|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)¦null|true|none|the original transaction amount before the currency conversion.|
|policy_violations|[[ApiTransactionPolicyViolation](#schemaapitransactionpolicyviolation)]|false|read-only|A list of policy violations sorted in descending order by their creation time.|
|receipt_affidavit|string¦null|false|read-only|none|
|receipts|[string]|false|read-only|Receipts listed in ascending order by their creation time, related to the transaction.|
|requires_accounting_vendor_creation_to_sync|boolean|false|read-only|Whether the integrator must create an accounting vendor and code it to this transaction before syncing. True when the connection has transaction_accounting_vendor_creation_on_sync_enabled=true and the transaction has no vendor accounting field selection. Omitted when transaction_accounting_vendor_creation_on_sync_enabled=false.|
|settlement_date|string(date-time)|false|none|Time when funds were moved for a transaction, in ISO8601 format.|
|sk_category_id|integer¦null|true|read-only|Ramp category code.|
|sk_category_name|string¦null|true|read-only|Ramp category name.|
|spend_program_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of the spend program from which this limit was issued.|
|state|string|false|none|transaction state.|
|statement_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Statement ID associated with the transaction if one is available.|
|sync_status|string|true|read-only|none|
|synced_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Time when transaction has been synced, in ISO8601 format. Will be None if the transaction is not synced.|
|trip_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Trip ID associated with the transaction if one is available.|
|trip_name|string¦null|true|none|Trip name associated with the transaction if one is available.|
|user_transaction_time|string(date-time)|false|none|Time when the transaction was created by the user, in ISO8601 format.|

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|allowed_categories|[integer]|true|none|List of Ramp category codes allowed for the limit.|
|allowed_vendors|[string]|true|none|List of merchants allowed for the limit.|
|auto_lock_date|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Date to automatically to lock the limit.|
|blocked_categories|[integer]|true|none|List of Ramp category codes blocked for the limit.|
|blocked_vendors|[string]|true|none|List of merchants  blocked for the limit.|
|interval|string|true|none|Time interval the limit is applied on.|
|limit|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)¦null|true|read-only|Amount limit total per interval denominated in cents. Currency is USD.|
|next_interval_reset|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Date and time for the next interval reset.|
|start_of_interval|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Date and time for the start of the current interval.|
|temporary_limit|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)¦null|true|read-only|Temporary limit total per interval.|
|transaction_amount_limit|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)¦null|true|read-only|Max amount allowed on a single transaction.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|

|interval|CUSTOM|

|interval|MONTHLY|
|interval|QUARTERLY|
|interval|TERTIARY|
|interval|TOTAL|
|interval|WEEKLY|
|interval|YEARLY|

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|context|[ApiSpendLimitDeferredTaskContext](#schemaapispendlimitdeferredtaskcontext)|true|none|Further context for the deferred task.|
|data|[ApiSpendLimitDeferredTaskData](#schemaapispendlimitdeferredtaskdata)|true|read-only|Detailed data of the deferred task.|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the deferred task.|
|status|string|true|read-only|Status of the deferred task. It could be one of the following values: STARTED, IN_PROGRESS, ERROR, SUCCESS|

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|balance_sections|[[StatementBalanceSection](#schemastatementbalancesection)]|true|none|Breakdown of statement balances by entity and currency.|
|charges|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|none|Total charges incurred during the statement period|
|credits|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|none|Total credits accumulated during the statement period|
|end_date|string(date-time)|true|none|End date of the statement period.|
|ending_balance|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|none|Balance at the end of the statement period|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier for the statement.|
|opening_balance|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|none|Balance at the beginning of the statement period|
|payments|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|none|Total payments made during the statement period|
|preceding_statement_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Identifier of the previous statement in sequence.|
|start_date|string(date-time)|true|none|Start date of the statement period.|
|statement_lines|[[ApiStatementItem](#schemaapistatementitem)]|true|none|Financial activities including card transactions, transfers, and cashbacks during the statement period.|
|statement_url|string(url)|false|none|Pre-signed URL to download statement PDF, valid for 1 hour after generation.|

<h2 id="tocS_TokenRequestBody">TokenRequestBody</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schematokenrequestbody"></a>
<a id="schema_TokenRequestBody"></a>
<a id="tocStokenrequestbody"></a>
<a id="tocstokenrequestbody"></a>

```json
{
  "code": "wUvTfJmrDiTogz3dRNsUJdBRtSl658ibsH8xLKwKQ2PbttRr",
  "grant_type": "authorization_code",
  "redirect_uri": "https://www.yourawesomeapp.com",
  "refresh_token": "ramp_tok_IwOGYzYTlmM2YxOTQ5MGE3YmNmMDFkNTVk",
  "scope": "users:read users:write"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|code|string|false|none|Authorization code obtained from request to https://app.ramp.com/v1/authorize, to be exchanged for access token. Field is required if grant_type=authorization_code.|
|grant_type|string|true|none|Grant type, must be one of: ['authorization_code', 'client_credentials', 'refresh_token']. Refresh token and client credentials grants must be added to app's permitted Grant Types.|
|redirect_uri|string|false|none|The redirect URI previously used in the authorization request, used to verify app. Field is required if grant_type=authorization_code.|
|refresh_token|string|false|none|The refresh token issued to you to get a new access token.|
|scope|string|false|none|Space-separated list of scopes to be granted to the returned token. These must be a subset (including full set) of the app's allowed scopes. Field is required if grant_type=client_credentials.|

#### Enumerated Values

|Property|Value|
|---|---|
|grant_type|authorization_code|
|grant_type|client_credentials|
|grant_type|refresh_token|

<h2 id="tocS_TokenResponse">TokenResponse</h2>
<!-- backwards compatibility -->
<a id="schematokenresponse"></a>
<a id="schema_TokenResponse"></a>
<a id="tocStokenresponse"></a>
<a id="tocstokenresponse"></a>

```json
{
  "access_token": "ramp_tok_o4bfbrfhDBdXcjjTBMD1iTTXdprRuHdcmne8gR5zfSV78uPe",
  "expires_in": 3600,
  "refresh_token": "ramp_tok_IwOGYzYTlmM2YxOTQ5MGE3YmNmMDFkNTVk",
  "scope": "business:read transactions:read",
  "token_type": "Bearer"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|access_token|string|false|none|The access token string. Prefixed with ramp_tok_.|
|expires_in|integer|false|none|The duration of which the token is valid, measured in seconds.|
|id_token|string|false|none|An OpenID Connect ID token.|
|refresh_token|string|false|none|Refresh token can be used to get a new access token. Note that refresh token won't appear in the response for client_credentials grant type. Prefixed with ramp_tok_.|
|scope|string|false|none|Space-separated list of scopes of the access token.|
|token_type|string|false|none|The type of the token. This should always be 'Bearer'.|

|---|---|
|token_type_hint|access_token|
|token_type_hint|refresh_token|

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_categories|[[ApiAccountingCategory](#schemaapiaccountingcategory)]|false|read-only|[Deprecated - use accounting_field_selections instead] Accounting categories related to the transaction.|
|accounting_date|string(date-time)¦null|true|read-only|The date for the transaction for accounting purposes, in ISO8601 format. Based on the cleared date, transaction date, or a manually overridden date, depending on your accounting preferences in Ramp.|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiTransactionAccountingFieldSelection](#schemaapitransactionaccountingfieldselection)]|false|none|List of accounting fields selected to code the transaction.|
|amount|number|false|none|Settled amount of the transaction.|
|attendees|[[ApiTransactionAttendee](#schemaapitransactionattendee)]|false|none|List of attendees for the transaction|
|card_holder|[ApiTransactionCardHolder](#schemaapitransactioncardholder)|false|none|Information about the card holder.|
|card_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Identifier of the physical or virtual card associated with the transaction.|
|card_present|boolean|true|none|Whether the transaction was processed using a card present terminal.|
|currency_code|string|false|none|Currency that the transaction is settled in.|
|decline_details|[ApiTransactionDeclineDetails](#schemaapitransactiondeclinedetails)|false|none|Details about a transaction decline.|
|disputes|[[ApiTransactionDispute](#schemaapitransactiondispute)]|false|read-only|A list of disputes sorted in descending order by their creation time.|
|entity_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier of business entity associated with the transaction.|
|id|string(uuid)|false|none|none|
|limit_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of the spend limit associated with the transaction|
|line_items|[[ApiTransactionLineItem](#schemaapitransactionlineitem)]|false|none|List of line items related to the transaction.|
|memo|string¦null|false|none|none|
|merchant_category_code|string|false|none|Merchant category code is a four-digit number in ISP 18245 used to classify a business by the types of goods and services it provides.|
|merchant_category_code_description|string|false|none|Description about the merchant category code.|
|merchant_data|[ApiTransactionPurchaseData](#schemaapitransactionpurchasedata)|false|none|Purchase data associated related to a transaction provided by the merchant|
|merchant_descriptor|string|false|none|A merchant descriptor is the name that appears on a customer's bank statement when they make a purchase from that merchant.|
|merchant_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|none|
|merchant_location|[ApiMerchantLocation](#schemaapimerchantlocation)¦null|true|none|Card acceptor data such as country, city, state, and postal code if available.|
|merchant_name|string¦null|false|read-only|none|
|minor_unit_conversion_rate|integer¦null|true|read-only|The conversion factor to convert from the integer amount to the actual currency value. Divide amount by this value to get the real currency amount. For USD, this is 100 (e.g., 12034 / 100 = 120.34 USD).|
|original_transaction_amount|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)¦null|true|none|the original transaction amount before the currency conversion.|
|policy_violations|[[ApiTransactionPolicyViolation](#schemaapitransactionpolicyviolation)]|false|read-only|A list of policy violations sorted in descending order by their creation time.|
|receipts|[string]|false|read-only|Receipts listed in ascending order by their creation time, related to the transaction.|
|requires_accounting_vendor_creation_to_sync|boolean|false|read-only|Whether the integrator must create an accounting vendor and code it to this transaction before syncing. True when the connection has transaction_accounting_vendor_creation_on_sync_enabled=true and the transaction has no vendor accounting field selection. Omitted when transaction_accounting_vendor_creation_on_sync_enabled=false.|
|settlement_date|string(date-time)|false|none|Time when funds were moved for a transaction, in ISO8601 format.|
|sk_category_id|integer¦null|true|read-only|Ramp category code.|
|sk_category_name|string¦null|true|read-only|Ramp category name.|
|spend_program_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Unique identifier of the spend program from which this limit was issued.|
|state|string|false|none|transaction state.|
|statement_id|string(uuid)|false|none|Statement ID associated with the transaction if one is available.|
|sync_status|string|true|read-only|none|
|synced_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Time when transaction has been synced, in ISO8601 format. Will be None if the transaction is not synced.|
|trip_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Trip ID associated with the transaction if one is available.|
|trip_name|string¦null|true|none|Trip name associated with the transaction if one is available.|
|user_transaction_time|string(date-time)|false|none|Time when the transaction was created by the user, in ISO8601 format.|

|created_at|string(date-time)|true|none|The date and time when this vendor was created.|
|default_entity_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|Unique identifier of the default business entity associated with this vendor.|
|default_payment_method|[DefaultPaymentMethodResource](#schemadefaultpaymentmethodresource)¦null|true|read-only|Default payment method for this vendor, including update source and policy.|
|description|string|false|none|Description of the vendor.|
|external_vendor_id|string¦null|true|none|Customer-defined external identifier for the vendor. This is independent of accounting system remote IDs.|
|federal_tax_classification|string|false|none|The federal tax classification of the vendor.|
|id|string(uuid)|true|none|Unique identifier of the vendor.|
|is_active|boolean|true|none|Whether this vendor is active.|
|is_deletable|boolean|true|read-only|Whether this vendor is deletable.|
|merchant_id|string(uuid)|false|none|The id of the card merchant.|
|name|string|true|none|Name of the vendor.|
|name_legal|string|false|none|Legal name of the vendor.|
|sk_category_id|integer|false|none|Ramp category code of the vendor.|
|sk_category_name|string|false|none|The category name of the vendor.|
|state|string|false|none|none|
|tax_address|[ApiAddressResource](#schemaapiaddressresource)|false|none|The tax address of the vendor.|
|total_spend_all_time|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|read-only|Total spend for all time for this vendor.|
|total_spend_last_30_days|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|read-only|Total spend for the last 30 days for this vendor.|
|total_spend_last_365_days|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|read-only|Total spend for the last 365 days for this vendor.|
|total_spend_ytd|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|read-only|Total spend year-to-date for this vendor.|
|vendor_owner_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|read-only|Unique identifier of the user which owns this vendor.|
|vendor_type|string|false|none|The type of vendor if bill pay.|

```json
  "created_at": "2019-08-28T14:15:22+00:00",
  "id": "123",
  "is_active": true,
  "is_synced": true,
  "name": "Amazon",
  "provider_name": "QuickBooks",
```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_connection_id|string(uuid)|true|none|ID of the accounting connection that the vendor is uploaded to.|
|code|string|false|none|e.g. 19566|
|created_at|string(date-time)|true|none|Date time at which the vendor account was created on Ramp.|
|id|string|false|none|Remote/external ID of accounting vendor in ERP system.|
|is_active|boolean|true|none|Whether this vendor account is active on Ramp|
|is_synced|boolean|true|none|Whether this vendor has been synced to remote ERP.|
|name|string|true|none|Name of the vendor.|
|provider_name|string¦null|true|read-only|Name of the accounting connection that the vendor is uploaded to.|
|ramp_id|string(uuid)|true|none|id to uniquely identify a vendor account within Ramp system|
|updated_at|string(date-time)|true|none|Date time at which the vendor account was most recently updated.|
|vendor_category_info|[ApiAccountingCategoryInfo](#schemaapiaccountingcategoryinfo)|false|none|Category info of the general ledger account.|

```json
  ],
  "created_at": "2022-08-22T10:30:00.000000+00:00",
  "expense_line_items": [
    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [
        {
          "category_info": {
            "external_id": "GL_ACCOUNT",
            "id": "396d543c-cbc4-40e9-b39e-2f70904ca1fc",
            "name": "GL Account",

          },

        }
      ],

        "currency_code": "USD",

    }
  ],
  "id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-1234-567890abcdef",
  "inventory_line_items": [
    {
      "accounting_field_selections": [
        {
          "category_info": {
            "external_id": "GL_ACCOUNT",
            "id": "966e61ca-f54e-4c62-813e-4f5b4050bb22",
            "name": "GL Account",
            "type": "GL_ACCOUNT"
          },
          "external_id": "601000",

          "name": "Office Supplies",

      ],

    "amount": 100000,
    "currency_code": "USD",
    "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 100
  },
  "total_amount": {
    "amount": 200000,
    "currency_code": "USD",
    "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 100
  },
  "total_applied_amount": {
    "amount": 100000,
    "currency_code": "USD",
    "minor_unit_conversion_rate": 100
  },
  "vendor_id": "f1e2d3c4-b5a6-7890-1234-567890fedcba"
}

```

### Properties

|Name|Type|Required|Restrictions|Description|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|accounting_date|string(date)|true|none|Accounting date of the vendor credit|
|accounting_field_selections|[[ApiAccountingFieldSelection](#schemaapiaccountingfieldselection)]|true|read-only|List of accounting field selections associated with this vendor credit|
|applied_bills|[[VendorCreditAppliedBill](#schemavendorcreditappliedbill)]|true|read-only|Bills that this Vendor Credit has been applied to. A Vendor Credit can be applied to multiple Bills|
|applied_draft_bills|[[VendorCreditAppliedBill](#schemavendorcreditappliedbill)]|true|read-only|Draft Bills that this Vendor Credit has been applied to. A Vendor Credit can be applied to multiple Draft Bills|
|created_at|string(date-time)¦null|true|none|Date and time when the vendor credit was created|
|expense_line_items|[[VendorCreditExpenseLineItem](#schemavendorcreditexpenselineitem)]|true|none|Expense line items of the vendor credit. Expense line items contain an overall amount.|
|id|string|true|none|Unique identifier for the vendor credit|
|inventory_line_items|[[VendorCreditInventoryLineItem](#schemavendorcreditinventorylineitem)]|true|none|Inventory line items of the vendor credit. Inventory line items are tied to a particular good or service.|
|reference_bill_id|string(uuid)¦null|true|none|UUID of the bill that was the origin of this vendor credit, if any|
|reference_number|string¦null|true|none|Reference number from the vendor credit memo|
|remaining_amount|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|read-only|Remaining amount available to be applied, equal to total_amount minus total_applied_amount. Currently only USD is supported for Vendor Credits.|
|total_amount|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|read-only|Total amount of the vendor credit, sum of all line items. Currently only USD is supported for Vendor Credits.|
|total_applied_amount|[CurrencyAmount](#schemacurrencyamount)|true|read-only|Total amount that has been applied to bills and/or draft bills. Currently only USD is supported for Vendor Credits.|
|vendor_id|string(uuid)|true|none|UUID of the payee associated with this vendor credit|
